Name: The Brook Waimārama Sanctuary
Description: The Brook Waimārama Sanctuary is a fully fenced (700 hectare) urban ecosanctuary just 10 minutes outside Nelson's CBD. The sanctuary aims to reestablish natural ecosystems, allowing native plants and animals to thrive without threats from introduced pests or predators. The Brook Sanctuary is home to some of New Zealand's rare and extraordinary wildlife. Species such as kiwi and tuatara roam freely, thriving in the protected sanctuary. From guided tours to educational programs, the Brook is the perfect place to bring your family and friends to reconnect with nature while making a difference in conservation.

Name: GEPEC-EdC
Description: Defensem i conservem el #mediambient al sud de Catalunya protegim espècies en perill i els seus hàbitats

Name: WildEd Zim
Description:
At WildEd Zim, we believe that lasting conservation begins with those who will inherit the Earth, our children and youth. By equipping young people with knowledge, creativity, and practical skills, we empower them to become leaders in protecting the natural world and shaping a sustainable future.

Our approach blends conservation education with the power of art, sport, social media, and technology, tools that inspire and connect with young minds in ways that are relevant, engaging, and transformative. We also recognise that environmental challenges cannot be separated from social ones. That’s why our work connects conservation to real-life community issues, helping young people see that caring for nature is deeply linked to caring for people.

Through every project, workshop, and engagement, WildEd seeks to spark curiosity, build confidence, and nurture a generation that not only understands the importance of the environment but also feels equipped and motivated to protect it.

Name: Makuku Private Game Reserve
Description:
Makuku Private Game Reserve is a 3600 ha. wildlife estate. Resident species include Leopard, African Elephant, Zebra and many more predatory and antelope species.
The reserve is situated near the Okavango Delta in Botswana.
A Speech Investments (pty) LTD company

Name: Franklin Land Trust
Description:
The Franklin Land Trust (FLT) is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization dedicated to helping people preserve the places they love. 

Since 1987, we’ve partnered with farmers and landowners to protect over 35,000 acres of farmland, forests, and wildlife habitat. FLT has helped hundreds of families craft conservation plans that address their financial goals, family needs, and vision for the land’s future. Our work sustains the region’s agricultural and forestry economy while preserving its scenic beauty, rural character, and ecological integrity for generations to come.

Our commitment to community comes to life each year at the Deerfield Dirt-Road Randonnee (D2R2), a world-class cycling event hailed as one of the most challenging and beautiful rides in the country. D2R2 celebrates the beauty of our hilltowns while raising essential funds to support FLT’s ongoing conservation and stewardship efforts.

Name: Global Conservation Consortium for Magnolia
Description: The Global Conservation Consortium for Magnolia is a coordinated network of institutions and experts working to  prevent the extinction of the world’s Magnolia species.

Name: RPM Indigenous Group
Description:
RPM Indigenous is a multi-faceted company. We provide energy management, construction, and engineering solutions for residential, commercial and industrial settings.

We hedge energy and sell products that reduce, produce and off set energy (smart LED, Power Factor, Solar, Battery Storage, REC's, water management). We consult, analyze, and implement construction of roads, traffic, pole and meter replacement, integrity digging, drilling, crane operations, environmental remediation, response and training, excavating and building large and small facilities.  We do diesel plant conversions and hydro and cable installing.

We also have financial advisors to help re-investment within the community.

Name: Manta Watch NZ
Description:
Manta Watch New Zealand combines dedicated research and citizen science to learn more about Aotearoa’s manta and devil rays. We advocate for Aotearoa New Zealand’s oceanic ecosystems through research, conservation, education, and collaboration.

Our aim is to foster knowledge of and advocacy for Aotearoa New Zealand’s oceanic ecosystems through research, conservation, education, and collaboration. This is being achieved by:

- Scientific research on the data deficient and globally endangered mobulid ray species found in Aotearoa’s waters; the oceanic manta ray and spinetail devil ray.

- Communicating findings to the scientific community, relevant management bodies, iwi, local communities, and the general public.

- Creating opportunities to engage with schools and communities to advance oceanic marine environmental education and advocacy, through citizen science, presentations, and outreach. 

- Recognising and respecting the cultural values of kaitiakitanga and Mātauranga Māori of the oceanic environment to tangata whenua through knowledge sharing, project collaborations and partnership.

Name: NATIONAL MILITARY FISH AND WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION
Description: The National Military Fish and Wildlife Association connects, educates, supports, and advocates for natural resources professionals across the Department of Defense to protect and enhance the military mission through sustainable resource conservation.

Name: CaminanTr3s
Description: CaminanTr3s es un laboratorio de experiencias compartidas que giran en torno a la gestión del conocimiento en las áreas de la comunicación y la educación para la mitigación de los efectos del cambio climático y la adaptación del ser humano al mismo. Generamos cajas de herramientas de libre acceso en donde todos aprendemos sobre la comunicación, la visibilización y el turismo comunitario.

Name: Reserva Nacional de Pomene
Description:
A Reserva Nacional de Pomene, é uma área de conservação da biodiversidade, localizada no distrito da Massinga, Província de Inhambane. A Reserva Nacional de Pomene foi estabelecida, através do Diploma Legislativo nº 109/72, de 16 de Novembro, originalmente como Reserva Parcial de Caça do Pomene, e com o intuito de alargar as áreas de proteção da natureza, no então designado Distrito de Inhambane, de forma a envolver nelas zonas oferecendo a maior gama de características ecológicas possível e com o objetivo principal a proteção do boi cavalo.
A Reserva Nacional de Pomene tem a extensão de uma área de 50km² fazendo limite com quatro comunidades da zona tampão nomeadamente: Minerva, Nhaushua, Pomene e Muxungo.

Name: Amaru Foundation
Description:
Amaru Foundation's main goal is to contribute to the conservation and protection of biodiversity, focusing on Ecuador's most threatened species, ethnicities, and habitats. Our main activities include wildlife protection, environmental education and research, and habitat conservation projects.

Wildlife Protection:
In Amaru Wildlife Conservation Center we host over 2,000 different species in 8 hectares dedicated to protecting wildlife. Our team of 40+ scientists, biologists and environmentalists has over 20 years of experience taking care of, rescuing, rehabilitating, and reintroducing wild fauna to its natural habitat. We receive over 80,000 annual visits to our center and rescue over 400 species each year. 

Environmental Education and Research:
Amarus' team has published 10 scientific papers which include the discovery of a new Andean species of Philodryas (green snake), protocols to breed and rehabilitate the Andean bear, and an investigation on monitoring the Andean Condor.

Habitat Conservation Projects:
Amaru Foundation protects over 1,000 hectares of Andean and Amazonian threatened forests. We aim to expand our protected territory to up to 2,000 hectares in the next 2 years. Our mission is to preserve natural habitats in partnership with local communities and promote sustainable activities that will ensure social, environmental, and economical sustainability.

Name: Project Laut
Description:
Project Laut was established in 2020 with the aim of raising awareness and improving the information available on the critically endangered hawksbill sea turtles in Indonesia. In addition, Project Laut now focuses on the restoration of the marine habitat surrounding the island of Nusa Penida. Our Divemaster and Conservation Internship is also central to the operations. Within a matter of months, interns not only receive their SSI Divemaster certification, but regularly participate in hawksbill identification and learn coral restoration techniques. To date, our organization has certified over 50 Divemasters, identified over 250 individual hawksbill sea turtles and made over 400 resightings of hawksbills. Additionally, Project Laut has restored over 100m2 of previously dredged ocean habitat via coral planting on rebar structures. Our program is meticulously designed to equip university students and recent graduates with practical, hands-on conservation experience in one of the world's marine biodiversity hotspots.

Program Highlights:

Hawksbill Turtle Monitoring: Engage in intricate photo-identification processes, track turtle movements, and contribute to our significant database with over 300 identified turtles and 2000+ interactions.

Coral Restoration Initiatives: Learn the MARRS assisted reef technique, experiment with coral planting strategies, and be part of our proud achievement in coral restoration with over 100 square meters of reef stabilized.

Comprehensive Divemaster Training: Our program, renowned for its depth, ensures that every intern undertakes between 60-100 dives, acquainting them with the rich marine biodiversity of Nusa Penida.

Program Duration:
Spanning 8 to 14 weeks, the program offers flexibility, with options for week-by-week extensions.

Location:
Positioned in the marine protected area of Nusa Penida, Bali, our location serves as both a stunning backdrop and a significant site for marine conservation efforts.

Name: Youstainable
Description:
Youstainable - Dein Beitrag zur Nachhaltigkeit

Förderung der Biodiversität durch Beteiligungen an Blumenwiesen von Privatpersonen und Unternehmen.

Mit Youstainable kannst du einfach und transparent die Vorbereitung, Aussaat und Pflege einer Blumenwiese mit einem jährlichen Beitrag unterstützen. Du förderst mit mehrjährigen Blumenwiesen die Biodiversität langfristig basierend auf wissenschaftlichen Fakten. Alle Blumenwiesen werden in der Schweiz mit lokalen Partnern angelegt.

Name: ConsoPreserve Solutions
Description: "Welcome to ConsoPreserve Solutions, where heritage meets innovation. Our passion lies in safeguarding the treasures of the past and the materials that shape our cultural narrative. With a commitment to preserving history and ensuring the longevity of valuable artifacts, we offer cutting-edge solutions that harmonize tradition with modern conservation techniques. Explore our comprehensive services designed to protect heritage and materials, ensuring a lasting legacy for generations to come. Join us on a journey of preservation, where the past meets the future seamlessly."

Name: Consórcio Público Agência Ambiental do Vale do Paraíba
Description: A Agência Ambiental do Vale do Paraíba tem como principal objetivo a formulação de licenciamento ambiental, oferecer diretrizes aos consórcios público, além de ser responsável pelo apoio às ações de associativismo municipal e gestão compartilhada, com finalidade de fundação dos consórcios públicos para proporcionar o desenvolvimento regional com soluções de gestão das funções públicas de interesse comum.
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: LIFE Carbon Farming ULiège
Description: Le réchauffement climatique est aujourd’hui un enjeu majeur de notre société. Le secteur de l’agriculture contribue à hauteur de 10% à l'émission totale de gaz à effet de serre d'origine anthropique en Europe (source Eurostat 2019). Le secteur agricole est incriminé particulièrement dans les émissions de méthane et de protoxyde d'azote. L'objectif du projet LIFE Carbon Farming est de diminuer l'impact des émissions agricoles, en diminuant l'empreinte carbone des exploitations de polyculture-élevage dans 6 pays Européens.  L'objectif est d'implémenter en collaboration avec les agriculteurs des pratiques qui à terme permettront de diminuer leur empreinte C de 15%.  700 fermes participent à ce projet.

Name: Conservation Genetics 2024
Description: The 6th Conservation Genetics Meeting will take place in Lausanne, Switzerland, from August 28 to August 30, 2024.  Subtitle of the Conference: "How can research support pragmatic conservation policies ?"

Name: Sierra Club San Diego Chapter
Description: Become a member of the the Sierra Club San Diego Chapter and join more than 13,000 members in San Diego and Imperial Counties.

Name: Biodiversity Conservation Club, University of Ibadan (BCC-UI)
Description:
The Biodiversity Conservation Club, University of Ibadan (BCC–UI) is a student-led organization committed to the protection of biodiversity and the promotion of sustainable living through education, advocacy, and action.

Rooted in passion for the environment, our mission is to inspire a generation of students to become stewards of nature: from the smallest ecosystems on campus to the largest environmental challenges facing our world.

We engage students from all disciplines through:
 Awareness campaigns and school outreach
 Tree planting, composting, and green space projects
 Nature walks, biodiversity mapping, and species monitoring
 Workshops, exhibitions, and community engagements
 Strategic partnerships with NGOs, research bodies, and environmental institutions

Our work is guided by the belief that conservation is not just a responsibility, it's a way of life.

Together, we’re creating a future where humans and nature thrive in harmony.

“Towards sustainable utilization of the environment”

Name: Apes Reporting Project
Description:
Apes Reporting Project is a Project of Water Journalists Africa Dedicated to Conservation of the Endangered African Apes & their Habitat through Journalism.
We aim at increasing conservation coverage of the endangered African apes, and amplifying local voices in the international debate about primates protection

Name: PEOPLE AND CARNIVORES
Description:
We protect, reconnect, and restore large carnivore populations in the Northern Rockies by working with the region’s people to prevent human-carnivore conflicts.

When wolves, bears, and big cats get into into conflicts with people or their property, they often end up dead. We work with landowners, tribes, managers, and community groups to design and implement tools to prevent deadly encounters, keeping people safe and carnivores wild.

Name: Association Batang Toru Conservation
Description:
Batang Toru Conservation est une organisation française à but non lucratif visant à 𝐬𝐚𝐮𝐯𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐥𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐧𝐞́𝐬𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐬 via des projets d'appui à la conservation et au développement durable en faveur des communautés locales.

 Désireux de reconnecter l’Homme et la nature, nos objectifs sont multiples : 
1 𝐏𝐫𝐞́𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐥𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐞̂𝐭𝐬 encore viables et leurs ressources
2 Appuyer la 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐜𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞 et le 𝐬𝐮𝐢𝐯𝐢 𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 sur le terrain 
3 Participer au 𝐝𝐞́𝐯𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐮𝐧𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐞́𝐬 locales
4 Mener des actions d’𝐞́𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 et de 𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧

Name: Shark & Marine Research Institute
Description: Shark & Marine Research Institute is a company based out of 9 Kus Drive, Overberg, Western Cape, South Africa.

Name: Naidiri Marine Biodiversity Park
Description: The Naidiri Marine Biodiversity Park is a community-led organisation in the village of Naidiri, Fiji, that is dedicated to protecting our ocean environment for us and future generations. We have established a Marine Protected Area (MPA), locally known as a tabu, since 2009 where fishing is not allowed. Over the years, we have collaborated with NGOs and government ministries to carry out coral and mangrove restoration, introduce snorkelling as a regenerative tourism activity, etc.

Name: Deschutes River Alliance
Description: The Deschutes River Alliance is a science-based advocacy organization seeking collaborative solutions to the threats facing the Wild and Scenic Deschutes River and its tributaries. We advocate for cooler, cleaner water, a healthy ecosystem, and the recovery and protection of robust populations of resident and anadromous fish.

Name: ASBL Une pour Toutes
Description:
“Une Pour Toutes” est une ASBL qui sensibilise à la biodiversité à travers des programmes éducatifs et créatifs qui créent du lien intergénérationnel entre les citoyens, les jeunes, le monde académique, les centres de recherches scientifiques et l’univers artistique

Notre objectif est de créer des “bulles de biodiversité”  dans nos villes. Encourager, conscientiser tous les citadins à (ré)agir concrètement dans leur quotidien.

Name: Deutsche Stiftung für den Comoe Nationalpark
Description: Der Comoé Nationalpark liegt in der Elfenbeinküste in Westafrika. Er ist ein einzigartiges Savannen-Ökosystem, das durch seine beeindruckende Vielfalt an Arten und Lebensräumen besticht. Hier leben auf einer Fläche, die nur halb so groß ist wie Hessen, fast 1,5-mal so viele Säugetierarten und fünfmal so viele Reptilienarten wie in ganz Deutschland. Dennoch wissen nur wenige Menschen von der Existenz dieses Biodiversitäts-Hotspots und seiner Bedrohung. Wir möchten zum nachhaltigen Schutz dieses Juwels der Tropen beitragen, indem wir mit Ihrer Hilfe Bildungsprojekte durchführen und die lokale Bevölkerung unterstützen, den Park dauerhaft durch partizipative Teilhabe zu schützen.

Name: SOMACORE in the Coral Triangle
Description: The SOMACORE Programme supports local, national, and regional efforts to scale up marine and coastal management practices across the CTI-CFF’s three priority seascapes: Sulu-Sulawesi, Lesser Sunda, and Bismarck Solomon Seas Ecoregion.

Name: Association of Fish & Wildlife Agencies
Description: State, provincial, and territorial fish and wildlife agencies in North America have safeguarded fish and wildlife for over 100 years. The public entrusts these agencies with primary stewardship over vital wildlife resources. The Association of Fish and Wildlife Agencies lends collective voice to its agencies in fulfillment of that responsibility.

Name: Viridi Air - France
Description:
Contribuez-vous à l'air pur ?
Les entreprises qui contribuent à l'air pur peuvent être admises en tant que Partenaire Viridi Air. Inclus: le Certificat Air Pur, le Label Air Pur et plantation d'arbres purificateurs d'air.

L’air pur, c’est un air propre à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur
La pollution atmosphérique tue chaque année 300 000 personnes en Europe. Ces décès pourraient être évités grâce à une air purifié, tant à l’intérieur qu’à l’extérieur. Viridi Air s’engage à sensibiliser davantage à l’importance d’un air pur et collabore avec des entreprises dans le secteur de la CVC (chauffage, ventilation et climatisation). Les entreprises qui répondent aux critères d’admission pour l’air pur et qui soutiennent la mission de Viridi Air pour un air plus pur peuvent devenir partenaires. Dans le cadre du partenariat, sont inclus: le Certificat Air Pur, le Label Air Pur et Viridi Air plante en votre nom des arbres uniques purificateurs d’air. Saviez-vous que certains arbres sont capables de filtrer les poussières fines et autres pollutions atmosphériques, ainsi que le CO2? 

#AirPur #ViridiAir #PollutionDeLair #SantéEnvironnementale #QualitéDeLair #ClimatEtSanté #PurificateursDAir #EntrepriseResponsable #PartenariatÉcologique #LabelAirPur #CertificatAirPur #ArbresPurificateurs
#FiltresNaturels #PollutionExtérieure #PollutionIntérieure #SolutionsDurables
#SantéEtBienÊtre #Écologie #CVCResponsable #RespirezMieux

Name: ENDANGERED SPECIES INTERNATIONAL
Description:
ENDANGERED SPECIES INTERNATIONAL is a charity group based out of 3835 Mission Street,  SAN FRANCISCO, California, United States.

Endangered Species International (ESI) is strongly committed to reversing the trend of human-induced species extinction, saving endangered animals, and preserving wild places We have conservation projects worldwide protecting and restoring critical habitats including rainforests, coral reefs and wetlands for over 1,200 endangered species.

ESI uses less than 2% of its budget for fundraising and operations. ESI won multiple Top-Rated Awards from GreatNonprofits and has reached the Platinum participation level through the GuideStar Exchange. Further at Charity Navigator, ESI scores 100%, earning it a Four-Star rating. You can give with confidence.

Name: Indigenous East
Description:
Mission:
The members of Indigenous East are working to accelerate the protection of Indigenous Cultural Landscapes (ICLs) and other critical lands for people and nature, by creating a connected network of Indigenous community leaders and Indigenous protected areas spanning the east coast of the United States from Maine to Florida. We also seek to demonstrate the value of Indigenous Science (IS) and Traditional Ecological Knowledge (TEK), and to assist the upward movement of Indigenous and Afro-Indigenous scientists and leaders in conservation organizations and governmental organizations.

Name: GEO PROJECT
Description:
L’ONG GEO-PROJECT est une association de géologues leaders, qui réunit toutes les spécialités des sciences de la terre. Elle œuvre dans la réflexion, le montage, et la gestion de projets fructueux.
 
Notre but est de nous rassembler, nous démarquer, pour faire la promotion de la recherche scientifique au service du développement de la Côte d’Ivoire dans les secteurs : Agricole, Minier, Hydraulique, Energétique, Environnemental… 
 
NOS OBJECTIFS : 
• Desceller les besoins de la société selon notre domaine d’étude, 
• Faire la rédaction et la gestion de projet en mettant au centre le développement durable et la lutte contre les changements climatique, 
• Recherche de partenariat et financement de projets, 
• Insertion professionnelle, etc.

Name: Riserva Naturale Torbiere del Sebino
Description: Le Torbiere del Sebino sono un insieme di specchi d’acqua, piccoli boschi, canneti e prati che creano un habitat unico in provincia di Brescia. Per questo godono del massimo grado di protezione in Italia, tramite la denominazione “Riserva Naturale Regionale Orientata delle Torbiere del Sebino”, risalente al 1984.

Name: IBA Umweltplanung
Description: IBA Umweltplanung ist ein Planungsbüro, das Sie bei Fragen zum Naturschutz, Artenschutz und der Landschaftsplanung beraten kann.

Name: Depol'Horizon
Description:
Depol’Horizon – Dépolluer. Réhabiliter. Reconstruire.

Basée à Écuisses, en Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Depol’Horizon est une entreprise engagée dans la dépollution et la réhabilitation durable des bâtiments et infrastructures.
Nous accompagnons les acteurs publics et privés – bâtiment, hôpitaux, collectivités, industriels – dans des projets essentiels à la santé publique et à la protection de l’environnement.

 Nos expertises

- Désamiantage & dépollution : élimination sécurisée de l’amiante et des polluants.
- Démolition raisonnée : interventions sécurisées et respectueuses de l’environnement.
- Réhabilitation durable : redonner vie aux bâtiments existants en valorisant l’existant.
- Reconstruction responsable : concevoir et bâtir de manière écologique et respectueuse des normes.
- Prévention & sensibilisation : informer et accompagner les acteurs sur les enjeux de santé et d’environnement liés aux polluants.

 Notre mission

Assainir aujourd’hui pour bâtir demain.
Chaque site dépollué est une victoire pour la santé des occupants, la qualité de vie des citoyens et la préservation de notre planète.

 Nos valeurs

- Responsabilité : agir selon les normes les plus strictes en matière de sécurité et d’écologie.
- Durabilité : penser long terme et réduire l’empreinte environnementale de chaque chantier.
- Prévention : sensibiliser pour éviter les risques futurs.
- Renouveau : transformer la contrainte en opportunité de renaissance pour les espaces et les territoires.

Informations pratiques

 Siège social : Écuisses, près du Creusot – Bourgogne-Franche-Comté

 Secteurs d’intervention : Bâtiment, Santé (hôpitaux, cliniques, EHPAD), Collectivités locales, Industrie, etc...

 Contact : contact@depolhorizon.fr

Name: Refinery
Description:
Refinery combines expertise from two radically different industries to bring an entirely new approach to the conservation of historic woodwork.

Our unique partnership pairs expertise in 3D scanning, digital modelling and CNC production with conservation consultancy and highly skilled traditional hand carving and joinery.
This pairing of two distinctly different practices employs digital technologies to support and elevate traditional process, rather than attempt to replace it.  As a result, our unique workflow harnesses the powerful new capabilities of digital production, while fully retaining the vital authenticity of fine traditional craftsmanship. 

Our approach has been met with instant enthusiasm and we are now working on a number of significant conservation projects in wood. 

The result is a revolution in possibilities, efficiency and reliability while fully retaining the authenticity of a completely hand carved finished, produced to the highest standards of craftsmanship and underpinned by an in-depth knowledge of conservation practice.

Name: ONG E-Waste Solution
Description: Environnement, valorisation et gestion des Déchets d'équipements électriques et électroniques, ODD,

Name: Forestry Youth Network-FYN
Description:
Nestled amidst the breathtaking Himalayas, Forestry Youth Network stands as a testament to the enduring spirit of Nepal's natural heritage. Established in 2022 A.D., we are a registered green organization, deeply rooted in the rich tapestry of Nepalese culture and environment. Guided by the unwavering belief in a sustainable future, we dedicate our efforts to four pillars: forestry, wildlife, youth leadership, and climate change.
Within the verdant embrace of Nepal's forests, we promote sustainable forestry practices, combat deforestation, and foster the restoration of degraded lands.
Protecting the majestic wildlife that roams Nepal's diverse landscapes is another cornerstone of our mission. We actively engage in conservation efforts, advocating for endangered species and raising awareness about the delicate balance of the natural world.

Protecting the majestic wildlife that roams Nepal's diverse landscapes is another cornerstone of our mission. We actively engage in conservation efforts, advocating for endangered species and raising awareness about the delicate balance of the natural world. Through community collaborations and research initiatives, we strive to ensure the survival of Nepal's unique biodiversity.

Investing in the future is paramount to achieving lasting change. We believe that empowering young Nepalese leaders is essential for building a sustainable tomorrow. Through educational programs, leadership training, and community engagement initiatives, we equip young minds with the knowledge and skills to champion environmental causes and spearhead positive change.

The ever-present threat of climate change demands a collective response. We actively address this challenge by promoting renewable energy solutions, advocating for climate-resilient practices, and raising awareness about the impact of climate change on Nepal's vulnerable communities.

Join us on this journey as we work tirelessly to safeguard our nature.

Name: Pollinator Friendly Alliance
Description: PFA is a grassroots nonprofit that protects the natural world through the conservation of pollinators and their habitats. Small and lean, PFA is a regional leader in the effort to protect and restore pollinators towards many goals. PFA is volunteer driven, based in the St. Croix River Valley, and we work with communities across Minnesota.  PFA’s credibility as the visionary, planner, organizer and liaison-broker among thoughtful and committed stewards has generated cross-discipline exchanges and education initiatives. The reach of PFA’s mission–to restore habitat and reduce pesticide use–expands many-fold with the work of every advocate. PFA’s vision–to restore a planet that lives in harmony with pollinators–is our strident commitment to ensure a sustainable food system for all plants and animals.

Name: The Creature Conservancy
Description: The Creature Conservancy is a non-profit wildlife education organization in Ann Arbor, Michigan. At The Creature Conservancy, we strive to educate people of all ages about wildlife, fostering a deeper understanding and appreciation that encourages a stronger commitment to environmental protection. Our mission is simple: “Conservation Through Education.”

Name: North Atlantic Salmon Fund UK
Description:
Our Vision: 
A world where salmon thrive in rivers that are valued and nurtured by riverine communities

With British salmon numbers still falling — now classed as endangered — our ambition is to reverse this trend.

NASF UK fund local conservation projects that help restore our salmon rivers and strengthen the bonds between riverine communities and this precious species.  

Together we can restore our waterways — securing the sight of leaping salmon in Britain for future generations. 

#ProtectWildSalmon #SalmonConservation

We work closely with our partner organisation NASF Iceland — whose overarching mission is to return Atlantic salmon stocks back to their historic abundance, ensuring their continued existence for all to enjoy.

Follow, to find out more about our launch in September 2025, when our UK community-based salmon conservation grant, 'the Orri', will be open to applications. 

Sign now up to our newsletter by going to our website: https://www.nasf.org.uk/


 #ProtectWildSalmon    #SalmonConservation

Name: Ectophylla
Description:
ECTOPHYLLA est un bureau d’études indépendant intervenant dans le domaine de l’écologie, spécialisé dans l’expertise des chiroptères. La structure a été créée en juin 2025 par Antonin Wilmart, expert chiroptérologue depuis 2017.

ECTOPHYLLA propose un large éventail d’actions liées à l’expertise chiroptérologique, s’appuyant sur l’ensemble des méthodes d’étude et d’inventaire des chiroptères :

- Inventaire acoustique des chiroptères via l’écoute passive et active : analyse et traitement acoustique des enregistrements, identification des espèces et groupes acoustiques, taux d’activité, phénologies horaires, corridors de déplacement et terrains de chasse.

- Suivi des populations de chiroptères selon la typologie de gîte : dénombrement à l’envol au crépuscule par écoute active, caméra infrarouge, dénombrement à vue ou via photographie au sein du gîte en phase diurne.

- Capture temporaire des chiroptères (habilitation obtenue en 2021) : identification des statuts reproducteurs et prise de mesures biométriques. Mise en place de protocoles de recherche de gîtes par radiopistage via émetteurs VHF.

- Diagnostic de gîtes à chiroptères et préconisations de gestion : réflexion sur la prise en compte des chiroptères dans le patrimoine bâti et arboré. Propositions techniques d’aménagements et/ou de création de gîtes à chiroptères.

Name: Costa Rican Alliance for Sea Turtle Conservation & Science (COASTS)
Description: We are a grassroots non-profit organization working on the frontlines studying and protecting nesting and feeding sea turtles in Costa Rica.

Name: Upper Saco Valley Land Trust
Description:
The Upper Saco Valley Land Trust is a non-profit land conservation organization serving 11 towns in the Upper Saco River Valley in New Hampshire and Maine. Through conservation and stewardship, we ensure the continued well-being and availability of land for farming, forestry, recreation, education, and wildlife habitat. 

We work to be mindful of our heritage, our place, our vision, and our responsibility for the future.

Name: Environnement Responsable
Description: Environnement_Responsable est né d’un constat que notre pays est confronté à plusieurs problèmes tels que la gestion des déchets, la pollution, le manque des bacs à ordures spécifiques suivant le type de déchets, l’insuffisance de centres de recyclage, la présence des dépôts non contrôlés des déchets, l’absence de centres de déchetterie et le chômage des jeunes. Pour faire face à ces problèmes, nous avons pensé mettre en place le projet Environnement Responsable. Nous avons pour mission de lutter contre la précarité en vue de l’autonomisation de la jeunesse, la prise en charge des orphelins et enfants issus de milieux défavorisés, la protection des femmes marginaliser y compris les travailleurs. Nous voulons susciter l’intérêt et la curiosité des congolais concernant la préservation de l’environnement, de leur faire prendre conscience de son importance afin de préserver l’environnement en montrant les impacts qu’elle peut avoir sur l’environnement si elle n’est pas effectuée de manière responsable.

Name: Scic Végétal Nord-Est
Description:
La Société coopérative d’intérêt collectif Scic Végétal Nord-Est est un collectif de producteurs de semences, de graines, de producteurs de plants d’arbres et d’arbustes, du monde associatif et de collectivités publiques.

Nos partenaires collecteurs prélèvent les graines et semences en milieu naturel dans la région d’origine Zone Nord-Est.

Ceci permet à nos partenaires pépiniéristes de produire les jeunes plants nécessaires à vos chantiers dans la même région d’origine.

Name: Biodiversidade Litoral do Paraná
Description:
Criado em 2021, o Programa Biodiversidade Litoral do Paraná promove a conservação, a pesquisa e o uso responsável dos recursos naturais, fortalecendo unidades de conservação e impulsionando o desenvolvimento sustentável do litoral paranaense, região que abriga a maior área contínua de Mata Atlântica do Brasil e declarada Patrimônio Natural da Humanidade pela Unesco. 

Por meio de parcerias com órgãos públicos, institutos de pesquisa e organizações não governamentais, atuamos em frentes como monitoramento ambiental, pesquisa voltada à conservação de espécies e biomas,  proteção e fiscalização, estruturação de unidades de conservação.Financiado por um Termo de Acordo Judicial (TAJ) firmado após um vazamento de óleo ocorrido no ano 2001, o Programa investirá mais de R$ 110 milhões em iniciativas estratégicas ao longo de dez anos.

Name: Ocean Ally Foundation
Description:
Ocean Ally Foundation is a dynamic and dedicated organization
at the forefront of marine conservation and pride.
 
Committed to safeguarding our oceans and fostering a sense of environmental responsibility, Ocean Ally Foundation has emerged as a powerful force in advocating. for sustainable practices and protecting marine ecosystems.

Driven by a team of passionate individuals, the foundation actively collaborates with scientists, policymakers, communities, and
businesses to develop innovative strategies that address pressing issues such as overfishing, plastic pollution, habitat destruction, and climate change. With a multi-faceted approach, Ocean Ally Foundation combines research, education, and advocacy to bring about positive change on a global scale.

Name: Salviamo L'Orso
Description: Sulle montagne dell’Appennino centrale sopravvivono gli ultimi esemplari di orso bruno marsicano, una specie endemica e gravemente minacciata di estinzione. A metterne in pericolo la sopravvivenza sono le attività umane e, in particolare, la perdita e la frammentazione dell'habitat, gli incidenti stradali ed il bracconaggio. Nonostante la specie sia protetta, non si registrano chiari segnali di ripresa. Per questo, nel 2012, nasce Salviamo L'Orso. La nostra associazione, che si avvale di un gran numero di volontari che ogni anno ci raggiungono da tutto il mondo, lotta instancabilmente per la conservazione dell'orso bruno marsicano, del territorio in cui vive e delle specie con cui lo condivide. La nostra missione è promuovere una presa di coscienza collettiva, che riconosca nella battaglia per la sopravvivenza dell’orso un’emergenza culturale non solo nelle regioni interessate, ma nel Paese intero. Per questo, lavoriamo per sensibilizzare sempre più persone affinché comprendano l'importanza di questa specie, e promuoviamo percorsi di educazione che mettono in connessione le comunità locali, gli enti e le istituzioni affinché si lavori ad una coesistenza di prossimità. Tra i progetti a cui ci dedichiamo c'è la messa in sicurezza del territorio attraverso la rimozione del filo spinato, lo sgombero dei rifiuti abbandonati, e l'installazione di recinti e pollai a misura d'orso.

Name: Grootvadersbosch Conservancy
Description: The conservancy promotes conservation on private land in the Grootvadersbosch Area. We are involved in alien clearing, forest restoration, environmental education and trail building. The conservancy was established 22 years ago as the first in the WCape.  The Conservancy is a registered non-profit trust.

Name: Fundación Zoológica de Cali
Description: La Fundación Zoológica de Cali (FZC) es una organización sin ánimo de lucro dedicada a la conservación de la biodiversidad, el bienestar animal, la educación ambiental y la investigación científica. Durante más de 40 años hemos trabajado para proteger especies, inspirar a las comunidades y promover una relación más equilibrada entre las personas y la naturaleza.

Name: N/a’an ku sê Foundation
Description:
Conservation Through Innovation: The N/a'an ku sê Foundation is a grassroots Namibian non-profit organization with a clear purpose: To Conserve Landscapes, Protect Wildlife, and Improve The Lives of The People We Work With.

Our Vision
Our vision is to be change-makers for sustainable good in Africa. We inspire positive transformation and social upliftment. We conserve and protect our environment. Our transparent and inclusive approach ensures that our innovative, and responsible commercial activities benefit generations to come.

What We Do
• Landscape Conservation: More than 100,000 hectares of Namibia’s diverse landscapes—including the Kalahari, Namib Desert, Central Highlands, and coastal ecosystems— are under rigorous conservation management
• Wildlife Protection: Endemic, highly specialized, vulnerable, endangered, and critically endangered species thriving in our nature reserves
• Improving Livelihoods: We focus on uplifting one of Namibia’s most marginalized indigenous groups, the San. This includes economic empowerment and employment, education, cultural celebration and advocacy, healthcare and more.

Get Involved
• Volunteer Opportunities: Contribute to our impactful work by volunteering: https://www.naankuse.com/volunteer-projects-overview
• Internships: Interested in hands-on experience for an internship? Reach out to us at intern@naankuse.com
• Donate: Help support our mission by making a donation: https://www.naankuse.com/donate
• Travel: Want to travel Namibia responsibly? Visit our Eco-tourism Collection: https://www.naankusecollection.com/

Name: Hambai Wild
Description:
Hambai Wild – Let’s go wild! 

Conserving nature & wildlife for present and future generations.

Name: ÉcoCantine (KESK'IA)
Description:
ÉcoCantine est une IA destinée à l’optimisation du gaspillage alimentaire dans les cantines scolaires grâce à ses fonctionnalités prédictive et analytique. Notre IA vous permettra de mieux gérer votre restauration en réduisant le gaspillage alimentaire.




 keskia.cantine.colombes@gmail.com

Name: MBG Madagascar
Description: 40 ans de recherche et de conservation de l'environnement à Madagascar

Name: CREW Land & Water Trust
Description:
The CREW Trust is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization dedicated to the preservation and stewardship of the water resources and natural communities in and around the Corkscrew Regional Ecosystem Watershed (CREW). We are partnered with the South Florida Water Management District, providing public access, recreation, and environmental education within the four CREW Management Area trail systems within a 70,000+ acre watershed spanning Lee and Collier counties:

CREW Marsh Trails
CREW Cypress Dome Trails
CREW Flint Pen Strand Trails
CREW Bird Rookery Swamp Trails

Name: Rocky Mountain Restoration Initiative
Description: A dynamic collaboration of private and public partners working to reduce the threat of wildfire and improve wildlife habitat, forest health, water quality and outdoor recreational opportunities in the Rocky Mountains.

Name: Man-O-Sansar Unnati Foundation
Description: Man comes from the blessings of my father, Man Singh and also your inner self. Man-O-Sansar is the Universe, the entire space around us, the biodiversity, flora & fauna, social and ecological surroundings. Unnati being upliftment, empowering to create a better and sustainable tomorrow.

Name: IUCN SSC Indonesia Species Specialist Group
Description: Indonesia Species Specialist Group (IdSSG) is a group of experts consisting of various taxonomic groups and scientific disciplines that supports the government and other stakeholders in a joint effort to reverse the decline of species through data-driven decision-making and policy development.

Name: United World Challenge
Description:
The United World Challenge is a platform to spark inspiration and action to solve the issues of our time. 

In 2020, the United World Challenge row to Hawaii succeeded in raising $77K for scholarships to United World Colleges, funded the collection of ~5,000 lbs of ocean plastic, and trialled new microplastic research for Scripps Institution of Oceanography.

2020 was big, but we're just getting started. Stay tuned for a major announcement in September 2023.

Name: Sylvestre 09
Description: Association pour la sensibilisation à la sylviculture douce en Ariège

Name: Youth Association for Conservation of Nature and Environment (YASCON)
Description:
National Youth Association for the Conservation of Nature (NYASCON) is a Malawi-based, youth-led organization committed to conserving nature and promoting sustainable development. We empower and mobilize young people to protect biodiversity, address climate change, and drive community-based environmental solutions through advocacy, education, and action.

Our Vision: A Malawi where youth lead the conservation of nature for a sustainable and resilient future.

Our Mission: To inspire, equip, and engage young people to actively conserve natural resources and promote environmental sustainability.

Name: Refugia Research Coalition
Description:
The Refugia Research Coalition (RRC) is dedicated to accelerating the science and management of climate change refugia. Supported by the Northeast Climate Adaptation Science Center and a variety of partners around the world, the RRC is a network designed to connect researchers and practitioners looking to understand how climate change refugia conservation can help protect what we care about in the face of climate change.  

Refugia are areas that remain relatively buffered from contemporary climate change over time and enable the persistence of valued physical, ecological, and socio-cultural resources. Characterized by their relatively stable local climatic conditions despite changes at regional and global scales, researchers are investigating the processes that lead to their creation and define their capacity, and practitioners are working to protect them.The RRC brings these folks, and their results, together across the globe.

Name: Durham Greener Buildings
Description:
A program of the Region of Durham in partnership with Windfall Ecology Centre, Durham Greener Buildings is a benchmarking and disclosure program that supports commercial and institutional building owners in Durham Region to measure, publicly report, and maximize energy efficiency and conservation opportunities.
Benchmarking is a first step in reducing greenhouse gas emissions in the building sector. Learn more about Durham Greener Buildings 
https://durhamgreenerbuildings.ca/about/

Name: Ocean Collective GmbH
Description:
CONNECTING PEOPLE WITH LIFE IN THE OCEAN.

Wir glauben fest daran, dass der Schlüssel zum Schutz unserer Ozeane darin liegt, Menschen mit dem Leben darin zu verbinden. Auf nachhaltigen Expeditionen an der Seite von Meeresbiologen, Naturschützern, Cinematographen und (Frei-)Tauchern erkunden wir die Meere und kämpfen für eine gesunde Unterwasserwelt. Mit dem größten Respekt füreinander und unsere Umwelt. Nie allein, immer im Kollektiv.

WELCOME TO THE OCEAN COLLECTIVE.

Name: Green Deal Binnenvaart
Description:
15 strategische doelstellingen met 1 ambitie: een emissieloze binnenvaart tegen 2050. Dat is de Green Deal in een notendop. En ook jij kan er aan bijdragen! Jouw engagement is zelfs broodnodig.
Op 23 juni 2023 werd de Green Deal Binnenvaart ondertekend door bijna 90 partijen en daarmee officieel gelanceerd.

Name: Syndicat mixte des gorges du Gardon
Description:
Le SMGG est un syndicat mixte composé de 10 communes et du Conseil départemental du Gard. Créé en 1993 avec pour mission la protection, la gestion et la mise en valeur du site classé des gorges du Gardon, il a progressivement élargi son domaine et périmètre d’intervention. Il opère aujourd’hui des gorges du Gardon aux gorges de la Cèze (où il assure notamment l’animation de 6 sites Natura 2000) et intervient en matière de : 

- Protection et gestion des espaces naturels : mise en œuvre de mesures conservatoires, animation de programmes agro-environnementaux et climatiques, gestion des activités de pleine nature, dépollution de sites, suivis naturalistes, etc. - Protection et valorisation du patrimoine paysager et culturel : restauration du patrimoine bâti, formations et initiations à la pierre sèche, etc. 

- Développement local : accompagnement des communes et acteurs locaux dans leur projet d’aménagement et de développement durable, conseil en urbanisme, animation d’un réseau d‘éco-acteurs, etc.
- Sensibilisation du public à l’environnement : animations scolaires, visites guidées, gestion de 2 espaces muséographiques, etc.

Name: Hotlane Organisation
Description: hotlane Organization

Name: Hills Wildlife Sanctuary
Description:
The Hills Wildlife Sanctuary is dedicated to the rescue, rehabilitation and care of native Australian wildlife. We strive to become Sydney’s hub for biodiversity conservation, education, and threatened species recovery. 

The Hills Wildlife Sanctuary (formerly the Kangaroo Protection Co-operative) was established in 1977 and has been caring for injured and orphaned native wildlife ever since. The Hills Wildlife Sanctuary is situated on 35 acres of pristine natural bushland backing the Berowra Valley National Park, in Sydney’s northwest. The sanctuary is in a unique position to rehabilitate and home injured native animals in an expansive and protected bushland ecosystem.

With a skilled and highly experienced team of veterinarians, zoo keepers, wildlife carers and volunteers, the Hills Wildlife Sanctuary is committed to the comfort, service and survival of all Australian native wildlife.
 
The mission of the Hills Wildlife Sanctuary is to provide;
- A world-class rehabilitation facility for Australian native wildlife
- A forever home and sanctuary for native wildlife that are unable to be released, including native animals retired from zoos or wildlife parks and rescued or surrendered native pets
- An educational hub; to train wildlife carers and professionals from organisations across NSW, including service and volunteering opportunities
- Wildlife and environmental advocacy through public education and conservation outreach
 
Numerous Australian native wildlife species and ecosystems are facing dire circumstances. Please support the work of the Hills Wildlife Sanctuary to help ensure a future for our native wildlife.

Name: Blue Horizon Eco
Description:
Queremos permitir que todos puedan tener la oportunidad de invertir, acercarse y conectarse con la naturaleza de la indómita Patagonia, promoviendo la preservación del ecosistema y permitiendo la convivencia de manera sustentable con el medio ambiente.

Buscamos que las personas puedan compartir una visión de consciencia y cuidado por el medioambiente permitiendo la coexistencia de manera responsable con el patrimonio de la humanidad, desarrollando un sentimiento de conservación para las futuras generaciones, ya que es nuestro deber entregar un mundo mejor para nuestras futuras generaciones.

Name: Gef6 AMP
Description: Madagascar, la quatrième plus grande île du monde, abrite une vaste zone d'écosystèmes marins. Lors du Congrès mondial des parcs de 2014 à Sydney, Madagascar a déclaré son objectif de tripler le nombre d'aires marines protégées (AMP). Le Ministère de l’Environnement et du Développement Durable (MEDD) avec l’appui financier du Fonds Mondial pour l’Environnement (FEM) a mis en place un réseau efficace d'aires marines protégées pour la conservation de la biodiversité marine du pays, tout en améliorant la gestion des stocks de pêche pour améliorer la sécurité alimentaire et le développement économique durable. Le projet GEF6-AMP, « Élargir et Consolider le Réseau des Aires Marines Protégées de Madagascar », a pour objectif de s’assurer que la biodiversité et la productivité marines de Madagascar soient gérées efficacement par le biais d’un réseau national durable et résilient d’AMP.

Name: HuDoNET
Description:
We are a network of people who are motivated to work together to conserve the Indian Ocean humpback dolphin.

HuDoNet's mission is to foster and facilitate collaborative research and management efforts, while sharing expertise to support conservation initiatives for Indian Ocean humpback dolphins across their range. We strive to work together and attract resources to support local initiatives, while unifying and amplifying our voices to draw the attention the species' needs.

Name: Kokerboom Biological Research Station
Description:
The Kokerboom Biological Research Station is an 850-ha farm situated in the pristine koppies of Namaqualand, 5km outside of Springbok in the Northern Cape. The area is well-known for its huge floristic diversity with a number of species being endemic to the area.

The main focus of KBRS will be to provide secure and affordable accommodation and fieldwork opportunities to students from local and international universities, and to foster collaborations with local research teams.

KBRS is the brainchild of a team of herpetologists, and although future projects on the farm will mainly be reptile-related, we’re excited to have students and research teams complete projects on a range of topics. The area has an exciting diversity of mammals, birds, plants, invertebrates, and geology – further research and sampling will be necessary.

Name: Conexão Fauna
Description:
Conectando pessoas, empresas e a conservação da fauna.
Desenvolvemos projetos ambientais focados na proteção da biodiversidade.  Executamos monitoramento, estudos e resgate de fauna em diferentes tipos de empreendimentos.
Location: Santo Antônio do Pinhal, São Paulo

Name: Fundación Marvivo Mx
Description:
Somos un equipo de expertos, que promovemos y coordinamos acciones de conservación ambiental, desarrollo comunitario, económico, social y cultural.
Estamos comprometidos con la preservación de los ecosistemas marinos que nos quedan. A través de investigaciones rigurosas, prácticas sostenibles y asociaciones con las comunidades locales, nos esforzamos por proteger y restaurar nuestro mundo natural para las generaciones futuras.
Location: Puerto San Carlos, Baja California Sur

Name: Summit 7 - World Heritage Specialists
Description:
Summit 7 - World Heritage Specialists, a proudly South African-based company pioneered by Martin Albertus, provides expertise and capability in world heritage management.

World Heritage Management and processes prescribed by the World Heritage Convention and the UNESCO Operating Guidelines, requires thorough design inputs, planning, resourcing, management, monitoring and reporting to ensure the safeguarding and conservation of the Outstanding Universal Value of sites listed on the World Heritage  List.

Enjoy the benefit of a professional, purpose driven world heritage specialist team at your fingertips to deliver your strategy on time with quality in mind.

Name: GYBN-Togo
Description: Le Réseau de la jeunesse Togolaise pour la biodiversité (GYBN Togo)  est un groupe de jeunes qui militent pour une utilisation durable et la conservation de la biodiversité pour un environnement et une société saine sur le plan national et régional. Ce réseau est rattaché à l’organisation mère GYBN (Réseau global des jeunes pour la biodiversité) qui a pour but de représenter la voix de la jeunesse mondiale dans les négociations menées dans le cadre de la Convention des Nations unies sur la diversité biologique (CDB), de sensibiliser les jeunes aux valeurs de la biodiversité et de mettre en relation les individus et les organisations de jeunesse afin de créer une coalition mondiale pour mettre un terme à la perte de biodiversité.

Name: IHBC North West
Description:
The IHBC North West Branch covers Cheshire, Greater Manchester, Isle of Man, Lancashire and Merseyside.

https://www.instagram.com/ihbc_nw/
https://x.com/IHBC_NW/status/

Name: Friends of Illinois Nature Preserves
Description: Friends of Illinois Nature Preserves' mission is to support the Illinois Nature Preserves System by advocating for and finding increased support, resources, funding, and staff for the system and assisting local volunteer communities as they help restore and care for their Illinois biodiversity reserves.

Name: Sustainnovate Today
Description:
One day in March 2020, Arjan took on the most turbulent project he had ever done at DSM
(a global material & life sciences company).

With only 3 days of face mask supply left, this situation was urgent for several hospitals in the emerging pandemic. 

Without a national alternative ecosystem, time was ticking, thinking of all the unprotected people.

1,5 months later Arjan manufactured a National "Minimal Viable Ecosystem".
With several key partners, corporates, and SMEs, we were able to manufacture 1 million face masks per week.

Imho the key success drivers were :
1. A Common Goal
2. A Thorough belief in each other's skills
3. The Ability to learn and (in)validate at a very high pace 
4. Trust 

This case shows Arjan’s drive to address high-impact, systemic problems. By improving the innovative potential of people, teams, and organizations.

Sustainovate today delivers lasting sustainable solutions in BtB and BtC.
Specifically for the energy transition, circular economy, sustainable food systems, and health. 

Arjan is a firm believer in experiment-driven innovation and the power of innovation ecosystems for the success of both incremental as well as radical innovation. 

Arjan has 15+ years of experience in senior roles in these areas. Ranging from strategy consulting, and policy advice to hands-on program and venture management in hi-tech, consultancy, and industry.

Name: Recycl'OR
DETERLite - AI for Sustainability
Description:
DETERLite - AI for Sustainability. AI for Human Wildlife Conflict. 

DETERLite is a unique, off-grid, solar-powered, AI-based device that uses real-time classification of animals in the wild to play species-specific audio/visual effects to deter them. 

It is designed especially for communities living in peripheries of forests to mitigate HWC.

Name: Chablais UNESCO Global Geopark
Description: The Chablais region is a designated UNESCO Global Geopark. It conserves and promotes Earth heritage through environmental education and sustainable economic development.

Name: Florida Natural Areas Inventory (FSU)
Description: The Florida Natural Areas Inventory is Florida's Natural Heritage Program and state member of the NatureServe network. We are housed within the Florida Resources and Environmental Analysis Center at Florida State University. We manage a database of current information on Florida's rarest species, maintain an inventory of the state's conservation land holdings, and conduct ecological surveys and analyses to support conservation planning and land management. Our program is entirely supported by projects developed in cooperation with agency partners.

Name: Pulau Banding Foundation
Description: Pulau Banding Foundation (PBF) is a non-profit organization that facilitate research and studies on Belum - Temenggor Rainforest, and disseminate knowledge to public about the conservation for biological diversity.

Name: Meer Bomen Nu Drenthe
Description:
Wij zien bomen planten als dé oplossing om klimaatverandering te vertragen, de biodiversiteit te herstellen én om burgers een positief handelingsperspectief te bieden.

MeerBomenNu is een campagne van Urgenda, bedacht door Stichting MEERGroen en groot gemaakt dankzij de hulp van Caring Farmers. Het coördinatieteam Drenthe is een groep enthousiastelingen in Drenthe die als aanjager probeert zoveel mogelijk mensen enthousiast te maken om zoveel mogelijk bomen te (ver)planten.

#verplanteenboom #klimaat #biodiversiteit #samensnellergroen

Name: Nationale Naturlandschaften
Description:
Wir wirken auf 33 % der Fläche Deutschlands in den Nationalen Naturlandschaften

Nationale Naturlandschaften sind große geschützte Gebiete in Deutschland, die aufgrund ihrer besonderen natürlichen Schönheit und ihres ökologischen Wertes erhalten und gefördert werden. Dazu gehören Nationalparke, Wildnisgebiete, Naturparke und Biosphärenreservate. Sie bieten Lebensraum für eine Vielzahl von Tier- und Pflanzenarten und dienen gleichzeitig der Erholung und Bildung der Menschen. Sie sind wichtige Instrumente für den Naturschutz und die nachhaltige Entwicklung.

Name: SeedBombs Tanzania
Description:
Mission - 
Establish an education center and tree nursery to collaborate with and train ecology educators and their students from around East Africa on the Seed Bomb methodology that is designed to maximize the efficiency and scalability of reforestation projects.

Vision - 
Supporting resilient communities to revitalize natural environments and continue sustainable development practices for generations to come.

Education -
Setting up training workshops for existing environmental clubs at local schools to teach essential permaculture principles alongside the Seedbomb methodology.  

Carbon Sequestering - 
Collaborating with stakeholders to connect the six rural villages of Gehandu, Balangdalelu, Mureru, Lalaji, Dalota, and Dirma in Hanang' District to establish a carbon credit project for the benefit of local people.

Community Involvement - 
Utilizing a people-centric approach to involve community members in every level of the SeedBombs organization, including the incorporation of indigenous knowledge for training sessions and physical planting. 

Reforestation - 
Training and trusting local community members to plant indigenous tree species using SeedBombs in areas where they are needed most, in order to combat erosion and other land degradation.    

Subscribe -
To stay up to date on our progress and learn more about volunteering, donating, or visiting the education center and tree nursery on the slopes of Mt. Hanang.

Name: Thalassains
Description: We’re on a mission to end the Red Sea plastic crisis, and we want you to join us!

Name: We Spot Turtles!
Description: A citizen science project aimed at protecting sea turtles. Collect data and help in conservation efforts.

Name: Syndicat Mixte des Bassins du Loir et de la Braye
Description: Le Syndicat mixte des Bassins du Loir et de la Braye a été instauré  le 1er janvier 2023 pour représenter la compétence GEMAPI (gestion des milieux aquatiques et prévention des inondations). Le SMBLB comprend les communautés de communes de Loir-Lucé-Bercé, des Vallées de la Braye et de l’Anille, du pays de Huisne Sarthoise et du Gesnois Bilurien. Son périmètre est constitué par le bassin-versant de la Braye et affluents en Sarthe, de l’Yre, du Dinan, et du Loir non domanial.
Location: La Chartre-sur-le-Loir, Pays de la Loire

Name: Valkyrias Engineering
Description:
Valkyrias Engineering es una empresa de ingeniería climática regenerativa especializada en el diseño e implementación de soluciones de carbono azul para empresas con estrategias Net Zero, ESG y sostenibilidad corporativa.

A través de nuestros proyectos regenerativos marinos, desplegamos arrecifes artificiales certificados, restauramos ecosistemas oceánicos y generamos impacto ambiental real, medible y trazable.

Cada una de nuestras soluciones incluye certificados de captura de CO₂, informes ESG y herramientas de comunicación climática, alineadas con los estándares internacionales de descarbonización. Nos especializamos en crear proyectos sostenibles con trazabilidad, adaptados a las necesidades de cada organización, desde PYMEs hasta grandes grupos con metas de neutralidad climática.

Como proveedor de carbono azul certificado, combinamos ciencia marina, tecnología y propósito para ayudar a las empresas a compensar su huella y liderar con impacto positivo.

 Nuestros servicios están pensados para marcas con propósito, compromiso climático y ambición regenerativa.
Location: El Puerto de Santa María, Andalusia

Name: African Conservancies
Description:
African Conservancies is a specialist Community Conservancy development management company based in South Africa. The company vision,working with its professional team, is to convert Africa’s community land surrounding national parks into mega Community Conservancies, which act as “thrive buffers zones” whilst also representing an extension of the existing National Park Ecosystems. Each Conservancy has a Master Development Plan prepared, incorporating multi-use, layered, land usage zones, in order to protect these areas from encroaching development, whilst creating sustainable and conservation-based revenue streams for the local wilderness communities and other stakeholders.

We offer our services to communities, landowners, investors, conservation organizations, governments and donors.

Name: MAR Expeditions
Description: We support the conservation and protection of Africa's wild places through research expeditions. Learn from our expert marine biologists, whilst getting to dive in some of the most incredibly wild places in Africa, and beyond.
Location: Zavora Marine Lab, Praia de Zavora

Name: Lippstädter Grün e.V.
Description:
Freitag, der 20.05.2022, bedeutete eine Zäsur für unsere Stadt: Ein Tornado verwüstete große Teile der Kernstadt Lippstadts und umliegende Ortsteile. Neben den Schäden an Gebäuden und Infrastruktur hat das Unwetter vor allem massive Zerstörungen an Grünflächen und Bäumen hinterlassen. 

Licht, Wasser, Leben – Lippstadt’s Grünflächen und Freiräume waren bis ins Jahr 2022 geprägt von einem stattlichen Baumbestand. Für Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner spendeten sie selbst im heißen Sommer stets Schatten und boten angenehme Temperaturen. Angesichts des bevorstehenden Klimawandels ist dieser Baumbestand wichtiger denn je. 

Nach der Katastrophe wollen wir zeitnah, unbürokratisch und überparteilich einen wesentlichen Beitrag für einen Neustart für Lippstadt‘s Grünflächen und Freiräume leisten.

Name: Wildwood Open Lands Foundation
Description:
Dedicated to promoting conservation, preservation, and education of natural and cultural resources.

Wildwood Open Lands Foundation is a registered 501(c)(3) Public Charity registered in the state of Nevada as a Nonprofit Corporation.

Name: Idaho Wildlife Federation
Description:
Founded in 1936, the Idaho Wildlife Federation is Idaho’s oldest and
largest statewide conservation organization promoting the conservation
of Idaho’s wildlife heritage and legacy of sporting opportunities. IWF
quickly became the state’s leading voice and influence to curtail decline
and rebound game and wildlife populations. Two years after our
founding, IWF successfully campaigned for the passage of the Citizen’s
Initiative of 1938, establishing an independent commission to guide
wildlife management by the North American Model. Through the shared
goals of our affiliate clubs, we sought out to return habitat and wildlife
through ecologic restoration, education, and policy change.
Today, the Idaho Wildlife Federation is the voice of Idaho’s wildlife,
habitat, public lands and sporting interests. In the state legislature we
serve a daily presence to advance proactive legislation for the benefit of
wildlife and access, and defeat bills that would roll back fish and wildlife
protections, privatize wildlife, and seize our shared public lands for sale
or special interest exploitation.
We also engage communities by involving local constituents to create
local solutions. By coordinating boots on the ground grassroots efforts,
IWF fosters and promotes a general and continued movement for the
conservation, restoration, protection, and scientific supervision of all
game, fish, fowl, and other wildlife in the state.

Name: Bird Aware Essex Coast
Description:
Bird Aware Essex Coast is an initiative to raise awareness of the birds that feed and breed on the Essex coast, so that people can enjoy the coast and its wildlife without disturbing the birds.

Our project engages with visitors and communities along the Essex coast to help people learn about the different species of bird and understand the impact of bird disturbance.

Name: POUMON VERT
Description:
Poumon Vert est un collectif de jeunes engagé pour un avenir plus vert. Créé en décembre 2022, notre mouvement socio-éducatif et environnemental a pour mission de promouvoir l’éco-citoyenneté et d’agir concrètement pour la protection de notre planète. 

À travers des actions de sensibilisation, de reboisement, d’éducation et de mobilisation citoyenne, nous œuvrons pour un monde plus conscient, solidaire et respectueux de l’environnement.

Name: Parque La Giganta
Description:
Parque La Giganta es un área protegida privada de 227 hectáreas ubicada en la comuna de Panquehue, en el Valle del Aconcagua, Región de Valparaíso. Se extiende desde el borde del río Aconcagua hasta la cumbre del cerro homónimo, inserta en el cordón montañoso de Chacabuco. Administrado por la Fundación La Giganta y protegido a perpetuidad bajo la figura de Derecho Real de Conservación, con Fundación Tierra Austral como garante, el parque resguarda un ecosistema semiárido mediterráneo considerado un hotspot mundial de biodiversidad.

La riqueza biológica del parque incluye más de 140 especies de flora, como el algarrobo, el guayacán y el quisquito de las Coimas (Eriosyce coimasensis), cactácea endémica del valle del Aconcagua. En cuanto a fauna, alberga especies como la chiricoca, el zorro culpeo y la culebra de cola larga. Además, posee una notable geodiversidad con formaciones de fósiles marinos, como oncolitos y estromatolitos, de alto valor científico.

El parque ofrece más de 20 km de senderos señalizados que permiten explorar su diversidad natural. Entre ellos destacan el Sendero La Giganta, de 5 km y 660 metros de desnivel, y el Sendero Cumbre, de 1,4 km y 300 metros de desnivel, recomendado para personas con experiencia en montaña. Estos recorridos ofrecen vistas panorámicas del valle y permiten una inmersión profunda en el ecosistema mediterráneo.

Inaugurado oficialmente el 16 de noviembre de 2023, Inaugurado oficialmente el 16 de noviembre de 2023, Parque La Giganta se ha consolidado como un espacio para la conservación, la educación ambiental y la recreación sustentable, promoviendo actividades como el trekking, la observación de flora y fauna, y la investigación científica. Su acceso se encuentra a 2,2 km del Puente del Rey, por la antigua ruta CH-60, y cuenta con estacionamientos y facilidades para visitantes

Name: Association Panafricaine des Femmes Unies pour le Développement au Togo (APFUD-Togo)
Description: Défense sur le changement climatique, protection de l'environnement, équité sociale

Name: Badlands National Park Conservancy
Description: The Badlands National Park Conservancy (BNPC) plays a vital role in supporting the preservation and enhancement of Badlands National Park by securing financial resources from donors, grants, and other funding sources. While the Conservancy itself doesn't directly engage in conservation work or educational programs, it focuses on raising funds to support initiatives that protect the park's unique landscapes, wildlife, and ecosystems. These funds contribute to park improvements, research projects, infrastructure, and public access, ensuring that Badlands National Park remains a thriving natural treasure for future generations.
Location: Rapid City, South Dakota, South Dakota

Name: The African Golden Cat Conservation Alliance
Description:
The African Golden Cat Conservation Alliance (AGCCA) is a network of African nationals dedicated to safeguarding the future of the elusive African golden cat (Caracal aurata).

We work hand in hand with local communities across 19 of the 21 countries within the species’ known range, addressing threats such as bushmeat hunting, habitat loss, and human–wildlife conflict.

 Our Approach

Community-led Conservation: Empowering rural communities through sustainable livelihood alternatives, livestock seedbanks, and savings groups.

Research & Monitoring: Advancing scientific knowledge to better understand and protect the African golden cat and its ecosystems.

Capacity Building: Strengthening local leadership, youth, and women’s involvement in conservation.

Collaboration: Partnering with local, regional, and international stakeholders to expand conservation impact.

 Our Vision

A future where the African golden cat thrives across its natural range, supported by empowered communities who benefit equitably from conserving nature.

Name: Diverseas
Description: Diverseas is working towards a more inspiring and engaging ocean by creating resources for anyone to learn about the science, stories, and careers that the ocean provides. We are dedicated to unravelling insights from the world of ocean conservation through immersive learning experiences. Reach out for collaboration opportunities! Let's make waves - one dive, one story, and one mind at a time.

Name: Beaver Creek Wetlands Association
Description:
Our Mission:

The Beaver Creek Wetlands Association preserves and restores our endangered wetland habitat through conservation, stewardship, education and public access.

Name: Utonga Nature Conservancy
Description:
Few place on Lake Victoria beach fronts remain untapped with virgin vegetation as evident on the Utonga Peninsula. Many parts of the Lake Victoria Kenya have been robbed of forest cover mostly due to poverty (charcoal) & emerging unregulated fishing beaches. 
As fate would have it, we at Nyamarimba have a golden opportunity to tap into the bird-watching tourism segment. The sanctuary has the advantage of indigenous forest on the lake front on the southern side of the peninsula which has not be disturbed by fish cage farming. This forest cover spans about 20 acres and host a wide variety of birds and grazing wildlife, with over 140 different birds identified by professional birdwatchers.
Our long term vision for UTONGA NATURE CONSERVANCY (UNC) is to establish a sustainable forest, bird and animal conservancy for research, education, eco-tourism & hospitality. We believe that UNC will be a catalyst for sensitization on conservation, eco-tourism and part of an inevitable new Western Kenya international tourism circuit featuring Lake Victoria, Kenya.

Name: Stowe Land Trust
Description:
Stowe Land Trust is a local, member-supported non-profit dedicated to conserving the land and waters we love to enhance quality of life for all connected to the Stowe area. 
Since 1987, we have conserved over 4,500 acres of land securing spectacular viewsheds, extensive trail networks, and working farms and forests for future generations. Protecting the health and vitality of our lands and waters is essential to our well-being, our economy, and our future. Stowe Land Trust envisions a community in which everyone can access, connect with, and enjoy the benefits of conserved land. We will work to make our natural resources resilient to changes in use and climate and will strive to ensure the lands that make this place special are protected and enjoyed for generations to come.

Name: ARA France
Description: L’Association pour le Repeuplement de l’Anguille en France (ARA France), créée en 2010, sous le régime de la loi 1901, à l’initiative des pêcheurs professionnels de civelles et d’anguilles français, participe au financement des actions, assure la coordination du programme national et veille au respect du cahier des charges.

Name: Integral Nature
Description:
Welcome! My name is Bill Jacobs. See my profile at www.linkedin.com/in/billjacobs

I offer conservation career coaching rooted in over 35 years of experience as a senior ecologist, program manager, and executive director, plus 12 years in business.

Whether you're seeking direction, an internship, a new job, or a deeper connection between your work and your values, I’m here to help you grow a meaningful path grounded in science, faith, and your unique calling to care for the Earth.

I specialize in helping you:

• Clarify your values and align them with your career choices.
• Navigate career beginnings and transitions within the fields of ecology, conservation, environmental science, and related fields.
• Help you address job burnout or a toxic workplace.
• Help you develop a resume and cover letter, and practice interview questions.
• Integrate faith and ecological values, empowering you to build a fulfilling career that honors God and the planet. I welcome all faiths.
• Discover and embrace your unique calling, whether it's in the nonprofit sector, government, business, or education.
• Identify potential employers, network, understand organization culture, gain experience, and receive positive job references and recommendations. 

I’ve worked for New York State DEC, The Nature Conservancy, GEI Environmental Consultants, and the Long Island Native Plant Initiative, among others.

I founded the Saint Kateri Conservation Center in 2000. The Center is a non-profit conservancy and land trust that promotes faith, integral ecology, biodiversity, and climate resilience. 

My work has been featured in the New York Times, National Catholic Register, Saint Anthony Messenger, National Catholic Reporter, and EarthBeat.

My rates of $25-$150 are offered on a sliding scale so everyone who works to preserve our Earth can afford career coaching. Initial discovery sessions are free for students, recent graduates, and people who are underemployed or facing financial hardship.

Name: Urban Wildlife Research Project
Description: The mission of the Urban Wildlife Research Project is to document gray fox behavior in the Palo Alto Baylands region in order to establish healthy habitats and biodiverse wildlife corridors necessary for their survival. As a result, UWRP helps San Francisco Bay Area people and wildlife coexist through research, advocacy, and public education.

Name: AquaLife Conservancy
Description: AquaLife Conservancy is a legally registered Ghanaian non-governmental organization (NGO) dedicated to marine and freshwater biodiversity conservation. We focus on all life forms of small and megafauna in both marine and freshwater ecosystems and design and implement pragmatic conservation actions to save them from extinction.
Location: Post Office Box SN 228, Santasi-Kumasi, Ghana, Ashanti Region

Name: Coral Soul
Description: Deep Coral Restoration

Name: UK Squirrel Accord
Description:
The UK Squirrel Accord (UKSA) is a UK-wide partnership of 45 leading conservation and forestry organisations, Government agencies and companies, with links to red squirrel community groups.

UKSA works collaboratively to preserve the UK’s wooded landscapes and associated biodiversity under the following aims to:

* Secure and expand UK red squirrel, Sciurus vulgaris, populations beyond current thresholds.

* Ensure UK woodlands flourish and deliver multiple benefits for future generations of wildlife and people.

A key part of UKSA's work is to fund and oversee development and delivery of a grey squirrel fertility control.

UKSA partners work together to:

* Fundraise for and support research into a fertility control for grey squirrels.
* Explore innovative management and conservation measures.
* Increase public awareness of key issues.
* Engage with landowners and local groups.
* Enhance engagement with existing partnerships and projects.
* Share best practice and knowledge.
* Improve links between various key sectors.

Please contact us if you would like to know more about the partnership and our work: info@squirrelaccord.uk

Name: Participe Futur
Description:
Un engagement pour la conservation marine à travers la recherche, l'éducation et la sensibilisation.

Depuis la construction du voilier Alcyon en 1982, Jacques Landron et son bateau n’ont cessé de faire découvrir le milieu marin à un large public, en mettant en avant une éthique sensible et humaniste de la voile et de la mer.

Les membres fondateurs de Participe Futur, Association loi 1901, sont des marins, des enseignants, des scientifiques et des volontaires.

Ils contribuent aux campagnes de recherche et de sensibilisation menées à bord d’Alcyon sur la biodiversité en Méditerranée et organisent des stages d'écovolontariat..

En 2004, Jacques a légué son bateau à l’association pour qu’ Alcyon continue de naviguer dans le même esprit de découverte et de respect de l’environnement.

Objectifs

Favoriser la découverte et l'étude de l'environnement dans un souci de protection et de conservation durable en :

Proposant à ses membres écovolontaires des stages d’observations du milieu naturel marin et côtier, encadrés par des naturalistes confirmés, à bord de son voilier « Alcyon » ou sur les voiliers de membres partageant la même éthique.

Intervenant dans des programmes scientifiques en mettant à disposition son expérience et sa logistique.

Diffusant les résultats de nos actions pour informer et sensibiliser le public par des articles, conférences, manifestations et tous moyens multimédias.

Travaillant avec les équipes pédagogiques des milieux scolaires et en proposant des activités didactiques liées à la protection de l’environnement.

Collaborant avec des associations, instituts, fondations ou tout autre organisme œuvrant pour les mêmes buts et partageant la même éthique.

Name: Reserva Caruara S.A.
Description: Maior unidade de conservação privada dedicada à preservação da restinga no Brasil - uma iniciativa do @Porto do Açu
Location: São João Da Barra, Rio De Janeiro

Name: Veredas Da Estrela
Description:
Veredas da Estrela is a community association, founded after the 2022 wildfires that devastated 25% of the Serra da Estrela Natural Park in Central Portugal. We are based in the mountain villages of Figueiró da Serra and Freixo da Serra.

We want to create living communities and ecosystems more resilient to forest fires, and thus prepare our villages for the future while being an example for others.

Name: PERMAB
Description:
PERMAB est un revêtement de sol perméable de type modulaire pour zones circulées, composé de dalles alvéolaires en plastique recyclé destinées à être remplies d’un matériau de comblement de type graviers.
Objectifs: 
RECHARGER les nappes phréatiques
VALORISER nos déchets plastiques
REDUIRE les risques d'inondations
BAISSER la température des villes
FAVORISER le développement de la végétation
