Name: IUCN SSC Cactus and Succulent Plants Specialist Group
Description: The IUCN Cactus and Succulent Plants Specialist Group (CSSG) promotes the conservation of cacti and succulent plants globally.

Name: Expédition Ananta
Description:
Laissez nous vous présenter l’expédition ANANTA …

Il y a 4 ans, Thibault et Loris se rencontrent en fac de biologie à l'université de Pau. Ils se rendent rapidement compte qu'une passion commune pour l'océan les anime. A l'époque, Thibault (qui était niveau 3 de plongée) ne met pas beaucoup de temps à convaincre Loris de se lancer à ses côtés. S'en suit l'acquisition de solides connaissances et compétences grâce des entraînements intenses et des certifications importantes. Peu à peu, l'idée de monter une expédition émerge et c'est ainsi que né LE PROJET ANANTA.

L'an passé, lors d'une randonnée en haute montagne, Maelys, étudiante à Kedge Business School, rencontre les 2 amis. C'est un coup de foudre amical. Le contact ayant été longtemps maintenu entre ces 3 jeunes, les 2 garçons décident de lui proposer de participer à cette expédition. C'est le début d'une nouvelle aventure pour la petite recrue qui suit actuellement une préparation physique intensive.

Aujourd'hui âgés respectivement de 21, 22 et 23 ans, Maelys Ladrech, Thibault Dassieu et Loris Diaz s'apprêtent à relever un défi hors du commun. Leur aventure se déroulera au Floe Edge au Nord du Canada et débutera en mars 2022. L'objectif : explorer les fonds marins grâce à la plongée sous glace et réaliser un film afin de sensibiliser les jeunes générations au réchauffement climatique et à la fonte des glaces. Ces images seront filmées sur la banquise durant toute la durée de l’expédition et permettront de découvrir les fonds marins de l’océan Arctique.

« La nature n’est pas un luxe, mais un besoin fondamental pour l’esprit humain. » Edward Abbey

Ce projet est soutenu par 2 étudiantes de Kedge Business School : Anna Cornaglia et Justine Capelle.

Name: Namultja Aboriginal Corporation
Description:
Our vision
Marra Country and culture is strong and the cultural 
authority of Minirringki, Jungkayi and Darlyin is respected. 
We have sustainable livelihoods on country, and our 
rangers care for all of country, including our cultural sites.
Our Marranbala organisation has good governance and 
our partners are working with us. 
We are passing down our cultural knowledge to the next 
generations.

Name: EOKY (Environmental and Outreach by Key Youth)
Description: EOKY (Environmental and Outreach by Key Youth) is a dedicated initiative focused on conserving Madagascar's biodiversity. Through a strategic blend of education, awareness campaigns, and hands-on conservation efforts, we aim to protect and preserve the country's unique natural heritage.

Name: NatureLife-International - Stiftung für Umwelt, Bildung und Nachhaltigkeit
Description:
NatureLife-International ist eine gemeinnützige Stiftung, die Naturschutz, Umweltbildung und nachhaltige Entwicklung miteinander verbindet – lokal in Deutschland und Europa ebenso wie in Südostasien.

Wir entwickeln praxisnahe Projekte, die ökologische Wirkung mit sozialer Verantwortung vereinen: vom Schutz wertvoller Lebensräume über Wiederaufforstung und Biodiversitätsprogramme bis hin zu innovativer Umweltbildung für Kinder, Jugendliche und Gemeinden.

Wir arbeiten partnerschaftlich mit Unternehmen, Kommunen, Forschung und zivilgesellschaftlichen Akteuren zusammen – überzeugt davon, dass nachhaltige Lösungen nur entstehen, wenn Ökologie und Ökonomie gemeinsam gedacht werden.

Unter dem Leitmotiv eines modernen, menschenzugewandten Naturschutzes, der Freude macht und Beteiligung ermöglicht, gestalten wir neue Wege: von Wasserbüffel-Weidelandschaften im Bottwartal über Zugvogelschutz im Piemont bis hin zu Klimawäldern in Vietnam und Sri Lanka.

Unsere Mission: Lebensräume bewahren. Menschen stärken. Zukunft gestalten.

Unsere Haltung: Wertschätzung. Respekt. Verantwortung.

Unsere Einladung: Gemeinsam Natur wirksam schützen – mit Kopf, Herz und Haltung.

Name: ECOLOGICAL AWAKENING (EcolAw)/REVEIL ÉCOLOGIQUE
Description: Environnement - Genre

Name: CARMa-Afrika Advisory Services
Description: Available for short term consultancies, longer term contracts for support and capacity development an decision support in: Developmental Monitoring & Evaluation. CBNRM. Wildlife. Communities Landscapes and Livelihoods. Nature-based enterprises. Visit our web site www.carma-afrika.com for more info.

Name: Pampas Ambiental
Description: Pampas Ambiental es una consultora líder en gestión y asesoría ambiental en Argentina, con experiencia comprobada que respalda nuestro trabajo. Nuestro equipo multidisciplinario de expertos en ciencias naturales ofrece soluciones ambientales integrales que aseguran el éxito de proyectos en sectores clave como energías clásicas y renovables, agroindustria, gestión y conservación de recursos naturales y más. Nos destacamos por nuestro firme compromiso con la sostenibilidad bajo los más altos estándares internacionales, (IFC. ND1-3-6).

Name: International Campaign For The Protection Of The Amazon Forest 2023
Description: For AFV’s 9th campaign from 11 May to 3 June 2023, the distinguished leaders Raoni and Tapi, Honorary Presidents of AFV, will once more tour the world, this time in company of Chief BemoroMetuktire and Chief Watatakalu Yawalapiti.

Name: Canadian Council on Ecological Areas (CCEA)
Description: The Canadian Council on Ecological Areas / Conseil Canadien Des Aires Écologiques (CCEA/CCAE) is a national conservation organization incorporated in 1982 (received registered charitable status in 1985) to help Canadians establish and manage a comprehensive viable network of  protected and conserved ecological areas representative of Canada’s terrestrial, freshwater and marine biodiversity.

Name: SereniDrink
Description: SereniDrink est une Start-Up créée dans le cadre de la FIE à l'IOGS. Nous avons développé une solution permettant de connaître la composition des verres dans les milieux festifs. Avec cette solution, nous souhaitons supprimer les risques de soumission chimique.

Name: Conservation Philanthropy
Description: Conservation Philanthropy is a new community foundation focused on place-based and community-based strategies, serving the entire philanthropy ecosystem.

Name: ONG AAFEBEN
Description:
AAFEBEN est une organisation de la société civile qui mène des actions visant à autonomiser les femmes des populations autochtones et communautés locales. Ces actions ont pour but d’améliorer leurs conditions de vie en leur permettant de générer des bénéfices économiques issues de la gestion durable des forêts pour qu’elles trouvent l’intérêt de s’engager dans la conservation des ressources naturelles. 

#NOS AXES STRATEGIQUES 
•	Valorisation des PFNL
•	Production d'un cacao zéro déforestation
•	Education environnementale
•	Restauration des terres dégradées
•	Développement des activités agro écologique
•	Valorisation du patrimoine culturel
•	Citoyenneté 

#NOS ZONES D'INTERVENTION
La portée géographique des interventions d’AAFEBEN se situe dans le paysage du TNS et du TRIDOM dans la région de l’Est et du Sud Cameroun. Le travail d’AAFEBEN se fait essentiellement dans les communautés riveraines à cinq (05) aires protégées à savoir ; les Parc Nationaux de Lobéké, Boumba-bek, Nki, la réserve de faune de Ngoyla et la réserve de Biosphère du Dja. Ces communautés sont essentiellement dans le département de la Boumba et Ngoko, le Haut-Nyong et Le Dja et Lobo couvrant les arrondissements de Mouloundou, Salapoumbé, Yokadouma, Lomié, Ngoyla, Mindourou, Messok, Mintom.

Name: Tuli Conservation Trust
Description:
Our mission & vision is to protect the Northern Tuli wildlife and find sustainable solutions to enable harmonious human-wildlife co-existence.

The Tuli Conservation Trust was established to, inter alia, protect and enhance the Northern Tuli Game Reserve, Greater Mapungubwe Transfrontier Conservation Area and neighbouring communities through conservation and community empowerment

Name: Amite River Basin Commission
Description: At ARBC, our mission is to mitigate flood damage, coordinate river management, promote responsible watershed management, and to conserve and restore the unique natural resources in the Amite River Basin watershed.

Name: Elsamere Conservation Centre
Description:
Welcome to Elsamere Centre for Education in Sustainability, a conservation hub located at the historic former home of Joy and George Adamson. Established by the Elsa Conservation Trust, our non-profit organization is dedicated to raising awareness and promoting the protection and conservation of wildlife.

Our centre features accommodation options including cottages and dormitories, perfect for schools, organized groups, and universities visiting Naivasha. We offer tailored educational programs focused on conservation, wildlife, and tourism, designed to engage and inspire all kinds of interested parties.

Join us in our mission to protect our natural heritage. Your support through donations helps us continue our vital work in conservation education. Together, we can make a difference.

Please contact us to learn more about our programs and how you can get involved.

Elsamere Centre for Education in Sustainability

Name: Projet de gestion durable des déchets à Malicounda
Description:
Face à la croissance urbaine rapide et aux défis environnementaux croissants, la commune de Malicounda, située dans la région de Thiès (Sénégal), s'engage dans une transformation majeure pour améliorer sa gestion des déchets solides. Le projet intitulé "Associations de femmes, communautés et entités publiques locales : Agents de changement dans la gestion durable des déchets à Malicounda" est une initiative novatrice qui mobilise les acteurs locaux pour instaurer un modèle participatif et durable.
Ce projet a été financé par l'Agence Basque de Coopération et de Solidarité - eLankidetza - et fait partie du Protocole Général d'Action de Coopération pour le Développement, l'Environnement et la Durabilité signé par l'Agence Basque de Coopération et de Solidarité - eLankidetza - et l'Entreprise Publique de Gestion Environnementale du Gouvernement Basque, Ihobe, S.A. Le projet est mis en œuvre par le consortium entre Nazioarteko Elkartasuna- Solidaridad et Euleuk avec les partenaires locaux FADEC NORD et l'Association des Juristes du Sénégal (AJS), qui soutiennent les différentes actions sur le terrain.
Impact attendu et bénéfices pour la communauté.
Le projet vise à :

Réduire significativement les dépôts sauvages dans les 5 localités concernées.
Renforcer les compétences locales pour une gestion autonome et durable des déchets.
Impliquer activement les femmes dans les processus de prise de décision environnementale.
Mettre en place une stratégie de gestion des déchets adaptée aux réalités locales.

Name: Amazonía en peligro: desafíos y soluciones para un futuro sostenible
Description:
En Amazonía en Peligro  Estamos comprometidos con la conservación de la Amazonía y los Andes, regiones vitales para el equilibrio ecológico global. Nuestra iniciativa se centra en concienciar y movilizar a individuos y organizaciones sobre la importancia crítica de estos ecosistemas.  Mediante la divulgación de información relevante, la promoción de políticas sostenibles y la colaboración entre comunidades locales, gobiernos y sectores privados, trabajamos para mitigar los efectos del cambio climático y preservar la rica biodiversidad de estas áreas.
  Actúa ahora: Únete a nuestra causa y contribuye a la preservación de estos ecosistemas invaluables .

Name: Sharon Land Trust
Description:
The Sharon Land Trust was founded in 1982 to protect and preserve lands of special scenic, natural, environmental, recreational, historic, or agricultural value to the rural atmosphere of the town of Sharon, Connecticut. 

Today the Sharon Land Trust holds conservation easements on more than 1133 acres and owns more than 1037 acres. A large proportion of the land is agricultural and is maintained as cropland by area dairy farmers.

Name: Naturalistes del Montnegre i la Tordera - NatMonT
Description:
L’Associació Naturalistes del Montnegre i la Tordera, NatMonT, és una entitat sense ànim de lucre, formada per persones diverses, amb interessos diversos, relacionats amb la natura.
Les persones que vertebrem Nat Mont tenim interès en conèixer i donar a conèixer el patrimoni natural del nostre àmbit territorial, i conseqüència directa d’això, també volem defensar-lo.
Els objectius de la nostra entitat són l’estudi, la divulgació i la defensa del patrimoni natural del massís del Montnegre i la conca de la Tordera.

Name: Balule Nature Reserve
Description:
Balule Nature Reserve is part of South Africa's Greater Kruger National Park, spanning over 42,000 hectares of unfenced wilderness. As a proud member of the Associated Private Nature Reserves (APNR), Balule is committed to conserving biodiversity, protecting endangered species, and supporting sustainable tourism that benefits local communities.

Our reserve is home to the Big Five and various other species, thriving in their natural habitat thanks to ongoing conservation efforts. Through our outreach and conservation programs we strive to create lasting impact beyond our boundaries.

Join us in our mission to protect our heritage and inspire a future where wildlife and people can thrive together.

 Conservation |  Wildlife Protection |  Community Outreach |  Sustainable Tourism

Name: Hawk Creek Wildlife Center
Description: Our mission is to educate, empower and preserve so that we will all thrive together. We inspire minds to become environmental stewards to fulfill the circle for generations to come.

Name: ZAATOT
Description: Association franco-marocaine pour le macaque de Barbarie et la communauté locale de Setti-Fatma dans la vallée d'Ourika, Maroc.

Name: Charles N. Gordon Wildlife Rehabilitation Center, Inc.
Description:
Gordon Wildlife is a 501(c)3 environmental center focused on wildlife rehabilitation, education and training. We take in injured and orphaned native wildlife found by members of the public in Central New York, providing veterinary care and rehabilitation services until the animals are strong enough to safely be returned to the wild. 

We offer veterinary assistance to other regional wildlife rehabilitators and provide public outreach, education and training relating to wildlife rehabilitation and environmental conservation.

Name: & another thing
Description:
Founded in 2020 as a response to the lack of authentic places of connection for conservationists. We are a conservation community platform, hosting workshops and open events to encourage more informal and honest discussion in a place for networking and connection.

All are welcome to our events with a particular focus on those wishing to change career path, currently studying, volunteering or working in the outdoor and environmental industry. 

We host a quarterly Big Chat series as an open discussion platform, and monthly events which have included Wellbeing in Conservation, Women in Conservation and Communication in Conservation. 

We enjoy collaboration and have worked with the Zoological Society of London, Conservation Careers, General Assembly and more.

Name: Willamette River Preservation Trust
Description: The Mission of the Willamette River Preservation Trust is to “Conserve the lands and waters of the mid to northern Willamette River Basin, and to provide accessible, low impact recreational access for people.”

Name: Nottingham Green Guardians
Description: The Nottingham Green Guardians volunteering programme enables people to play an active role in their community, improve the local environment and contribute to positive social change.

Name: Conservation Futures
Description: Creating a place to understand, protect and heal Country through recognising, safeguarding, and weaving knowledge systems

Name: Corfopal.org
Description:
Somos pioneros en la conservación y desarrollo sostenible en el Valle del Cauca. Por 25 años, hemos convertido la teoría ambiental en acción tangible: hectáreas protegidas, comunidades empoderadas y  ecosistemas restaurados. Diseñamos soluciones donde la conservación, el desarrollo comunitario y la acción climática generan un impacto tangible.

 Nuestros logros hasta ahora:
2,038 hectáreas protegidas (equivalente a 2,800 campos de fútbol).
15+ comunidades empoderadas en gestión ambiental.
3 ecosistemas críticos recuperados en el Valle del Cauca.

 Nuestras metas al 2030
Conservación y Gestión de Áreas Protegidas: 
Proteger como mínimo +1,500 ha. en el suroccidente colombiano, integrando áreas protegidas, corredores, y restauración para conservación y adaptacion climática.
Soluciones Basadas en la Naturaleza: 
Restaurar como mínimo 50 ha. mediante la implementación de prácticas como sistemas silvopastoriles, agroforestería y reforestación con especies nativas
Implementar al menos 10 proyectos productivos sostenibles como turismo sostenible, agricultura regenerativa y manejo de infraestructuras verdes.
Gobernanza Ambiental : 
Fortalecer y consolidar al menos 2 esquemas locales de gobernanza ambiental, garantizando la participacion activa de comunidades, autoridades locales y otros actores clave.
 Servicios Ecosistémicos: Valoración, Protección y Gestión Sostenible: Realizar la valoración económica y ecológica de al menos 3 servicios ecosistemicos clave en 2 territorios prioritarios del sur occidente colombiano.
Acción Climática y Gestión de Riesgos de Desastres: Reducir la vulnerabilidad como mínimo de 5 comunidades ante los efectos del cambio climático.

¿Cómo trabajamos? 
Mediante un modelo de Investigación aplicada + empoderamiento comunitario con enfoque de género + alianzas público-privadas.

Name: Dumbéa Rivière Vivante
Description:
Dumbéa Rivière Vivante (DRV) est une association engagée dans la protection, la gestion et la valorisation de la biodiversité du parc de Dumbéa et de ses milieux naturels.
Elle œuvre pour la sensibilisation des publics, assure un rôle de guet précoce contre les incendies, contribue à l’amélioration des connaissances naturalistes et à la restauration des espaces dégradés, en lien étroit avec les acteurs institutionnels et locaux.
Son équipe est majoritairement composée de volontaires en service civique, mobilisés comme éco-gardes, ainsi que d’une chargée de projets, responsable de la mise en œuvre de plusieurs projets engagés et structurants pour la conservation de la biodiversité de la commune de Dumbéa.

Name: The EcoVenturist
Description:
The EcoVenturist expands on the mission to inspire, educate, and activate people around the world through Adventures with Purpose. At its heart, The EcoVenturist champions four powerful pillars:
 Conservation
 Community
 Wildbeing (our take on Wellbeing)
 Eco-Tourism
Our goal is simple: to tell stories that matter—stories that remind us why wild spaces need protecting, how communities living alongside these last wild places are vital to their survival, how immersing ourselves in nature restores our health, happiness, and humanity, and how eco-tourism—done responsibly—can protect, regenerate, and rewild our planet.

Name: Wildlife and Environmental Society of Malawi (WESM)
Description:
The Wildlife and Environmental Society of Malawi (WESM) was founded in 1947 as the Nyasaland Fauna Preservation Society in Blantyre. In the early days, the aim was to protect wildlife, especially the larger mammals. In the 1950’s and 60’s, WESM was active in proposing and helping to establish Malawi’s reserves and parks such as Lengwe, Majete, Mwabvi and Nyika.

WESM is a non-profit, Non-Governmental Organization legally registered in Malawi and affiliated to the Council for Non-Governmental Organizations in Malawi. WESM is also a member of international conservation organizations such as IUCN, Birdlife International, EEASA etc.

The Society has nine branches in Balaka, Blantyre, Dwangwa, Lilongwe, Monkey Bay, Mzuzu, Mulanje, Nkhata Bay and Zomba. The core work of each branch includes organizing and supporting school-based “Wildlife Clubs”, with the goal of enhancing environmental knowledge and involvement, and currently there are some 1500 Wildlife Clubs across Malawi.

Each branch is a local membership organisation with the membership including individuals, companies, institutions and wildlife clubs, wholly run and managed at the level of the branch, often by branch members on a voluntary basis. Branches organize regular talks and social events, publish informative newsletters and wildlife books, park guides and extension materials, organize special interest events, schedule wildlife walks during weekends and implements local conservation activities.

Name: Acqua3_België
Description:
Acqua3 Ozonwatermachines voor een milieuvriendelijke reiniging zonder chemicaliën of andere agressieve middelen die het vuil verdelen en achterlaten.
Met Ozonwater zijn de gereinigde oppervlakken echt schoon. Op verzoek komen wij, bij voldoende deelname, een demo verzorgen in uw buurt!

info@acqua3belgie.com  +31 627 466 866

Name: For Nature
Description: For Nature uses science, community empowerment, and inspiring ethical arguments to be a voice for nature, combat extinction, and lead high-impact conservation initiatives that protect endangered species, preserve threatened habitats, and advance and implement the Rights of Nature legally around the world.

Name: Treeserve365
Description:
TreeServe 365 aims to empower and challenge people to get active - to plant as many trees as possible in their local communities, whilst mirroring their efforts in the developing countries of the southern hemisphere.
Our 365-day tree planting challenge launches on Friday 25th March 2023 at The Climate Coaching Alliance’s Fringe Festival 2023.

Name: Marine Market Systems (MMS)
Description:
Marine Market Systems (MMS) is a 501(c)(3) non-profit dedicated to transforming how coastal communities understand and steward their marine resources. We harness the power of underwater photography to inspire awareness and action, shining a light on the vibrant interconnectedness of underwater life and the science behind sustainable marine management. By combining compelling visual storytelling with practical, market-driven strategies, we help communities and governments put in place the rules, structures, and conditions needed to safeguard marine ecosystems.

When communities see the full value of healthy marine habitats—and have the tools to manage them sustainably—they can develop thriving blue economies, including blue-green value chains such as responsible fishing, low-impact tourism, and seaweed farming. In turn, these efforts boost local economies while preserving and restoring the very ecosystems on which they depend. Through practical guidance, collaboration, and a clear focus on mutual benefits, MMS supports the long-term well-being of both marine environments and the communities that call them home.

Name: Arsn Senegal
Description: L’Autorité de Radioprotection et de Sûreté Nucléaire (ARSN) est un établissement public à statut spécial, doté de la personnalité juridique et de l’autonomie financière. Elle est placée sous l’autorité du Secrétariat General du Gouvernement. Elle est régie par les dispositions de la loi n° 2009-14 du 2 mars 2009 relative à la sécurité en matière nucléaire et à la radioprotection, ainsi que celles du décret n° 2010-893 du 30 juin 2010 portant organisation et fonctionnement de l’Autorité de Radioprotection et de Sûreté Nucléaire.

Name: Vrienden van Heverleebos en Meerdaalwoud
Description:
Vrienden van Heverleebos en Meerdaalwoud is een Natuurvereniging die de ruime natuur rond Leuven beschermt.
We zijn te vinden aan de Waversebaan 66, Leuven.

Name: Cumbres Blancas Ecuador
Description:
Cumbres Blancas Ecuador es una organización comprometida con la conservación y protección de los ecosistemas altoandinos y los glaciares de Ecuador, esenciales para la biodiversidad, el suministro de agua y la lucha contra el cambio climático. Nuestra misión es salvaguardar estos paisajes únicos mediante un enfoque innovador que integra la ciencia, la educación, el arte y la participación comunitaria.

En Cumbres Blancas Ecuador, creemos en el poder transformador de la colaboración y la creatividad. A través de proyectos de conservación, trabajamos mano a mano con comunidades locales, investigadores y artistas para implementar soluciones basadas en la naturaleza, como la restauración ecológica de los ecosistemas altoandinos, ecoalfabetización, el monitoreo de glaciares y la restauración de cuencas hídricas. Paralelamente, desarrollamos programas educativos y artísticos que conectan a las personas emocionalmente con la majestuosidad de los Andes, fomentando un compromiso activo con su protección.

Nuestro enfoque se distingue por el uso de la educación y el arte como herramientas de concienciación. A través de exposiciones, talleres a docentes y estudiantes y experiencias inmersivas como visitas de campo, mostramos la belleza y fragilidad de los paisajes andinos, inspirando a audiencias locales e internacionales a valorar y conservar estos ecosistemas críticos.

Como un referente en la conservación de montañas en Ecuador, Cumbres Blancas invita a aliados estratégicos e inversores a sumarse a esta misión transformadora. Juntos, podemos garantizar un impacto positivo duradero en las comunidades, los ecosistemas y las futuras generaciones, posicionando a Ecuador como líder en la preservación de los tesoros naturales de los Andes.

Name: ONG Terre et Communauté  (TrCom)
Description:
Terre et Communauté
Impliquer les communautés locales pour un développement durable et culturel.

Terre et Communauté est une organisation à but non lucratif engagée dans la promotion de la conservation de l’environnement, le développement local et la valorisation des cultures traditionnelles.
Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec les communautés locales pour renforcer leur rôle dans les politiques de conservation et encourager des initiatives porteuses de changement durable.

Nos axes d’intervention :
 Développement communautaire : accompagnement dans la formation, le montage et la mise en œuvre de projets locaux.
 Éducation environnementale : sensibilisation, animation et valorisation des écosystèmes nationaux auprès des populations.
 Valorisation culturelle : promotion du savoir-faire traditionnel en lien avec les valeurs de conservation.
 Économie sociale : soutien aux initiatives culturelles génératrices d’impact économique et social.

Notre ambition est d’éveiller les consciences, renforcer les capacités locales, et bâtir ensemble un avenir où la culture, l’humain et la nature se soutiennent mutuellement.

 Rejoignez-nous dans cette mission de transformation durable.

Name: The Nkyene Project
Description:
Welcome to The Nkyene Turtle Project
Protecting Ghana’s sea turtles through community-driven conservation.
Join us in safeguarding the turtles along Ghana's coast. 

This is our very first turtle season, and it’s a season of exploration. We're here to learn what works, build connections with the community, and figure out how our project can make the greatest impact not only for the turtles but the people, and the coastline we share.
Our focus this year is on laying the foundation:
Collecting vital data on sea turtle activity that is currently lacking in western Africa
Building our first hatchery, a safe space where vulnerable nests can be relocated and monitored
Assessing the threats to nesting turtles in the area 
and strengthening relationships with the local communities

We're starting small, but dreaming big. And we'd love for you to join us on this journey.

Name: Ótima Soluções Prediais
Description: Somos uma empresa especializada na prestação de serviço de limpeza e conservação, que conta com uma equipe treinada e com materiais de excelente qualidade para atender as necessidades dos nossos clientes.

Name: The Glowworm Caves Tamborine Mountain
Description:
Come and visit the only breeding facility of glowworms in the world! Our cave was created to protect the local species of glowworms; Arachnocampa flava. Glowworms are actually fly larvae that glow in dark to attract and catch small flying insects to feed on. Glowworms are quite precious, they help control insect populations and are only native to Australia and New Zealand. The goal of our cave and our glowworm tours is to provide an experience that is accessible for families while benefiting wild glowworm populations.

Our guided tours allow public visitors the opportunity to see glowworms during the daytime. It was built to divert the public to our cave instead of local glowworm colonies, in an attempt to promote natural glowworm numbers in the wild to recover and increase in numbers. Unfortunately, glowworms are becoming rare due to increased tourism and deforestation which has devastated natural populations, particularly in the Gold Coast area. Our glowworm cave is a certified conservation program, visiting our site is a sustainable, and ethical way to see glowworms while contributing to their ongoing conservation.

Name: treedurable
Description: TreeDurable, une initiative de Reboisement Citoyen et Participatif qui se concentre sur la reforestation et la biodiversité en Afrique. Engagée dans l'innovation et la durabilité, elle contribue aux ODD 13 et 15 des Nations Unies. L'objectif est de créer un écosystème durable et des emplois locaux. Chez TreeDurable, nous croyons en un avenir où l'innovation et la responsabilité environnementale façonnent un monde meilleur.

Name: Bird Collisions in the Anthropocene
Description: Bird Collisions in the Anthropocene is a large-scale art project which addresses bird deaths due to window collisions in the US. Measuring over 300 feet in length, this crowd-sourced, sculptural carpet will be comprised of over 10,000 hand-crafted bird replicas – one for each bird killed and collected in 2023 in the city of Chicago, the most dangerous city in the US for birds.

Name: Aarahau Forest Protected Area Association (AFPAA)
Description: AFPAA is a Community-Based Organization dedicated to conserving natural resources, safeguarding Indigenous landowner rights, and fostering sustainable livelihoods through conservation-driven alternative income opportunities. Join us in our journey towards environmental stewardship and community empowerment.

Name: MY Forest Africa
Description:
Mission:
Our mission is to collaboratively enhance forest and tree coverage across Kenya and Africa, 
focusing on schools with expansive lands and limited tree presence, as well as residential estates 
lacking greenery. Through tree planting initiatives, sustainable water management systems, and 
community engagement, we aim to transform the environment, improve local ecosystems, and 
create a more resilient and greener future for Kenya and Africa as a whole. By doing so, My 
Forest Africa seeks to create a healthier environment and promote sustainable living.

Vision: 
Our vision is to create a harmonious coexistence between urban development and nature by 
fostering a culture of tree planting and environmental stewardship. We envision a Kenya where 
schools are shaded by lush canopies, estates are transformed into vibrant green spaces, and 
sustainable water resources support both the growth of trees and the well-being of communities.
By safeguarding Mother Earth, My Forest Africa aims to secure human well-being and 
contribute to global climate resilience and biodiversity conservation.

Name: Fauna Conservation NFT
Description: Fauna NFT is the smartest way to support global conservation. Collect NFTs of your favourite species, and contribute to their survival.

Name: Jde to zachránit
Description:
Jde to zachránit je společnou iniciativou českých terénních zoologů a ochránců zvířat Tomáše Ouhela (ZOO Liberec), Františka Příbrského (ZOO Ostrava) a jejich týmů. 

Společně v Indonésii a dalších zemích Jihovýchodní Asie přispívají k ochraně ohrožených živočišných druhů nejen tím, že se aktivně podílejí na potírání nelegálního obchodu s nimi, ale také spoluprací s místními komunitami a postupným vzděláváním místních obyvatel v problematice ochrany zvířat. 

Jde to zachránit is joint initiative of Czech field zoologists and animal protectors Tomáš Ouhel (ZOO Liberec), František Příbrský (ZOO Ostrava) and their teams.

Together they work to safeguard endangered animal species in Indonesia and other Southeast Asian countries by actively fighting the illegal trade in such animals as well as by cooperating with local communities and gradually educating the local population in the issue of animal protection.

Name: Alliance for Climate Innovation and Ecological Action
Description: ACIEA s’engage à promouvoir des solutions innovantes et durables pour faire face aux défis du changement climatique et de la dégradation environnementale. À travers l’éducation, la recherche, l’innovation technologique et l’engagement communautaire, nous œuvrons pour un avenir résilient et équitable.

Name: Avis Equatorialis
Description: Avis Equatorialis es un proyecto educativo que promueve la conservación ambiental, especialmente de la avifauna ecuatoriana.

Name: The Loops
Description: Association valorisant le vivant et l'existant en créant des boucles d'échange de biens matériels et surtout d'expériences humaines

Name: Fly Ranch
Description:
An open-source land stewardship project, year-round community center, and secure home for Burning Man

 A living laboratory for regenerative land stewardship and events

 An example for Burning Man’s 2030 Sustainability Roadmap

 A place where people gather to be creative, explore, and innovate

 An oasis of ecology and art that inspires awe and wonder

Name: Prairie Pines Partners
Description: The Prairie Pines Partners mission is to provide leadership to develop Prairie Pines as a site of natural resource conservation for education, research and recreation for all.

Name: MonStur in the Danube Project
Description: The project addresses one of the Danube Region’s most critical ecological challenges: the loss of migratory fish, particularly sturgeons, due to fragmented river continuity. The project will create a transboundary sturgeon monitoring system, uniting DRB countries to safeguard habitat corridors and improve data integration for policy and conservation.

Name: Project Big Wood
Description:
Based in Ketchum, ID, Project Big Wood is passionately dedicated to revitalizing the Big Wood River—restoring the heart of our valley as a sustainable ecosystem and thriving fishery. To learn more visit projectbigwood.org.

Our core focus:
Data collection for water quality and river health
Community education and advocacy 
Watershed restoration
Activating local pride

Name: ASSOCIATION MAISON DE L'ENFANCE
Description: La maison de l'enfance a pour objet de faciliter par tous les moyens appropriés la formation familiale, sociale, civique, sportive, culturelle de l'enfance et de la jeunesse nécessiteuse a fin d'offrir aux enfants en situation de vulnérabilité un soutien éducatif, scolaire, pédagogique, psychologique et matériel pour leur permettre de se réinsérer dans le milieu social et professionnel.

Name: Projeto Mantas do Brasil
Description:
O Projeto Mantas do Brasil é referência nacional na conservação de raias-manta. Há 15 anos, dedicamos nosso trabalho à proteção desses animais majestosos e ameaçados de extinção.

Realizado pelo Instituto Laje Viva, com base na Baixada Santista/SP, nosso compromisso é transformar conhecimento científico em conservação real através do monitoramento de populações por meio de fotoidentificação, investigação de comportamento e rotas migratórias, gerando dados para políticas de conservação, além da catalogação de espécies. Também desenvolvemos educação ambiental em comunidades e escolas, participação ativa em políticas públicas, programas de ciência cidadã com mergulhadores e pescadores, e formação de jovens pesquisadores através do Coletivo Jovem Mantas. 

POR QUE RAIAS-MANTA IMPORTAM:
Raias-manta são indicadores da saúde do oceano e espécies-chave para o equilíbrio dos ecossistemas marinhos. Ameaçadas de extinção, sua proteção significa proteger toda a biodiversidade marinha e garantir um oceano saudáveis para as futuras gerações.

Realização: Instituto Laje Viva | Parceria: Petrobras

Name: SSRS Indonesia Biodiversity Hub
Description: Unit teknis di bawah SSRS Institute yang memiliki tugas dan fungsi sebagai pusat informasi biodiversitas di Indonesia. Unit ini menampilkan basis data informasi yang berkaitan langsung dengan biodiversitas Indonesia hingga level spesies dan sub-spesies.

Name: IUCN SSC Marine Star Specialist Group
Description:
The IUCN Species Survival Commission (SSC) Marine Star Specialist Group (MSSG) created in 2023 is dedicated to conserving species belonging to three classes of the Phylum Echinodermata. The sea stars (class Asteroidea, subphylum Asterozoa) with 1,921 extant species in eight orders; The brittle stars (class Ophiuroidea, subphylum Asterozoa, with 2,117 species in five orders); and the sea lilies and feather stars (class Crinoidea, subphylum, Crinozoa with over 700 species). Species belonging to these three classes are threatened by emerging infectious diseases, climate change, sea level rise, invasive species, the wildlife trade, habitat destruction, and resource extraction activities (e.g. deep-sea mining and trawling) world-wide. 
Since its inception, the MSSG has built an international network of 51 experts (e.g. taxonomy, ecology, genetics, paleobiology, and conservation management) from 17 countries (Algeria, Argentina, Australia, Brazil, Canada, Chile, France, Guam, India, Indonesia, Israel, Mexico, New Zealand, Senegal, South Africa, UK and USA). We meet quarterly online to assess regional threats, share knowledge, and build global conservation capacity. The group has engaged in several outreach activities, including presenting at several regional and international conferences. Sixteen members have completed the online IUCN Red List Training course, of which seven are now regional or global assessors for our specialist group. We hope to attend several conferences in 2026 and are currently organizing an in-person workshop to advance species conservation efforts for this group fall 2026 in Vancouver, British Columbia.

Name: Eyrelab
Description:
/er lab/ (noun)
: the Educating Youth in Restoration Ecology lab
: a non-profit organisation aimed at:

i. promoting the awareness and engagement of youth in the field of restoration ecology
ii. facilitating education and training opportunities for youth interested in environmental stewardship
iii. conducting research and projects aimed at conserving ecosystems

Name: Serendipity Wildlife
Description: Serendipity Wildlife Foundation is based in California, USA and operates in Africa and South Asia. It is a registered 501(c)3 non-profit charity preserving wildlife through crime scene investigation, wildlife education, & conservation efforts.

Name: Eastern Connecticut Conservation District
Description: The Eastern Connecticut Conservation District (ECCD) is a dedicated 501(c)(3) non-profit organization committed to supporting the towns and citizens of Eastern Connecticut in their conservation efforts. Established through the reorganization of Connecticut's eight county-based soil and water conservation districts into five regional watershed areas—Northwest, Southwest, North Central, Connecticut River Coastal, and Eastern—ECCD plays a vital role in promoting sustainable practices and safeguarding our natural resources.

Name: Les Petites Ruches
Description:
Grandes Entreprises, PME, Startups, Institutions : devenez un pilier de la régénération écologique avec Les Petites Ruches.

Nous engageons les entreprises françaises dans une mission cruciale : la protection et la revitalisation de nos écosystèmes locaux, indispensables à la biodiversité et à la pollinisation.

 Unissons nos forces pour soutenir les abeilles, véritables piliers de la biodiversité, en adoptant des pratiques apicoles durables et respectueuses. Notre solution clé en main inclut l'installation et la maintenance sur site de ruchers, ou le parrainage de ruches pour les organisations manquant d'espace. 

 Transformez votre entreprise en une force régénératrice : sensibilisez vos collaborateurs à l'importance vitale des abeilles et engagez-les dans des initiatives éducatives captivantes. Avec Les Petites Ruches, chaque action devient une occasion d'apprendre et de partager autour d'un projet commun. 

Notre engagement ne s'arrête pas là : chaque collaboration se voit offrir une cuvée de miel personnalisée, véritable cerise sur la ruche , symbolisant le doux fruit de votre contribution environnementale.

Nous alignons notre accompagnement sur vos objectifs stratégiques, vous permettant de :

#environnement  : enrichir la biodiversité et combattre le déclin des abeilles, contribuant ainsi directement à la santé de notre planète.
#RSE  : mobiliser et unir vos équipes autour d'une cause écologique significative, renforçant le sentiment d'appartenance et la fierté d'entreprise.
#marketing  : mettre en avant votre engagement écologique auprès de vos partenaires et clients, renforçant votre image de marque responsable.

 Ensemble, œuvrons pour un futur où l'harmonie entre l'homme et la nature n'est pas seulement envisagée, mais réalisée.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre premier objectif ambitieux : maintenir une communauté de 1 milliard d'abeilles à travers le territoire d'ici 2025. 

Des petites ruches pour de grosses ambitions

Name: Pollichia
Description: Heimische Natur verstehen, bewahren und erklären. Bei der Pollichia nicht nur ein Motto, sondern Leitgedanke bei allen Aktivitäten. Im Jahr 1840 gegründet, erfreut sich die Umweltorganisation tatkräftiger Unterstützung der rund 2.400 Mitglieder: Arbeitskreise, lokale Gruppen, Freiwillige und Fördernde arbeiten Hand in Hand, wenn es um Naturforschung, Naturschutz und Umweltbildung geht.

Name: New Hampshire Turtle Rescue
Description: NH Turtle Rescue is based in Nottingham, NH and ran by licensed wildlife rehabilitators Dallas Huggins and Drew Stevens. Give us a call at (603) 417-4944 if you have an injured turtle that needs help.

Name: Wildlife Rehabilitation Clinic
Description: The Wildlife Rehabilitation Clinic exists to respond to the rehabilitation needs of sick, injured and orphaned Missouri mammals, release healthy wildlife back into its natural environment, and provide the community with a resource for education programs, advice and general awareness of urban wildlife.

Name: TANTAK
Description: ONG dedicada a la conservación de los océanos y al desarrollo sostenible. Nace de la mano de profesionales en el ámbito de la biología marina, la oceanografía, la investigación, la educación física y la divulgación ambiental. Con el objetivo de cuidar nuestros mares, incentivar hábitos de vida saludable y llevar a cabo acciones para la mejora de nuestro planeta y la proactividad ciudadana.

Name: Una Casita para el Pulpo
Description:
Casita del pulpo: Modelo Sostenible para revertir la sobrepesca. Liderazgo de Biólogos y Pescadores.

Nuestra Misión
Casita del pulpo aborda la urgencia de revertir el colapso del pulpo, afectado por sobrepesca y contaminación. Somos una solución integral que fusiona ciencia, tradición artesanal y desarrollo comunitario.

El Modelo de Impacto: Biología, Alianza y Arcilla
El mecanismo central es el ánfora de arcilla.

Santuario Submarino: Ánforas fabricadas localmente se instalan como refugios seguros, evitando la captura de hembras ovadas.

Protección Medible: Una madre protege hasta 50.000 huevos. Al darle una Casita, garantizamos que un promedio de 10.000 nuevas crías lleguen al mar.

Triple Alianza de Valor
Nuestro modelo de economía circular empodera a:

Biólogos y Líderes: Aportan la ciencia y el know-how. Contamos con +15 años de experiencia en comunidades costeras.

Pescadores Artesanales: Son Guardianes del Océano. Instalan y monitorean las ánforas, adoptando pesca responsable.

Alfareros Locales: Generan ingresos dignos al fabricar las ánforas con materiales naturales.

ODS y Proyecciones
Nos alineamos con los ODS 14 (Vida Submarina), ODS 8 (Trabajo Decente) y ODS 12 (Producción Responsable).

Proyección: La primera fase incluye el despliegue de 7.300 Casitas. Este esfuerzo es esencial para el aumento proyectado del 80% de la población de pulpo para 2030.
Buscamos activamente Alianzas Corporativas (RSE), Fondos de Impacto y Donantes Individuales que deseen Adoptar una Casita y financiar nuestro escalamiento.

https://www.instagram.com/casitadelpulpo/

Name: HNP Bénin
Description: Notre objectif est la conservation participative, créant une communauté accessible et engageante grâce à notre mission qui est de : "Connecter les gens pour la planète".

organization with the goals of empowering front line lighting practitioners through comprehensive educational programming, funding academic research projects, supporting advocates in lighting ordinance battles, and creating awareness through information outreach via the Restoring Darkness Podcast and the Darkness News Update.

Name: Mzanzi Organics

Social Enterprise focusing on small scale pocket farming in & around Cape Town 
Forest Makers @sugiproject

Name: Florida Tortoise Team LLC
Description: We provide cost effective solutions to individuals, developers, land owners, etc. who's projects are affected by the presence of the threatened gopher tortoise species while focusing on the conservation of gopher tortoises and their habitat.

Name: World Water Hub
Description: The World Water Hub is a community-driven global platform for global water conservation. If you are involved in water conservation, or are looking for ways to get involved, we invite you to join our LinkedIn group: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12694173/.

Name: Alabama Soil and Water Conservation Committee
Description: The Alabama Soil and Water Conservation Committee (SWCC) serves as the state’s leading agency for protecting and enhancing soil and water resources on private lands. Through coordination with Alabama’s 67 Soil and Water Conservation Districts and collaboration with federal, state, and local partners, the SWCC administers vital conservation programs that assist agricultural producers and private land users in adopting sustainable practices that benefit all Alabamians. SWCC was established by statute in 1939.

Name: RUA Perú UPCH
Description: Hola! Somos el nodo de la UPCH y estamos enfocados en la conservación y preservación del medio ambiente

Name: Association des Femmes Environnementalistes du Burkina Faso (AFE/BF)
Description:
L’AFE/BF est née de la volonté d’un groupe de femmes diplômées des sciences de l’environnement ou travaillant dans le domaine environnemental de jouer pleinement sa partition dans la protection de l’environnement et le développement socioéconomique durables des femmes.
Nous nous sommes donnés pour mission de:
-Contribuer à la valorisation de la protection de l’environnement
-Former et sensibiliser les femmes sur la protection de l’environnement
-Renforcer les connaissances et les compétences des femmes sur les questions environnementales
-Promouvoir et assister des groupements féminins à la promotion des produits forestiers locaux
-Développer toute initiative tendant à accroitre la capacité opérationnelle de l’association.

Name: Central Conservation
Description: Central Conservation, Inc. is a 501(c)3 non-profit conservation agency that empowers a constellation of organizations to care for our Earth. Our programs include WisCorps and The Nature Place.

Name: JAIDE Conservation Collective, LLC
Description: JAIDE CC is a collection of natural resource subject matter experts available to support you and your environmental conservation mission. We have a wide range of technical expertise in food systems, regenerative agriculture, and conservation project management, grant administration, political advocacy, financial and organizational tool development, and soil, water, and other sciences.

Name: Grassroots Conservation Fund
Description:
Grassroots Conservation Fund (GCF) is a pioneering nonprofit organization dedicated to advancing community-led land and wildlife conservation initiatives across Canada. At GCF, we are committed to empowering local groups and organizations by providing them with the grants and resources needed to undertake evidence-based conservation projects that make a tangible difference.

Our mission is rooted in the belief that local communities are best positioned to identify and implement the most effective conservation strategies for their unique environments. By supporting these grassroots efforts, we aim to foster sustainable stewardship of natural resources, enhance biodiversity, and contribute to the global fight against climate change.

Through our work, we strive to create a future where every community across Canada has access to the resources and support necessary to protect and restore their natural landscapes. By joining forces with local partners and leveraging the power of science-based conservation, we are making strides towards a more sustainable and resilient planet.

Connect with us if you are passionate about Canadian conservation! Together, build a stronger, more environmentally conscious community. Follow for updates on our projects, insights into conservation strategies, and opportunities to get involved in making a real impact.

Name: jaragun ecoservices
Description: Jaragun EcoServices applies nature-based solutions to sustainability challenges. Operates from Babinda, Far North Queensland, Australia.

Name: The Visitor Experience
Description: Ky Harkey founded The Visitor Experience to spread joy and protect public lands through wildly successful visitor experiences. Our network of visitor services professionals help you solve problems to improve your visitor's experience.

Name: Pike County Conservation District
Description:
Our Mission
Pike County Conservation District (PCCD) is committed to the long-term protection and sustainable use of Pike County's natural resources. We accomplish this through partnership, education, technical assistance, planning, enforcement, and leadership.


History
PCCD was created by the Pike County Commissioners in 1956 and is a legal subdivision of state government. The District is governed by a Board of Directors who meet monthly to help plan programs, guide staff, and coordinate efforts which provide conservation assistance and education in Pike County. District staff provide technical assistance for residents on natural resource and watershed conservation, groundwater protection, grant writing, and program administration.

Name: Trilateral Wadden Youth
Description: Trilateral Wadden Youth is a community and network of young people from the Netherlands, Germany, and Denmark who are passionate about the Wadden Sea. We bring together diverse academic and professional backgrounds to exchange knowledge, connect across borders, and collaborate on projects that protect and promote the safeguarding of the World Heritage. Through learning, sharing, and taking action, we aim to care for the Wadden Sea today while shaping its future.

Name: Conservation Technology Accelerator
Description: Conservation Technology Accelerator (CTA) is a non-profit providing technology solutions to help conservationists accelerate their impact. Using the same technologies widely utilized in the private sector, we deliver critical solutions to conservation organizations protecting the earth. Our initial focus is to provide animal population and land surveys. In the long term, we aim to catalyze the adoption of current technologies across the field so that conservationists have the right tools to protect our planet.

Name: LOS MAYOS MOUNTAIN NATURE RESERVE FUND
Description:
About
About you
We propose the creation of Los Mayos Mountain Nature Reserve (MMNR) in the Fila Chonta Mountain Range, overlooking the National Park of Manuel Antonio. The project goes beyond protecting a key watershed and wildlife habitat, to enabling pride and economic prosperity for local communities as part of our mission in Sustainable Rural Hospitality. 
This area is covered by Humid Tropical Forest, a biodiverse treasure with rare flora and fauna and hundreds of pristine mountain springs. Successful pilot projects of the Santa Juana community and lodge, and the private Cloudmaker Nature Reserve, already exist here protecting 400 hectares (1,000 acres). The Santa Juana community members are the Caretakers of these projects. Buying several abandoned farms in the area would expand this protected land to thousands of additional hectares. 
The 501c3 foundation, The Nature Fund for Costa Rica, plans to raise funds, including Crowd Funding and Carbon Credit Offsets. These funds will go toward land purchase and sponsoring the first School for Rural Costa Rican Gastronomy. The school’s curriculum by the World Institute of Sustainable Gastronomy and programs by the Corcovado Foundation on Regenerative Agriculture will offer knowledge, skills, and products, accessible to both tourists and residents. A Research Station is also planned, to enable the inventory and progress monitoring of endangered species protected by the nature reserve.
We will continue building our story and enabling donors to become participants – to personally experience the benefits of protecting and enhancing the culture of rural communities and the wealth of their treasured biodiversity.

Name: Economie Bleue Senegal
Description: L'économie bleue renvoie à l’ensemble des activités économiques liées aux écosystèmes marins, côtiers et fluvio-lacustres, visant à améliorer les conditions de vie des populations par une croissance économique durable, inclusive et qui préserve la biodiversité.

Name: Move To Green
Description: Organisation visant à préserver l’environnement.

Name: Reef Rescue School
Description: The Reef Rescue School is an ambitious pilot program that positions indigenous and local youth at the front and center of saving our planet, starting with the coral reefs. In this bootcamp style training program, students living along the shores of the Mesoamerican Reef are put through the challenge of transforming themselves, their communities, and the future of the reef. The accomplishments of our students will be used to set the stage for a new path in conservation––where youth from impoverished regions of the world lead the rescue and protection of precious natural ecosystems.

Name: Ankay Conservation
Description:
We focus on teaching how the Bocas Del Toro ecosystem works, the marine species present and how we can protect them through scientific conservation efforts. 
Whether you are an experienced scuba diver or have never dived before, our diving and ecological monitoring program will open up your mind to the underwater world like never before.

Name: Swells MX
Description:
SWELLS se dedica a restaurar y mejorar los ecosistemas marinos a través de una estrategia triple:

1. Educación y Sensibilización: Crear conciencia sobre la contaminación marina, enfatizar la importancia de la biodiversidad e inspirar acción y respeto por nuestros océanos.
2. Colaboración con el Sector Privado: Colaborar con empresas para incorporar prácticas sostenibles y comunicarlas eficazmente, creando campañas de alto impacto que resuenen con las audiencias.
3. Cooperación con el Gobierno: Influir en las políticas de planificación urbana para promover prácticas sostenibles, energía renovable, gestión eficiente de residuos y economías locales.

Además, SWELLS apoya a ONGs en el desarrollo de modelos de negocio sostenibles para asegurar la sostenibilidad a largo plazo.

Name: St. Catherines Island Foundation
Description: St. Catherines Island is a privately-owned barrier island located between Ossabaw Island to the north and the Blackbeard-Sapelo island couplet to the south. St. Catherines Island (SCI) is owned and operated by the St. Catherines Island Foundation (SCIF), which was established by the Edward John Noble Foundation. The goals of the SCIF are Conservation, Research, and Education.

Name: ONG ABIOGeT
Description: The main objective of ABIOGeT is to combat desertification, climate change and food insecurity through the implementation of agro-forestry, environmental education, water management and humanitarian programs/projects, for the purposes of improving the living conditions of populations in Cameroon and elsewhere in Africa.

Name: Naturpark Holsteinische Schweiz e.V.
Description:
Naturpark Holsteinische Schweiz e.V. 
Der größte Naturpark Schleswig-Holsteins steht für Naturschutz & Landschaftspflege, Umweltbildung & Kommunikation, Nachhaltigen Tourismus & Erholung und Regionalentwicklung.

Name: Naturpark Pöllauer Tal
Description:
Der Naturpark mit seinen 125 km² liegt im Herzen der Oststeiermark. Die beiden Naturparkgemeinden Pöllau und Pöllauberg werden von einer Hügelkette umgeben, deren höchster Punkt am Rabenwald (1.280 m) und der tiefste im Süden (380 m) des Naturparkes liegt.

Wälder, Wiesen, Äcker und Obstbaumreihen fügen sich abwechslungsreich ineinander und prägen die Landschaft. Der Naturpark bietet auch viele kulturelle Sehenswürdigkeiten sowie Erholungs- und Wandermöglichkeiten mit hervorragender Kulinarik.

Name: Wildnisgebiet Dürrenstein-Lassingtal
Description: Das Wildnisgebiet Dürrenstein-Lassingtal bewahrt mit dem Urwald Rothwald den größten Urwaldrest des Alpenbogens. Es ist ein IUCN anerkanntes Schutzgebiet der Kategorie Kat. Ia + Ib und seit 2017 UNESCO-Weltnaturerbe. Mit seinen Naturwäldern ist es ein wichtiger Baustein im Bestreben seltene Ökosysteme mit ihren Tier-, Pflanzen- und Pilzarten dauerhaft zu sichern.

Name: Urbane Vielfalt - Biotoppflege
Description: Für Biodiversität und Artenschutz: Wir sind Ihr qualifiziertes Fachunternehmen für ökologische Biotop- und Landschaftspflege im städtischen und ländlichen Raum.

Name: Gladwin Conservation District
Description: We are proud to provide the community with education about the conservation of natural resources.

Name: منظمة البراري لصون الطبيعة - Albarari Organisation
Description: منظمة البراري لصون الطبيعة منظمة بيئية تنموية غير حكومية غير ربحية تهدف للمحافظة على البيئة وصون الطبيعة وحماية التنوع الحيوي وتعزيز مفاهيم التنمية المستدامة وتحقيق أهدافها.

Name: Heritage Vedanta
Description:
Heritage Vedanta is dedicated to the study and preservation of India’s rich and diverse heritage. We focus on bringing to light lesser-known historical narratives, architectural traditions, and cultural practices that have shaped the Indian subcontinent over centuries.

Our work involves deep research, documentation, and exploration of sacred landscapes, ancient monuments, and traditional knowledge systems. We seek to understand and share the significance of India’s heritage in a way that connects the past with the present.

Through our efforts, we aim to create awareness, encourage conservation, and inspire a deeper appreciation for India’s timeless wisdom and built heritage. Heritage Vedanta is not just about history—it is about keeping traditions alive and making them relevant for future generations.

Join us in rediscovering the hidden layers of India’s cultural legacy.

Name: La Recyclerie de Bussy
Description:
Vente d'objets de seconde main dans une boutique. 
Animation d'ateliers de réemploi et de réparation.

Name: Pars Herpetologists Institute (NGO)
Description:
PHI was founded in 2006 as an active herpetological None Governmental Organization and its key objectives are conservation and identification of Iran’s native reptiles and amphibians also promotion of local people knowledge on the importance of endangered species.
Being informed of the lack of information on reptiles and amphibians in Iran and their considerable diversity in the country, the young but professional researchers of the PHI are engaged in the cooperative conservation programs of the endangered species and habitats, study the distribution of various species of reptiles and amphibians in Iran, cooperation with the general bureaus of environment in different provinces, discovery and description of new species, report the presence of several species from new regions.

Name: Warna Asri Untuk Alam
Description: WANA is an organization working toward the environmental campaign, preservation and restoration of the forest, youth engagement and community involvement to achieve of environmental sustainability

Name: Shepreth Wildlife Conservation Charity
Description: Shepreth Wildlife Conservation Charity (SWCC) was established in March 2011 to help fundraise for important wildlife conservation work both at home and abroad. The organisation raises funds and educates visitors about species which are threatened with extinction, while also playing a major role in providing funds for the on-site Hedgehog Hospital. SWCC has close links with Shepreth Wildlife Park and makes use of the Park in the charity’s fundraising activities.

Name: Kent Wildlife Rescue Service
Description: Kent Wildlife Rescue Service is a company based out of 106 Victoria St, Sheerness, United Kingdom.

Name: EarthxConservation Ambassadors
Description: EarthxConservation Ambassadors is an international nonprofit wildlife & environmental conservation group. We are dedicated to educating people and our associated industries to encourage sustainable wildlife, agricultural, land management, and forestry practices.

Name: Der Silberne Bruch
Description: Orden zum Schutz von Wald, Wild und Flur und zur Förderung von weidgerechtem Jagen. Beim Schützen und Fördern haben vielfältige Lösungen unter Beachtung regionaler Belange hohes Gewicht.

Name: ReefLife Restoration Diving
Description:
ReefLife is a public platform dedicated to organizing and mapping reef restoration work around the world.

Reef restoration projects exist across many regions, led by nonprofits, research institutions, and local organizations. However, this work is often fragmented, difficult to discover, and hard to compare across locations. ReefLife was created to address that gap.

The platform serves as a global directory of vetted reef restoration projects, structured around location, methodology, and organizational context. By organizing this information spatially and consistently, ReefLife makes restoration work easier to find, reference, and understand for a wide range of users.

ReefLife is designed to support multiple audiences, including conservation organizations, divers, students, researchers, and others seeking credible information about reef restoration efforts. Projects listed on the platform are publicly accessible and intended for discovery, academic reference, and informed participation.

At its core, ReefLife focuses on visibility, structure, and trust. The goal is not to replace existing organizations or programs, but to make their work more accessible and usable within a shared global context.

As the platform evolves, ReefLife aims to continue expanding its data depth and technical capabilities while maintaining a clear and reliable foundation for reef restoration knowledge.

Name: Maison de la Pêche et de la Nature (Fishing and Nature Center)
Description:
Located on Île de la Jatte in Levallois-Perret, the Maison de la Pêche et de la Nature (Fishing and Nature Center) is an environmental and aquatic education center, established in 1993.

Our mission: to awaken the curiosity of everyone – children, families, teachers, and nature lovers – about the richness and fragility of the aquatic ecosystems near us, through fun, scientific, and participatory activities.

At the heart of our activities:

- A Museum-Aquarium dedicated to the Seine River and the freshwater fauna of the Île-de-France region (panoramic tanks, a touch tank allowing visitors to get close to fish, turtles, crayfish, etc.)

- A fishing and aquatic environment discovery school offering introductory courses for children aged 8 and up.

- A nature and biodiversity center organizing workshops, events, and nature outings in urban settings for schools, recreation centers, and families.

Located on the banks of the Seine, in a green setting and easily accessible from Paris, the Maison de la Pêche et de la Nature (Fishing and Nature Center) aims to be a meeting place between the city and nature, fostering a better understanding of how each of us can contribute to the preservation of biodiversity and aquatic environments.

Our values: curiosity, knowledge sharing, respect for nature, and collective commitment.

Join us to discover, learn, and take action!

Name: Naturschutzverein Bachsertal
Description:
Der NVB setzt sich auf verschiedenen Wegen für die Natur in der Gemeinde ein. Über unsere Dachorganisationen sind wir zudem auch im kantonalen, nationalen und internationalen Naturschutz engagiert.

Unser Anliegen:
Wir setzten uns ein für die überaus vielfältigen Lebensräume für Pflanzen und Tiere und für den Erhalt dieser Landschaft, die sich in Lebensqualität für uns Bewohner messen lässt.

Unser Tätigkeitsfeld:
In der Natur draussen im Bachsertal, in den Gemeinden Bachs ZH und Fisibach AG sowie in Kaiserstuhl (seit 2022 Ortsteil der Gemeinde Zurzach) setzten wir uns besonders ein: Für Natur und Umwelt, denn Zugvögel, Insekten und viele weitere Pflanzen und Tiere – sowie Sonne-, Wasser- und Windenergie - kümmern sich nicht um Gemeinde- oder Landes-Grenzen. Ein weiteres Ziel unserer Tätigkeiten ist die Vernetzung mit unseren Nachbarn – auch ennet dem Rhein. Wir informieren und beraten auf Anfrage über Natur und Landschaft im Bachsertal, über die Gestaltung unseres Lebenraumes, über die Wechselwirkungen unseres Lebenstils mit der einheimischen Tier- und Pflanzenwelt: «Naturschutz ist auch Menschenschutz».

Unser Verein:
Der NVB wurde 1934 gegründet. Wir sind eine Sektion von BirdLife Zürich und des Schweizer Vogelschutzes BirdLife Schweiz und gehören damit zur weltumspannenden Familie von BirdLife International.
Der NVB zählt rund 200 Mitglieder. Jedes Jahr führen wir öffentliche Exkursionen und Vorträge durch. In mehreren Arbeitseinsätzen und Aktionen helfen wir die Biodiversität zu verbessern in den über 25 Naturschutzgebiete und Schutzzonen. Seit 1978 betreuen wir den Amphibienzug an der Bachsertalstrasse bei der Lehmgrube Fisibach. Rund 750 Nistkästen und Schwalbennester für Höhlenbrüter und Schwalben sind im Bachsertal zur Aufzucht der Jungen bereit.

Name: SPABC
Description:
L’Association Sans But Lucratif, Solidarité pour les Peuples Autochtones du Bassin du Congo « SPABC en sigle », est une organisation non gouvernementale de droit congolais basée à Kinshasa en République Démocratique du Congo et qui a pour ambition d’être le porte-voix des peuples autochtones du Bassin du Congo pour leur développement intégral et la protection de nos forêts. 
Les populations autochtones ont un rôle considérable dans la lutte contre les effets néfastes du changement climatique sur les écosystèmes forestiers. Ainsi l’ONG sera en étroite collaboration avec la communauté des autochtones pour réaliser des activités sur le partage des connaissances, la sensibilisation et le plaidoyer dans différents domaines tels que la protection de l’environnement, la justice climatique, le développement durable et intégrale, l’éducation, la formation, l’autonomisation de la jeune fille et des personnes vivant avec handicap, les droits humains et la recherche environnementale. 
SPABC aspire devenir un réseau d’organisations militant pour le bien-être des peuples autochtones et la protection des forêts du Bassin du Congo car l’avenir de l’humanité dépend de l’attitude actuelle de chacun face aux nombreux enjeux et défis que soulèvent le changement climatique.

Name: LGIVacation.com
Description:
Casa Contenta of LGI is a barrier island home like no other.

Located on Litte Gasparilla Island a barrier island community on the Gulf of Mexico only accessible by boat with no cars or commercial development. Situated ten minutes from the mainland, its seven miles of pristine beaches are only part of its allure. Its atmosphere of off-the-grid meets Caribbean Island provided something of a true castaway-like experience.

Casa Contenta of LGI started life as a vacation rental home but has evolved over the last decade to a private family home surrounded by an acre of pristine tropical plants. Secluded in its wrapping of Palms, hibiscus, birds of paradise, sea grapes, bougainvillea and numerous species of tropical foliage. Long term the owners plans are to Dante the land and home to the nature conservancy to guard and protect the natural beauty of this unique spot in the world.

Name: Glades Boys Python Adventures
Description:
The Everglades have always been The Glades Boys' playground. Growing up very close to each other, we spent countless days and nights fishing, hunting, and exploring the vastness of the 'glades. But these weren't leisurely trips – we were driven by a restless spirit and a thirst for knowledge. As avid hunters and lifelong outdoorsmen, we'd talk to biologists, researchers, anyone who could teach us more about this unique ecosystem.

Then came the pythons. As these invasive giants disrupted the balance of the Everglades, The Glades Boys realized their skills had a new purpose. What started as a few hunts quickly became a mission. Through perseverance, grit, and a hefty dose of competition, we have honed our python removal techniques. Records fell – first big catches, then multiple state records, including the 6th longest python caught in Florida. With each passing year, the Glades Boys perfected their craft, and in the summer of 2023, we struck gold with our capture of the longest Burmese python recorded in history (19 ft). It's not about the records for us, though. It's about protecting the wild heart of our home, inspiring others, and proving that adventure and conservation go hand-in-hand.

Name: Conservation Solutions
Description: Conservation Solutions: Empowering Responsible Choices, Together.   We're here to embark on a learning journey together to understand what being sustainability actually means.   From an individual perspective to an online business, lets have the much needed conversations about this very important topic.

Name: Construisons Ensemble une Écologie Engagée - C3E
Description:
L’association C3E est une association loi 1901 créée le 15 décembre 2020. 

Idée lancée par un groupe d’amis au lycée, C3E est devenue une association importante, pour la ville d’Evreux principalement, qui s’engage pour la protection de l’environnement.

 Ces deux dernières années, C3E a su se développer en Normandie, en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, en Île de France et en Bretagne grâce aux départs des membres du bureau pour leurs études supérieures.

En 3 ans, nous avons connu une belle évolution du nombre de membres : passant de 8 à 150.

Name: Manchester Essex Conservation Trust
Description: The Manchester Essex Conservation Trust (MECT) is a 61-year-old nonprofit organization dedicated to preserving ecologically important land and wildlife habitat in Manchester and Essex, Massachusetts, and promoting its use for quiet recreation, education and research.

Name: Save Our Bays
Description: Connecting coastal communities, and advocating for the protection of inshore habitats. Helping to keep the seas plastic free.

Name: Livingstone Lions
Description:
With the economic impact of the Covid-19 pandemic still being felt around the world, it is safe to say that few people on the planet have been able to escape its effects.
 
In Zambia, Southern Africa, the ban on international travel devastated an already fragile economy reliant on the financial benefits of tourism. Without visitors, the hospitality industry collapsed and a significant proportion of the local workforce lost its livelihood overnight. 
 
In the Dambwa Forest on the outskirts of the Zambian city of Livingstone, angroup of 39 captive lions were also suffering. As part of a conservation programme welcoming volunteers from around the world, when its main source of income disappeared and the project was forced to close down, the lions faced an uncertain future.

Livingstone Lions was formed at the height of the pandemic as an emergency response to keep the lions alive. Without the support of generous sponsors and donors, they would certainly have died of starvation.
      
While the lions remain firmly at the heart of everything we do – as well as being our constant inspiration and motivation – a return to tourism has now allowed us to widen our focus.

As Livingstone starts to rebuild itself, the long-term aim of our charity is to bring positive benefits to communities and increase awareness of the importance of wildlife conservation to the local economy. We are doing this by delivering conservation education programmes and by providing educational and life-skills programmes to empower local people and increase their employment opportunities.

Livingstone Lions is a non-profit charity run entirely by volunteers. We are passionate about the welfare of the lions within our care and the well-being of their human neighbours, but we can’t do any of this without your help.

Name: Town of Bethlehem- Farms & Forests Conservation Program
Happy Narwhal
Description: Happy Narwhal offers expert cultural heritage conservation at affordable prices. Based out of southwest Florida, the company provides both on and off-site services, including consultations, documentation, installations, and conservation.

Name: Dedham Vale Society
Description: The Dedham Vale Society works with its partners to preserve and protect the stunning landscapes, built heritage and bio-diversity of this extraordinary corner of Suffolk and North Essex.

Name: INLCTPTM Mauritanie
Description: Plus jamais de traite et de trafic en Mauritanie.

Name: Pacific Bird Conservation
Description:
Pacific Bird Conservation (PBC) is a nonprofit organization based in Hawai‘i National Park, Hawai‘i, focused on the recovery and long-term sustainability of native and endangered bird species across the Pacific region.

We are deeply committed to community-based conservation, working closely with local partners to develop and implement applied programs that are led by, and for, the communities we serve. By fostering local leadership, knowledge, and stewardship, PBC helps build conservation strategies that are culturally grounded, ecologically sound, and sustainable over the long term.

Through ecological restoration, animal husbandry, and reintroduction initiatives, we work collaboratively with AZA institutions, government agencies, local advisory boards, universities, and NGOs to protect species biodiversity and the ecosystems that support it.

Name: Vartul: The Learning Circle
Description:
Vartul is circle. 
At Vartul we believe in the circularity of knowlege. When we share knowledge with others, we also learn from them in return. We welcome everyone to join us in our circle of learning. Learning from people, learning from nature, learning from everything that is around us and within us.

Name: Clean up day Montpellier
Description:
Le Clean Up Day Montpellier rassemble citoyens et associations du territoire autour d’un grand défi: nettoyer, sensibiliser et préserver les rives du Lez, lors de journées d’actions concrètes, festives et porteuses d’espoir pour l’écologie locale.
Le Clean Up Day Montpellier, organisé par l’association DSD – Développement Solidaire et Durable, avec le soutien de ComForGood, s’inscrit dans une dynamique citoyenne du 19 au 21 septembre 2025. Né du besoin urgent de préserver les rives du Lez, il propose des matinées de nettoyage, des stands, des ateliers dans le « village des transitions » et des actions de sensibilisation sur l’écologie et la solidarité locale. L’objectif: mobiliser largement habitants, bénévoles, entreprises et collectivités pour une transition écologique concrète et inclusive, au plus près du territoire.
Le Clean Up Day Montpellier mobilise la communauté locale pour nettoyer les rives du Lez, réduisant ainsi la pollution et protégeant la biodiversité. L’événement sensibilise largement aux enjeux écologiques grâce à des ateliers éducatifs et favorise l’engagement citoyen pour un avenir durable. Notre objectif est de mobiliser plus de 300 participants, collecter plusieurs centaines de kilos de déchets et encourager des comportements responsables durablement.

Name: CEO SARL
Description: Organisation pour la préservation de l'environnement et Produits agricoles

Name: Champaign County Design & Conservation Foundation
Description:
The mission of the CCDC Foundation is to "Improve the livability of the environment of Champaign County, while focusing on public and private efforts to conserve, restore, and enhance the local environment. Special attention is given to providing a balance between developed areas with open space, including recreational parks, greenways, and trails, woodlands, prairie, wetlands, rivers, and stream corridors and other natural resources."

The CCDC Foundation encourages and promotes: (1) excellence in planning and design; (2) stewardship of land and water resources, including its acquisition as Trustee; (3) research and education to provide solutions to environmental problems; (4) gifts, grants, devises, bequests, and other financial contributions; and (5) opportunities for general public participation in governmental endeavors.

Name: Detection for good
Description: Detection for good trains and deploys highly trained conservation detection dog teams for environmental applications.

Name: Central Arizona Conservation Alliance
Description: The Central Arizona Conservation Alliance (CAZCA) was founded in 2012 as an ongoing initiative of Desert Botanical Garden. Together with regional partners, CAZCA developed a long-term strategy for the preservation of Central Arizona’s open spaces to support a healthy ecosystem and provide beautiful, safe open spaces for recreation, education, and relaxation.

Description: Explore The Amazing Wildlife!

Name: WaterfowlAI, Inc
Description: WaterfowlAI is the first unified AI ecosystem for waterfowl hunters, land managers, and conservation scientists. Our flagship BlindBook Club Manager & Hunter Applications—together with the Agency/Conservation Portal, TerraWing habitat intelligence module, and the WaterfowlID API—deliver real-time species identification, habitat analytics, and predictive insights to optimize hunts, property stewardship, and ecological conservation.

Name: ECO-BUD
Description:
Eco-bud is a purpose-led, for-profit green business focused on transforming South African communities through sustainable clean-up and rehabilitation initiatives. Our mission is to tackle illegal dumping and environmental degradation by converting neglected spaces into safe, usable, and beautiful community zones — from play areas to urban gardens.

By partnering with corporates through CSI and ESG strategies, Eco-bud not only creates jobs for local youth but also educates communities through school programs and eco-awareness campaigns. Whether it’s a corporate-sponsored clean-up or a long-term urban renewal project, Eco-bud is redefining environmental impact — one neighborhood at a time.

Eco-bud: Cleaning up today, reclaiming tomorrow.
