Le projet « Opérationnaliser le cadre national d'APA et piloter des produits de ressources génétiques et des chaînes de valeur innovants pour améliorer le partage des avantages pour le développement rural durable et la conservation de la biodiversité », dénommé le projet APA Nagoya II, est mis en œuvre par le Département du Développement Durable avec l’appui du Programmes des Nations Unies pour le Développement, financé par le Fonds pour l’Environnement Mondial (FEM), pour une durée de 60 mois (2024-2029)
Le projet APA Nagoya II intervient suite à la ratification par le Maroc du Protocole de Nagoya en 2022, vise principalement à :
- Consolider le cadre juridique et institutionnel de l'APA des ressources génétiques : Assurer la mise en place d'un cadre légal et règlementaire solide pour encadrer l'accès et le partage des avantages liés aux ressources génétiques.
- Développer des produits et des chaînes de valeur innovants des ressources génétiques : Encourager la création de produits et de chaînes de valeur dérivés des ressources génétiques, ce qui peut stimuler l'investissement dans le secteur de la biotechnologie.
- Renforcer la gouvernance pour un partage juste et équitable des avantages des ressources génétiques : Mettre en place des mécanismes de gouvernance efficaces pour s’assurer que les avantages découlant de l'utilisation des ressources génétiques soient partagés de manière juste et équitable entre toutes les parties prenantes, tout en promouvant la conservation des ressources et des écosystèmes naturels et le développement durable des zones rurales.

Name: Archipel - Concentré de biodiversité
Description:
Archipel – Créateur d’îlots de vie

Archipel est une future entreprise à mission normande qui œuvre pour la restauration de la biodiversité au cœur des territoires humains. Nous concevons, installons et accompagnons des îlots de vie : de petites oasis écologiques implantées sur des espaces inutilisés d’entreprises, de collectivités ou d’établissements scolaires. Ces îlots, composés de prairies fleuries, haies champêtres, arbres fruitiers, mares et abris pour la faune, recréent des habitats essentiels à la vie sauvage tout en sensibilisant les publics à la richesse du vivant.

Notre démarche repose sur trois piliers :
 Biodiversité — Nous réintroduisons la nature locale, favorisons les pollinisateurs et participons à la reconquête des continuités écologiques. Chaque îlot est conçu à partir d’essences régionales et contribue à la séquestration du carbone.
 Réinsertion — La création et l’entretien des îlots sont confiés à des entreprises d’insertion et des chantiers solidaires, offrant ainsi un emploi durable à des personnes éloignées du marché du travail.
 Éducation — Nous impliquons les lycées agricoles, techniques et professionnels dans la mise en œuvre et le suivi des îlots, à travers des dossiers pédagogiques permettant aux jeunes de devenir acteurs de la transition écologique.

Archipel s’inscrit dans une logique d’impact global : renforcer la biodiversité, créer du lien social et accompagner les entreprises dans leur démarche RSE et CSRD. Chaque îlot de vie est un symbole de coopération entre nature, économie et société.

Parce que nous croyons qu’il n’y a pas de petits gestes quand ils sont collectifs, Archipel transforme les bandes herbeuses oubliées en véritables refuges de vie, et fait de la biodiversité une source d’engagement, de fierté et de sens.

Name: Cpa Tia Telinda
Description:
Who We Are

The Tia Telinda Environmental Preservation Center is more than just an experimental farm; it is an innovation hub dedicated to research, preservation, and restoration of peatland ecosystems. Our mission is to deepen the understanding of the vital role of peatlands while developing and refining innovative techniques for the conservation and recovery of these unique ecosystems. Together, we are shaping the sustainable future of our peatlands, contributing to the health of the planet we all share.
Location: Campos dos Goytacazes, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Pacific Primate Sanctuary Inc
Description: Pacific Primate Sanctuary is a nonprofit captive wildlife conservation organization dedicated to the protection and permanent care of threatened and and endangered New World Primates.

Name: FRC Pays de la Loire
Description: La Fédération Régionale des Chasseurs des Pays de la Loire est une association loi 1901 agréée au titre de protection de l’environnement depuis le 9 août 2013 (arrêté DIDD n°2013/221-0001).

Name: Programme Agroécologie au Sahel
Description: Le Programme Agroécologie pour le Sahel, financé par le Secours Catholique- Caritas France et par l'Agence Française de Développement dans le cadre d'une Convention Pluriannuelle de Partenariat, est un programme qui met au cœur de ses actions la mise en réseau pour faire aboutir la transition écologique juste. Il est mis en œuvre au Sénégal, en Mauritanie, au Niger, au Togo, au Bénin et au Burkina Faso, par des partenaires locaux du SCCF.

Name: Green Burial Holdings Ltd
Description:
Yggdrasill Burial Ground is managed by Green Burial Holdings Ltd.  The registered company directors (Rupert Granville, Tim Simpson, Joseph Mann and Hugh Foster) started working on our Ethical Burial project in 2020 and are incredibly passionate about the issues and ethics that underpin an environmentally responsible and principle-led burial ground.  This subject affects us all on so many important levels and forms a significant part of the legacy that we hand to our children.

We believe in transparency, so let's start with this: our company (Green Burial Holdings Ltd) is registered at Companies House; our registered company number is 13645381 and our registered address is Unit 26g, Springfield Commercial Centre Bagley Lane, Farsley, Pudsey, England, LS28 5LY.

Green Burial Holdings is the company that manages our ethical burial sites.  We sell burial plots, caskets, woollen shrouds, and trees native to the area. Our site is located in a beautiful setting that our customers can be assured will be managed following our ethical principles in perpetuity.

An ethical burial is a way of burying human remains that seeks to have a positive environmental impact.

The idea behind ethical burial is to allow the body to decompose naturally without using embalming fluids, hardwood or any other material or chemical that can harm the environment.  As cremation is inherently bad for the environment, ethical burial does not permit the scattering or interment of ashes.

Typically the body is wrapped in a biodegradable shroud or placed in a biodegradable casket made of wicker, bamboo, wool, or cardboard. The burial site is in a natural setting, such as a meadow or forest, rather than a traditional cemetery.

Ethical burials may also involve planting native trees, shrubs, or wildflowers on the burial site to create a natural memorial.

Overall, the goal of ethical burial is to return the body to the earth in a way that is sustainable and respectful of the environment.

Name: Female GreenTech Empowerment
Description:
GreenTech Empowerment Cameroon was born from both the hope of change and a vision. 

For years, we have moved through spaces where innovation was expected, but empowerment, was absent. We searched for leadership that guided, uplifted, and truly listened — but too often, found silence, or indifference.

So we created what we never had.

GreenTech Empowerment is more than sustainability and technology. It’s about people. It’s about building ecosystems where voices are heard, where ideas grow without fear, and where purpose drives progress.

We stand today ready to offer the support, the impact, and mentoring model we once searched for — one based on transparency, collaboration, and trust.  

Because when we empower the people behind the solutions, real change becomes possible.

#femaleleadership
#green
#sustainability
#ecologicaltransition

Name: LMPA - L'arche de la colline
Description:
Créée il y a 2 ans par deux passionnées des animaux, notre association Croix Roussienne LMPA - L'arche de la colline a pour but de sauver et soigner des animaux abandonnés ou maltraités. 

Nous venons en aide aux animaux dans le besoin et tentons de les faire adopter afin de leur offrir un nouveau départ avec une famille aimante. Nous recueillons des chats, des chiens et des NACS.

Name: Terre des jeunes
Description:
Depuis sa création en 1985, TERRE DES JEUNES œuvre pour préserver l'écologie mondiale. Elle encourage les jeunes à participer à des projets environnementaux en promouvant le bénévolat et des techniques locales et innovantes dans les domaines de l’énergie, l’écologie, l’agriculture et l’éducation.
Elle promeut surtout l'éducation à l'environnement comme clé pour le développement durable pour une dynamique sociale, à travers une approche participative et critique au sein des communautés et des réseaux de solidarité.
Les programmes comprennent des activités comme la Fête de l’Arbre (FEDA), des ateliers sur la finance climat, des projets d'adduction d'eau, le renforcement des capacités des femmes en entrepreneuriat, la rétention des talents bénévoles, la collaboration en innovation et recherche avec les projets de bioénergie, l’innovation en termes de mobilité des hommes avec l’Eco-vélo, le renforcement des relations avec les communautés locales et la promotion de l’agriculture avec la syno-culture.
Aujourd'hui, que ce soit en Finlande, en Italie, au Burkina Faso, au Cap-Vert, en Haïti, en Côte d’Ivoire, au Togo, au Bénin, au Cameroun, au Burundi, au Niger, en République démocratique du Congo ou au Québec, des membres bénévoles agissent concrètement.

Name: Derbyshire Swift Conservation
Description:
Derbyshire Swift Conservation was formed in response to the massive decline of this iconic bird across Derbyshire and the UK as a whole.
There is evidence to suggest that loss of nest sites is a major factor driving the loss of our breeding Swifts and we are working to address this in two ways .

Firstly, to identify the location of existing nest sites and then ensure they are protected.
Secondly, to supplement natural sites with artificial nest sites in the form of Swift bricks or boxes, to reverse the loss of safe and secure nest sites for our Swifts on both existing and new buildings.

Name: Tucson Bird Alliance
Description: Tucson Bird Alliance, formerly known as the Tucson Audubon Society, is a nonprofit organization dedicated to inspiring people to enjoy and protect birds through recreation, education, conservation, and environmental restoration in Southeast Arizona. Established in 1949, the organization has a long history of engaging the community in bird-related activities and advocacy.

Name: Green Connect Group
Description:
Green Connect Group  is an innovative company focused entirely on ecological developments.

We strive to make a positive impact by implementing specific initiatives that contribute to the improvement of nature. Our goal is to process waste and give it new life, contributing to a more circular economy while reducing the burden on the environment.

One of our main focus areas is the reduction of CO₂ emissions. By being actively involved in reducing CO₂, we contribute to global efforts to combat climate change and create a more sustainable future for generations to come.

At Green Connect Group, we believe that every action counts in the fight against climate change and the protection of our planet. By working with partners and stakeholders, we strive to develop innovative solutions that have a lasting impact.

Name: Naturschutzbund Steiermark
Description:
Der | naturschutzbund | Österreich setzt sich im Interesse der Allgemeinheit seit 100 Jahren für eine dauerhafte Sicherung der Natur als Lebensgrundlage für Menschen, Tiere und Pflanzen ein. Seine auch über die Grenzen hinausgehenden Aktivitäten tragen dazu bei, Arten und Lebensräume zu schützen, das Bewusstsein über den Wert natürlicher und naturnaher Lebensräume zu stärken sowie eine naturverträgliche Nutzung der natürlichen, nicht vermehrbaren Lebensgrundlagen zu sichern und zu fördern

Der | naturschutzbund | ist die größte Naturschutzorganisation Österreichs mit föderaler Struktur und besteht aus neun Landesgruppen mit Regionalgruppen und der Naturschutzjugend. Er ist ein unabhängiger, gemeinnütziger und überparteilicher Verein und verfolgt kein wirtschaftliches Gewinnstreben.

Der | naturschutzbund | versteht sich als ökologisches Gewissen, vorausschauender Mahner und engagierter Anwalt der Natur. Er ist treibende Kraft für eine nachhaltige Entwicklung in Österreich und einen ethisch korrekten Umgang mit der Natur. Seine Stärke und Glaubwürdigkeit basieren auf der fachlichen Kompetenz und dem Engagement seiner Mitglieder, ExpertInnen und UnterstützerInnen.

    die Vielfalt des Lebens, den Schutz der Arten in ihren angestammten Lebensräumen
    die Erhaltung und Wiederherstellung der charakteristischen Natur- und Kulturlandschaft unseres Landes
    die Bewahrung und Gesunderhaltung der natürlichen Lebensgrundlagen Boden, Wasser und Luft
    eine naturverträgliche und damit ökologisch orientierte Land- und Forstbewirtschaftung, Raumplanung und Energieerzeugung

    der Natur eine Stimme gibt
    naturschutzfachlich wertvolle Lebensräume durch Kauf, Pacht und Pflege sichert
    Projekte zum Schutz von Arten und Lebensräumen durchführt
    in einem breiten Netzwerk agiert und den konstruktiven Dialog mit Interessensgruppen sucht
    Informationsarbeit leistet, um Wissen, Verständnis und Begeisterung der Menschen für die Natur zu fördern

Name: Eco-Warriors Benin
Description: ECO-Warriors est une association des jeunes bénévoles du Bénin qui luttent contre la pollution de l'environnement.

Name: New York State Water Resources Institute
Description:
At the New York State Water Resources Institute at Cornell University (NYSWRI), we support robust science and dialogue between researchers, managers, policymakers, and the general public to improve water management through:
- Original research and outreach on topics of local, state, and national importance.
- Grant and funding opportunities for the higher education community.
- Outreach and education, related to state-of-the-art research, to various stakeholders throughout New York state.
- Relationship-building with state agencies, professional organizations, and citizen stakeholder groups.

Name: Naturpark Karwendel
Description:
Der Naturpark Karwendel umfasst beinahe das gesamte Karwendelmassiv und das Naturschutzgebiet Arnspitze und ist mit einer Fläche von 739 km² das größte Tiroler Schutzgebiet und der größte Naturpark Österreichs.

Aufgrund seiner Topographie verfügt der Naturpark über einen überdurchschnittlich hohen Anteil an natürlichen Lebensräumen wie Urwäldern und Wildflüssen und beherbergt eine hohe Anzahl europaweit bedeutender Tier- und Pflanzenarten wie beispielsweise Steinadler, Weißrückenspecht oder Frauenschuh.

Der Naturpark Karwendel ist in den Bereichen “Naturschutz“, “Erholung & Tourismus“, “Umweltbildung“, “Wissen & Forschung” sowie “Regionalentwicklung” aktiv und erhielt vom Verband der Naturparke Österreichs die renommierte Auszeichnung “Naturpark des Jahres 2020“.

Name: Cuenca Los Ojos
Description:
Cuenca de Los Ojos is on a mission to build biodiversity in Northern Mexico. From restoring grasslands to reviving watersheds, boost biodiversity, and keep soils thriving. 

Right in the heart of one of the most biodiverse areas in North America. In addition to black bears, and jaguar, Cuenca provides food, water, and habitat for a host of threatened and endangered species.

Name: Eastern Nevada Landscape Coalition
Description:
Eastern Nevada Landscape Coalition is a non-profit conservation organization dedicated to restoring the dynamic, diverse, resilient landscapes of the arid and semi-arid West for present and future generations through education, research, advocacy, partnerships, and the implementation of on-the-ground projects.

ENLC has been in business for over two decades and is proud to include several experts on the arid and semi-arid West on its staff. We maintain full-time ecologists, botanists, range scientists and wildlife biologists with extensive GIS and backcountry skills, all of whom envision a future where communities of plants and animals thrive in their Great Basin environment. If you would like to be a part of this vision, please join ENLC as a Member, Partner, Supporter and/or CWMA Member. We look forward to working with you.

Name: WildComm Research Stations
Description:
We envision a world in which conservation volunteering is not for profit but fills a real need in providing knowledge, connecting habitats, and giving landowners outside protected areas a reason to value their natural environment and co-exist with wildlife. 

Our mission is to provide affordable opportunities to dedicated conservation volunteers that will, by working collaboratively and alongside landowners outside protected areas, bridge knowledge gaps, foster habitat connectivity and cultivate a shared appreciation for the natural environment. 

We are doing this by establishing research satellite sites and placing volunteers on privately owned land, where wildlife research and conservation can have a big impact.

Name: Casabio
Description: Casabio is a free online platform aiming to document "a face and a place for every species on earth". It offers tools for investigating plants and animals, and documenting their characteristics. While initially focused on South African flora, Casabio welcomes contributions from around the world.

Name: FLORAPYR 3D (programme INTERREG POCTEFA)
Description:
Programme INTERREG POCTEFA FLORAPYR 3D : 
Coopérer pour surveiller et conserver la flore pyrénéenne

Dans un contexte de changement global, les écosystèmes de haute montagne et leur biodiversité, en particulier la flore pyrénéenne, présente un haut degré de vulnérabilité. Le projet transfrontalier FLORAPYR 3D vise globalement à poursuivre l’évaluation continue de l’état du patrimoine floristique pyrénéen et de ses enjeux de conservation afin de sensibiliser, le cas échéant d’alerter, les autorités publiques et les gestionnaires des territoires du massif, ainsi que le grand public, en faveur d’une meilleure préservation des plantes sauvages, de leurs habitats et de sites particulièrement riches et sensibles.

Programa INTERREG POCTEFA FLORAPYR 3D : 
Cooperar para vigilar y conservar la flora pirenaica

En un contexto de cambio global, los ecosistemas de alta montaña y su biodiversidad, en particular la flora pirenaica, son altamente vulnerables. El objetivo general del proyecto transfronterizo FLORAPYR 3D es continuar la evaluación continua del estado del patrimonio floral pirenaico y de sus retos de conservación, con el fin de sensibilizar y, en su caso, alertar a las autoridades públicas y a los gestores de la cordillera, así como al público en general, sobre la necesidad de una mejor conservación de las plantas silvestres, de sus hábitats y de los lugares especialmente ricos y sensibles.

Projet cofinancé à 65% par le Fonds Européen de Développement Régional (FEDER) dans le cadre du Programme Interreg VI-A Espagne-France-Andorre (POCTEFA 2021-2027). 
Cofinanciado en un 65% por la Unión Europea a través del Programa Interreg VI-A España-Francia-Andorra (POCTEFA 2021-2027).

Co-financements // Con cofinanciación : État (France – FNADT Massif des Pyrénées), Région Occitanie, Région Nouvelle-Aquitaine.

Chef de file coordinateur : Conservatoire botanique national des Pyrénées et de Midi-Pyrénées.

Name: Bahía de Coquimbo
Description: Promover la conservación y protección de los ecosistemas costeros y aves playeras de la Bahía de Coquimbo

Name: STL Neighborhood Foresters
Description:
Our mission is to empower residents to make STL a better place to live by improving our tree canopy.

In the unforgiving urban environment, simple issues can become death sentences for trees. Many urban trees decline before maturity; climate change adds even more stress. Growing the canopy requires we improve trees’ living conditions and address causes of premature decline, a task too big for Forestry to tackle alone.

Neighborhood Foresters, partners with the Forestry Division to provide residents gear, training and official permission to help care for city trees. Our shared goal is to enable Forestry staff to focus their skills on more technical tasks, while volunteers handle the routine care needed to improve the health and density of the urban tree canopy.

It is our eventual goal to expand Neighborhood Foresters throughout the City of St. Louis and beyond! Communities will benefit most if we work together to improve our urban forestry efforts across the STL metro region. We are excited to build community partnerships and demonstrate to residents ways we can support them in creating healthier, happier communities.

Come to an upcoming event or reach out online for more program info; we want to help you bring better tree care to your community!

Name: Penns Valley Conservation Association (PVCA)
Description: Penns Valley Conservation Association's mission is to serve as a steward for the natural and cultural communities in the Upper Penns Creek watershed, seeking to preserve and honor the agricultural roots of Penns Valley by protecting and conserving its waters, farmlands, forests and rural heritage. We envision an engaged community, where growth is balanced with support for healthy natural systems that foster the local economy. Our valley has dark night skies, clear streams, healthy forests, prosperous farms, and local jobs.

Name: Ertim Conservation Institute
Description: Ertim adalah lembaga non profit di Indonesia yang bergerak di bidang pelestarian bangunan cagar budaya

Name: Pesca ABC
Description: Pesca Alternativa de Baja California es una organización civil local con sede en San Felipe, Baja California (México) fundada e integrada por pescadores innovadores comprometidos con su comunidad y la sustentabilidad de la región.

Name: The Cove Discovery Project
Description:
We cherish marine life and coastlines, driven by their beauty and importance.
By sharing their wonders widely, we inspire others to connect deeply with them.
Through talks, activities, education, and research, we foster understanding and stewardship.

Name: Réserve internationale de ciel étoilé du Mont-Mégantic
Description:
La Réserve internationale de ciel étoilé du Mont-Mégantic vise à préserver, aujourd’hui et pour l’avenir, l’accès pour tous à l’expérience du ciel étoilé et la conservation des environnements nocturnes. 
 
Mené par l'ASTROLab et grâce à la collaboration du parc national du Mont-Mégantic, de l'Observatoire du Mont-Mégantic, des communautés locales, des MRCs et des élus municipaux, provinciaux et fédéraux, le projet de protection du ciel nocturne permet de répondre adéquatement aux besoins d'éclairage extérieur tout en réalisant d'importantes économies d'énergie. De plus, la protection du ciel étoilé et la mise en valeur des paysages nocturnes contribuent à donner à la région un caractère distinctif et une notoriété internationale.

Name: Groupe_Absorb
Description: Dans notre lutte pour un avenir durable, nous sommes persuadés que chaque initiative revêt une importance capitale. En développant son projet DINDEFELO, ABSORB offre une vaste gamme de services diversifiés dans différents secteurs, allant de la technologie à l'environnement en passant aux énergies renouvelables. Notre objectif consiste à sensibiliser, former et d'encourager les individus et les entreprises à adopter des pratiques respectueuses de l'environnement.

Name: EcoGIS-Togo
Description: ECOGIS-Togo est une startup technologique centrée sur la gestion intelligente de l'environnement. Elle se distingue par l’usage des Systèmes d’Information Géographique (SIG) pour rendre le processus de collecte, de traitement et de suivi des déchets plus efficace et durable.

Name: POWO - Project 0 Waste to Ocean
Description:
POWO - Project 0 Waste to Ocean - est une association Loi 1901 qui a été créée pour :
- Mettre en place une démarche ambitieuse et écosystémique de préservation du vivant, visant à atteindre l'objectif suivant : plus aucun déchet n'arrivera vers les océans dès 2035
- Lutter contre les pollutions anthropiques sous toutes leurs formes, qui portent directement ou indirectement atteinte aux milieux aquatiques, qui transitent de la terre vers la mer
- Devenir un acteur de référence auprès des instances publiques, privées et de la société civile pour orchestrer les différents acteurs
- Collecter les données au travers d'une plateforme, accélérer cette nécessaire transformation pour atteindre cet objectif ambitieux dès 2035
- Soutenir la recherche, le développement, la mise en application et la promotion de solutions innovantes permettant d'intercepter, collecter et éliminer tous les polluants visibles et invisibles, de mettre en place une nouvelle filière de collecte et retraitement de ces déchets abandonnés, de développer des postes de supervision des systèmes de collecte
- Organiser des événements publics ou privés de collecte de fonds avec l'ensemble des membres et partenaires, autours de thématiques étant en lien avec la préservation de l'environnement, et plus particulièrement avec la protection des fleuves, des mers et océans.
- Déployer le label "0 Waste to Ocean" et accompagner les Collectivités Territoriales dans la mise en place de plans d'actions en vue de leur labellisation

Name: Tech4eco
Description:
Tech4eco développe des solutions technologiques innovantes pour optimiser le la gestion des déchets et favoriser un développement durable.
Notre objectif :allier innovation et responsabilité pour réduire l’empreinte écologique des entreprises et des collectivités.

Name: Natural Capital Accounting
Description:
El Perú es considerado internacionalmente un país megadiverso; no obstante, debe convivir con las solicitudes empresariales de permisos ambientales y el uso de los recursos naturales, generando presión sobre su capital natural.

Por ello, es necesario que las entidades públicas y privadas peruanas generen mayor y mejor información sobre el valor monetario de los servicios ecosistémicos proveídos por su capital natural para una toma de decisiones con consciencia ambiental.

Así, en NCA promovemos que la valoración monetaria del capital natural del Perú sea obtenida con rigurosidad técnica y que el país transite hacia la generación de cuentas monetarias nacionales ambientales.

De hecho, estas cuentas ambientales incluirían para su determinación el valor monetario de la degradación ambiental, la disminución de los recursos naturales y la contribución de los ecosistemas hacia la economía.

Misión:

Buscamos orientar sobre las buenas prácticas internacionales en la valoración económica de la naturaleza para que los investigadores pueden producir estudios de calidad.

Visión:

Un país que posea un sistema de cuentas nacionales ambientales basado en estudios científicos de calidad que pongan en valor nuestra naturaleza.

Objetivo:

Contribuir a la excelencia en la producción de estudios científicos que asignan valor a la naturaleza para transitar hacia un país con cuentas nacionales ambientales.

Si compartes nuestro objetivo, contáctanos a través del correo: ncaperu@gmail.com.

 Facebook: facebook.com/naturalcapitalaccounting
 Instagram: instagram.com/naturalcapitalaccounting
 NCAp-Database: https://tinyurl.com/ncaperu

Name: Lake Monroe Water Fund
Description:
We develop and invest resources into upstream shovel-ready conservation projects for clean water. Our goal is to protect/improve water quality in Lake Monroe by reducing pollutants in the watershed. 

Our three main targets are:
- Sediment: Eroded soils can carry other pollutants
- Pathogens:  Mainly from failing septic systems 
- Nutrients:  Nitrogen & phosphorus can contribute to algae blooms. Sources include fertilizer and manure.

Mission:  The Lake Monroe Water Fund is an active funder for watershed projects that conserve, protect and sustain Lake Monroe as our shared community water resource.

Vision:  The Lake Monroe Water Fund envisions a watershed that provides clean water for human health, natural systems, and quality of life in South Central Indiana supported by an engaged community.

Name: Enviro shade balls
Description:
ENVIRO SHADE BALLS is an innovative eco-solution developed by TS DIGIT’EAU SOLUTIONS, designed to reduce water evaporation in open reservoirs, particularly in the industrial and agricultural sectors.

We specialize in the import, distribution, and installation of high-density polyethylene (HDPE) shade balls that offer durability, weather resistance, and long-term water preservation.

 Our solution is ideal for:

Wastewater Treatment Plants (WWTPs)

Drinking Water Stations

Industrial Water Basins

Irrigation and agricultural reservoirs

 Key Benefits:
Up to 90% reduction in water evaporation

Blocks sunlight, algae growth, and dust infiltration

Reduces water treatment frequency and maintenance costs

Simple, fast, and infrastructure-free installation

Our mission is to support sustainable water management through reliable, cost-effective, and environmentally responsible solutions tailored for Moroccan and African industries.

Name: Proyecto Sebraba
Description: Promovemos el conocimiento y cuidado por los felinos silvestres en Venezuela.

Name: EC ENVIRONNEMENT
Description:
EC ENVIRONNEMENT accompagne les acteurs publics et privés dans leurs projets d'aménagements, de travaux et d'ouvrages. 
EC ENVIRONNEMENT réalise des missions d'études et de conseils afin d'allier développement et respect de l'environnement.
Le bureau intervient dans les domaines d'activités suivants :
  - Environnement et milieux naturels
  - Mines et carrières
  - Hydrologie et hydraulique 
  - SIG, géomatique et cartographie
  - Assainissement non collectif
  - Maitrise d'oeuvre

Cette diversité permet une analyse fine et systémique des impacts éventuels d'un projet sur son environnement.

Name: Upper Salinas - Las Tablas Resource Conservation District
Description:
People depend on soil, water, air, plants, and animals to survive. These natural resources provide our communities with food, shelter, clothing, economies, and recreation. The Upper Salinas-Las Tablas Resource Conservation District (US-LT RCD) provides technical assistance, education and resources to help agricultural, rural and urban communities preserve these natural elements while supporting robust land productivity.

Serving North San Luis Obispo County including portions of Monterey and Kern Counties since 1951, the US-LT RCD is a non-regulatory organization. The RCD has established an assortment of services and programs to serve the need of every land manager in our region. Farmers, ranchers, and residents rely upon the RCD for entire project navigation – from planning to design, permitting to installation – we provide the continuum of technical assistance needed to get the job done.

Name: M.AGRO.BEE
Description: Chez M.AGRO.BEE, nous menons un projet pionnier en apiculture durable pour sauvegarder les abeilles et la biodiversité. Nous formons des apiculteurs, sélectionnons des abeilles résistantes pour une apiculture sans traitement chimique et soutenons activement la pollinisation en Wallonie. En parallèle de notre activité apicole, nous développons des solutions pour intégrer la biodiversité aux écosystèmes agricoles. M.AGRO.BEE est un acteur engagé dans la régénération des agroécosystèmes et l'éducation apicole, permettant une production de miel locale et de qualité. Parrainez nos abeilles, profitez de nos services d’installation de ruches pour particuliers et entreprises, et suivez une formation axée sur des pratiques respectueuses. Rejoignez-nous pour protéger les abeilles et renforcer la pollinisation en Wallonie – chaque geste compte !

Name: Wicki's Wildlife World
Description: Raising awareness about wild animals and providing those in need with love and shelter.

Name: Dartmoor Preservation Association
Description: Heritage, conservation and access-based charity keeping Dartmoor wild and free since 1883.

Name: Peter Benchley Ocean Awards
Description: The Peter Benchley Ocean Awards was co-founded by Wendy Benchley and David Helvarg and named in honor of Peter Benchley, author of Jaws and lifelong shark and ocean advocate. The Benchley Awards recognize and celebrate the work and dedication of individuals committed to ocean conservation excellence.

Name: unuverse.io
Description:
Unuverse.io protects biodiversity around the globe by giving representation to 3333 unique and rare animals on the blockchain, through Impact NFTs and equipping them with smart contracts.

Attaching smart contracts to the NFT for automatic redistribution of wealth to CAUSES or projects that protect them, like NGOs, land or water recreation, new technologies etc opens up a whole new world of possibilites for wildlife protection and recreational work of ecosystems. 

Individuals can now be holders of public goods as their benefit for the ecosystems can be recorded and individuals can benefit from protecting such valuable digital assets. 

As an holder of an Unu impact NFT you have voting rights on the UNU DAO, which is the decentralized organization of all holders that makes decisions on pairing the NFTS to the right impact projects. This triggers redistribution of funds to the project and the holder of the NFT. 

The impact projects or Causes are vetted and prepared for the DAO voting by experts and the understanding of impact and ROI for the Dao.


Each NFT carries up to 3 Values, which stand for the animal´s unique characteristics. It is these traits that make each animal different from the other, thus making them valuable in their own way.

As a holder of the NFT you have access to the UNU DAO, giving you the power to CHANGE: change your life and the world as well.

By investing and voting within our community, you have a say over very impactful projects (Causes). So not only will your NFT win you money, but it will also help our earth and its own magical creatures.

We can´t wait to make a change alongside you!

Name: Tyonek Tribal Conservation District
Description: TYONEK TRIBAL CONSERVATION DISTRICT is a nonprofit organization addressing local conservation priorities within our 6.6M acre region.

Name: Mokoma Conservancy
Description: Mokoma Conservancy is a 501c3 non-profit established to preserve key watersheds in Sullivan County, PA. The Conservancy clears and maintains hiking trails, manages forestry projects, and hosts activities on over 380 acres. There are two main tracts of land - Conklin Run Wilderness and Elklick Run.

Name: Ohlenschlager & Rice
Description: Based in the Home Counties, and Calderdale, Yorkshire, we offer a range of services from restoration to conservation such as cleaning off surface dirt to repairing tears in your oil painting. Contact us to discuss your particular issue.

Name: BERKELEY COUNTY FARMLAND PROTECTION BOARD
Description: BERKELEY COUNTY FARMLAND PROTECTION BOARD is a government administration company based out of PO BOX 1243, MARTINSBURG, West Virginia, United States.

Name: Asociación de Organizaciones del Corredor Biologico Talamanca Caribe
Description: El Corredor Biológico Talamanca-Caribe (CBTC) es una iniciativa de conservación ubicada en el cantón de Talamanca, provincia de Limón, Costa Rica. Name: Zero Carbono
Description:
Nuestra misión es crear y desarrollar proyectos de certificación Basados en la Naturaleza que ofrezcan soluciones integrales y sostenibles que contribuyan a los objetivos de la acción climática. Brindamos asesoría experta, investigación avanzada y planificación estratégica para su desarrollo, facilitando alternativas a nuestros clientes que permitan optimizar el uso de recursos y reducir el impacto ambiental mediante la movilización de recursos en el mercado global de créditos de CO2, contribuyendo de esta manera en la protección y conservación de la biodiversidad de los ecosistemas y el desarrollo responsable de las comunidades locales.
Somos una consultora con presencia internacional comprometida con la sostenibilidad y la protección del medioambiente. Nos proyectamos como un referente global en la implementación de proyectos medioambientales sustentables que ofrezcan soluciones innovadoras promoviendo la conservación de la biodiversidad, el desarrollo sostenible de comunidades locales y la movilización de recursos provenientes del mercado internacional. Contamos con un equipo multidisciplinario altamente cualificado, con profesionales capacitados en diversas áreas, que mediante un trabajo colaborativo diseñarán y ejecutarán proyectos que maximicen la protección y conservación de los ecosistemas locales, minimice el impacto ambiental y fomenten la conservación responsable de los recursos naturales.

Name: The Horizon Foundation
Description: Our goal is to galvanize the philanthropic community to join our efforts to protect our land and water resources today, before they’re lost forever to subdivision, development, and other non-conservation uses. These grants will be available to support the robust land trust community, conservation non-profit organizations, and other entities working to protect our land and water resources.

Name: Ni Meraya

En el 2021, el Ministerio del Ambiente de Perú reconoció el Área de Conservación Privada Ni Meraya, ubicada en las orillas del río Amazonas en la Región de Loreto.

Reforestamos y conservamos el bosque, con atención a la recuperación y reintroducción de especies autóctonas – de flora y de fauna - en peligro de extinción. 

Trabajando en colaboración con otras Áreas de conservación privada, redes institucionales y otros partners promovemos prácticas y comportamientos responsables y nuevos modelos de desarrollo local.

Name: The Rooted Initiative
Description:
We believe that the greatest changes begin at the root.
In the soil where seeds are planted.
In the communities where voices are raised.
In the actions—small and large—that build into movements.

The Rooted Initiative was born to bridge the gap between purpose and action. Between businesses with resources and communities with solutions. Between promises of impact and the proof of transformation.

We are not another organization. We are a platform of connection.
We connect purpose-led businesses to community-driven programs—ensuring every partnership is transparent, accountable, and lasting.

We stand on four commitments:
	1.	Partnerships that matter – because no one can do this alone.
	2.	Transparency and accountability – because promises must become proof.
	3.	Education and empowerment – because knowledge multiplies impact.
	4.	People and planet at the center – because sustainability is rooted in both.

We know that the future will not be shaped by isolated acts, but by collective effort. Communities that work together thrive. Communities that don’t, risk not only their future, but the world’s.

This is our call:
To businesses, to changemakers, to dreamers and doers—
Root your purpose where it matters most.
In the soil. In the people. In tomorrow.

We are The Rooted Initiative. Together, we root change.

Name: Green Wolf

Nous leur offrons un lieu sûr, respectueux de leurs besoins, pour une vie digne et apaisée.

Notre mission s’articule autour de 3 axes :
• Protection animale : accueil, soins et mise à l’abri des animaux vulnérables
• Éducation : ateliers et animations autour de la biodiversité et du bien-être animal
• Préservation : sensibiliser à la faune locale et à la cohabitation responsable

En projet : un centre de soins pour la faune sauvage locale.

 Rejoignez notre meute engagée pour une cause juste, éthique et vivante.
#GreenWolfAssociation #RefugeAnimaux #SocialImpact

Name: Horny.Today
Description:
Yes, the name gets your attention, and that’s the point.

Horny.Today is a playful, tech-driven platform dedicated to celebrating and protecting endangered horned animals. We make conservation fun, engaging, and surprisingly personal.

Users can celebrate themselves by “blowing a horn,” get matched with a horned species, spotlight it, and support its survival through simple, meaningful actions.

Our mission is to turn awareness into joyful participation, because saving wildlife shouldn’t be boring.

Name: RACINES, pour se relier au vivant

Description: Lights Out CNY works across the Central New York region to reduce the danger of unnecessary artificial nighttime lighting for migratory birds through advocacy and public education. We envision a world where nocturnally migratory birds can safely migrate through our region under star-filled skies.

Name: SeaNTide
Description:
SeaNTide is a team united by the common goal of helping ocean contamination, preserving marine life and educating future generations on the impact we as humans have. Our mission stems from our connection and love for the sea, driven by the shared sense of responsibility to protect our earth, hence our slogan “Guardians of the Ocean”. 


We recognize that oceans are not just an inexhaustible resource, but are also vital for regulating climate and providing  50% of the oxygen we breathe, showing its importance not just to marine life but to every living creature on Earth. According to recent studies, an estimated 8 million tons of plastic enter our oceans every year, threatening marine ecosystems and wildlife. Water pollution has been getting increasingly worse in the last century due to fast and cheap methods of mass production of single-use goods that we dispose of without much thought. 

We observe this issue even in highly developed tourist destinations by the beach, such as the French Riviera. The area faces a significant threat to its ecosystems and biodiversity due to pollution. We aimed to make a tangible impact on ocean contamination and inspire others to join our cause. In the face of this urgent global challenge, only together, we can work towards a cleaner, healthier future for our planet and all its inhabitants. Recognizing this, our team acquired a proactive approach seeking both immediate results and long-term effects.

Name: GO Fomentando a Biodiversidade
Description:
"Fomentando a Biodiversidade: + Recursos Apícolas en Entornos Forestais" é un proxecto que avalía os recursos de polen que as abellas utilizan en zonas costeiras como eucaliptais e propón accións para incrementalos. 

Aumentar as fontes de polen mellora a saúde das abellas e doutros polinizadores -mariposas, escaravellos, aves-, favorece a diversidade xenética das plantas e fortalece os ecosistemas. O proxecto inclúe ensaios de campo en Marín, Poio e Pontevedra, análise do valor nutritivo do polen, seguimento das especies en flor e deseño dun programa para introducir plantas produtoras de polen de calidade.

En liña coa Axenda 2030 e as estratexias de conservación de polinizadores, os seus obxectivos son: aumentar especies produtoras de polen, mellorar a biodiversidade e apoiar a apicultura en áreas forestais, garantindo máis vida para todos os ecosistemas.

Name: Fare Elements
Description:
We’re trailblazing new paths to solve one of the most urgent and important challenges humans are facing—natural resource depletion. By catalyzing nature-aligned human-centric local economies, we create jobs and capital to care for natural resources for generations to come. We have already:

- Jumpstarted and generated millions of dollars for the local economies.
- Improved access to basic needs like clean water for hundreds of people.
- Restored critical ecosystems from watersheds to farmlands.

The world where people and planet thrive is possible.

Contrôle de conformité environnementale
Validation de données climat
Accompagnement à la stratégie carbone (en lien avec les objectifs ESG, CSRD, etc.)

 Notre mission :

Apporter clarté, rigueur et transparence dans la gestion des données environnementales, pour permettre à nos clients de bâtir une stratégie climatique crédible et conforme.

 Pourquoi choisir A2V ?

Indépendance & neutralité
Engagement pour l’exactitude technique
Réactivité et accompagnement personnalisé
Connaissance fine des enjeux règlementaires climat

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour échanger ! contact@a2vcarbon.com

Name: FUNDACIÓN ARTCOLÓGICO
Description:
La misión de Artcológico es evitar la progresión de la devastación forestal mediante la propuesta de forestación planificada desde un enfoque artístico (Land Art), contribuir a la conservación, manejo sostenible de los recursos naturales y del medio ambiente desde el altruismo, la solidaridad, la participación colectiva, servicio social y la administración de proyectos estratégicos de desarrollo ambiental. Así mismo concentrar mediante el uso de criterios policromáticos, así como la incorporación de elementos plásticos tales como el equilibrio, escala, proporción, simetría, asimetría, variedad, ritmo, contraste y dominio, que no solo embellecerían el espacio físico de una zona afectada por la deforestación, sino que se busca devolver el equilibrio a los espacios explotados por la industria, reducir el aumento de las temperaturas, impedir la expansión de asentamientos desmesuradas, combatir el efecto invernadero y crear nuevos espacios con el fin de culturizar de manera artística y ecológica la conciencia del colectivo.

VISIÓN
Artcológico a través de sus proyectos para los años por venir consolide la relación hombre – naturaleza, recursos sostenibles, conservación del medio ambiente, mitigar el cambio climático,  incorporación de nuevos hábitats desde la forestación y reforestación planificada, regeneración de bosques, sostenibilidad ambiental en pro a los beneficios de los ciudadanos y mejor calidad de vida.

VALORES
Promover los valores ecológicos los cuales deben ser parte de la conducta racional del hombre dentro de su entorno ambiental, teniendo en cuenta una ética de conservación, conciencia para amar, conducta para cuidar.

Name: Inuvialuit Game Council
Description:
As an Inuvialuit Board, Inuvialuit Game Council (IGC) plays a vital role in the co-management system. Under the IFA, the IGC represents the collective Inuvialuit interest in all matters pertaining to the management of wildlife and wildlife habitat in the ISR. This responsibility gives the IGC authority for matters related to harvesting rights, renewable resource management, and conservation.

The specific duties of the IGC are set out in Section 14(74) of the IFA. These duties include appointing Inuvialuit members for all Inuvialuit co-management bodies under the IFA and assisting these bodies whenever requested, advising government agencies, through the co-management bodies or otherwise, on renewable resource policy, legislation, regulation, and on any proposed Canadian position for international purposes that affects wildlife in the ISR. The IGC also allocates Inuvialuit quotas among the six ISR communities and appoints members for any co-management body dealing with Inuvialuit fish and wildlife harvesting and environment.

The IGC is comprised of a chair and two representatives appointed by Hunters and Trappers Committee (HTC) in each of the six ISR communities which are Aklavik, Inuvik, Ulukhaktok, Paulatuk, Sachs Harbour, and Tuktoyaktuk. The Chair can be from any of the six communities and is elected by all 42 HTC Directors.

Name: Umigomi Enrichment Project
Description:
Our story began when two former zoo keepers, driven by a shared passion for animal welfare and conservation, relocated to Japan after one began a new career with the U.S. Air Force. Heartbroken by the amount of coastal pollution, they saw an opportunity to make a difference. What started as a simple effort to clean beaches in Aomori Prefecture soon evolved into transforming discarded fishing gear into enrichment tools for animals in human care.

From those early days on Japan’s coastline, our grassroots project has grown into a U.S.-based 501(c)(3) nonprofit with a global mission: improving animal welfare, reducing ocean pollution, and inspiring communities to care for the planet.

We work with local organizations and youth to take hands-on action for the environment, transforming derelict fishing gear into enrichment tools that improve the lives of animals in human care and promote ocean conservation worldwide.

Through partnerships with groups like the Girl Scouts, we’ve removed thousands of pounds of plastic waste from the beaches of Northern Honshu and repurposed it into enrichment devices used by zoos, wildlife rescues, and animal care facilities across the United States.

Our work has helped to enhance the welfare of species such as alligators, otters, snow leopards, bears, zebras, flamingos, lemurs, domestic dogs, and so many more.

We’re always looking to collaborate with organizations, educators, and animal care professionals who share our commitment to sustainability and compassion.

Name: REFO
Description:
A REFO é uma plataforma digital criada para impulsionar a conservação ambiental por meio da arrecadação transparente de fundos e do monitoramento espacial dos resultados. Nosso objetivo é transformar cada contribuição em impacto ambiental mensurável, conectando pessoas, empresas e comunidades em torno de projetos de reflorestamento, preservação de ecossistemas e desenvolvimento sustentável local.

 Transparência e rastreabilidade são a espinha dorsal da REFO: cada recurso destinado é associado a benefícios tangíveis, com demonstração espacial do progresso dos projetos, fortalecendo a confiança e o engajamento dos doadores.

 Priorizamos a eficiência na conversão de recursos em conservação, reduzindo intermediários, otimizando a execução e maximizando o impacto ambiental positivo.

 Nossa abordagem peer-to-peer permite participação ativa: investidores escolhem diretamente os projetos a apoiar, enquanto proprietários de terras recebem suporte financeiro para conservar e restaurar áreas estratégicas.

 Além de conservar a natureza, a REFO promove o desenvolvimento socioeconômico local, integrando práticas sustentáveis que geram empregos, fortalecem a produção regional e estimulam educação ambiental.

Name: Conserve
Description:
Water Conservation Specialist LTD ( Conserve ) was formed in 1996 in order to establish a water management company which was responsive to the specific needs of the residential multi-family rental industry. Existing water conservation equipment was not capable of meeting the varying water pressure conditions existing at different properties, and within each property. Water conservation companies did not provide on-going support services which are necessary in order to maintain the reduced water consumption on a long term basis. The Conserve Program was designed to address these issues so that communities could rely upon the lowest possible water consumption on a daily basis.	 
 	 	 	 
 	The Conserve staff has extensive property management experience and practices hands-on water management for each property according to their specific needs. The combination of the Conserve patented equipment and the ongoing support services forms the perfect synergy between high-technology and world class customer service.
The Conserve Program provides up to 7 of the 14 water conservation points required for LEED Certification.

You have nothing to lose and NOI to gain by implementing the Conserve Program. Join forces with our water management team and obtain the most comprehensive, technically advanced, water conservation program.

Name: Conservation Impact Consulting
Description:
We help NGOs, foundations, and philanthropists maximize the impact of their conservation initiatives through the application of a robust Return on Investment approach.

Our core focus is providing rigorous Return on Investment (ROI) measurement services for conservation initiatives, with our flagship offering being the comprehensive Conservation ROI Assessment. This assessment involves a detailed analysis of costs and impacts, consolidating them into a clear, understandable metric. 

Beyond our core service, we offer standalone options such as Impact Evaluation, Risk and Uncertainty Analysis, Program Design, and Strategic Planning. We aim to be your trusted partner in maximizing the impact of conservation investments, whether you need a comprehensive assessment or tailored services to achieve your conservation goals.

Name: Vestigium Consultores SAS
Description: Somos una firma colombiana de consultoría para la gestión de políticas, estrategias, planes, programas y proyectos de carácter social relacionados con la protección, reparación y recuperación del medio ambiente, a través de acciones relacionadas con seguridad alimentaria, construcción de infraestructura sustentable, tratamiento y recuperación de aguas y proyectos educativos que conlleven al beneficio de las comunidades.

Name: VIDED - Vision pour le Développement Durable
Description: L'Association VIDED  est un cadre pour l'action, créée dans le but de promouvoir et mettre en œuvre le Développement Durable en Afrique et dans le Monde, ceci conformément aux agenda 21 et 2030 des Nations Unies et l'Agenda 2063 de L'Union Africaine.

Name: NARETO CONSERVANCY ORGANIZATION
Description:
We are honored to serve as a conservationist at Nareto Conservancy, located in the breathtaking Laikipia North region of Kenya. Our mission is to preserve and protect the unique and diverse wildlife that calls this area home, while also empowering the local communities who share this land.

At Nareto Conservancy, we understand that conservation is not just about protecting animals and their habitats, but also about working hand-in-hand with the people who live in these areas. That's why we are committed to implementing sustainable practices and initiatives that benefit both the environment and the community.

Through our programs, we aim to promote conservation education and awareness, as well as provide economic opportunities for local communities. We believe that by empowering people to become stewards of the land, we can create a brighter future for both wildlife and people.

Some of the initiatives we have implemented include community-based wildlife conservation programs, sustainable agriculture projects, and eco-tourism ventures. These programs not only provide economic benefits to the community, but also help to reduce human-wildlife conflict and promote conservation awareness.

As a conservationist at Nareto Conservancy, I am proud to be a part of this important work. I am committed to making a positive impact on the environment and improving the lives of those around me. I am passionate about conservation and the role it plays in preserving the natural world for future generations.

Join us in supporting Nareto Conservancy and the important work we do in wildlife conservation and community empowerment. Together, we can make a difference in the world.

Name: Ullswater Countryside Management
Description:
Ullswater Countryside Management specialises in traditional Countryside Management, Conservation Projects and Estate Works, working for both commercial and domestic customers.



We are passionate about the Lake District Landscape and want to support you on the delivery of those landscapes and your conservation projects. If you need trees planting, are looking at beck rewriggling, plug planting or hedge laying please do get in touch and we can talk about any up and coming projects. 



We are experienced in all areas of countryside management from countryside furniture installation, dry stone walling, drainage, pathworks and fencing. 



We take pride in the work we do and are passionate about completing each job to the highest standard.

Name: Return to Vital Roots
Description:
Return to Vital Roots is a nonprofit dedicated to restoring balance between people, animals, and the planet. Based in New Albany, Indiana, we focus on conservation, permaculture, and sustainable living to create a world where humans and nature thrive together.

Through education, ecological restoration, and community engagement, we empower individuals to adopt sustainable practices that protect wildlife, regenerate ecosystems, and promote holistic well-being.

 Our initiatives include:
 Permaculture Education – Teaching regenerative agriculture and self-sustaining ecosystems.
 Animal Conservation – Protecting habitats and fostering human-animal coexistence.
 Sustainable Living – Encouraging eco-friendly choices for a healthier planet.
 Community Projects – Connecting people with hands-on conservation efforts.

Join us in nurturing a future where nature and humanity coexist in harmony.

Name: Lëpigames
Description:
Cachañando, una herramienta lúdica que busca acercar el conocimiento sobre las aves a todo tipo de público a través del juego, el asombro y la participación activa. Combino ciencia, creatividad y educación para generar experiencias significativas que conectan a las personas con la biodiversidad.
Nuestro objetivo es seguir creciendo en áreas vinculadas a proyectos de conservación, educación ambiental, aventurismo y experiencias formativas que involucren a comunidades. 

Estamos abiertos a colaborar en iniciativas educativas, científicas o recreativas relacionadas con la naturaleza y la sostenibilidad.

Name: Green Africa Arts Conservation (GAAC)
Description:
Green Africa Arts conservation (GAAc) — Produits & Services

GAAc développe des solutions intégrées pour la conservation de la biodiversité, la restauration des paysages et la valorisation des savoirs locaux.

1. Études & Données écologiques

Inventaires de biodiversité, EIES, suivis écologiques, cartographie SIG et diagnostics environnementaux pour ONG, institutions et projets de développement.

2. Plants agroforestiers & fruitiers

Production de plants de qualité pour le reboisement, l’agroforesterie et la restauration des écosystèmes, avec appui technique et suivi terrain.

3. Produits agro-transformés

Valorisation de filières locales (café, fruits, produits agroécologiques), en appui aux coopératives communautaires et aux initiatives féminines.

4. Art traditionnel & design éthique

Création, exposition et exportation d’œuvres inspirées de la culture et de la nature locales, soutenant les artisans et les programmes de restauration.

5. Formations & renforcement de capacités

Ateliers pratiques et modules techniques en agroforesterie, conservation, restauration, entrepreneuriat communautaire et art traditionnel.

6. Consulting & appui institutionnel

Accompagnement des ONG, institutions et coopératives : conception de projets, business plans verts, études de faisabilité, gestion de données et suivi-évaluation.

Name: Viridescence
Description:
Welcome to Viridescence a source for ideas, processes, and products to help you reduce your carbon footprint. I want to help you take steps toward reducing carbon emissions, conserving natural resources, and being aware of how your actions affect the health of the environment.

Amy Bradley created Viridescence to inspire others to consider the environmental impact of their actions and to improve their relationship with nature. Each individual action, although small and seemingly insignificant, contributes to the overall health and productivity of our natural resources.

Viridescence: the quality of being green!

Name: Turkey Creek Conservation District
Description: The Turkey Creek Conservation District was organized under the Colorado Soil Conservation Act of 1937 (Colorado Revised Statutes, Title 35, Article 70) by a referendum of landowners on May 17, 1943. All incorporated municipalities and areas devoted excessively to commercial or industrial. The District’s function is to make available technical, financial, and educational resources, whatever their source, and focus and/or coordinate them so that they meet the needs of the local land manager in regards to the conservation of soil, water and related natural resources.

Name: serangga.id
Description: Serangga.id akan berusaha membuat anda memiliki gambaran sederhana tentang serangga hutan dan petualangan di alam liar yang mungkin tidak pernah anda lihat sebelumnya. Mengenali mereka lebih dekat dan mungkin akan merubah sudut pandang anda tentang serangga.

Name: For Nature
Description:
For Nature is about empowering people to make change … for nature. We use our sectoral leadership and expertise in strategy, project management, policy and partnerships, to provide support and capacity to individuals and groups of people to conserve places and species. We support government, civil society and
businesses that are value aligned.

Description:

| Conheça a Biodiversidade das Restingas da BA, do ES e do RJ.

Name: Sierra Club New Hampshire Chapter
Archelon Research Foundation
Description: We are a nonprofit organization that is dedicated to marine conservation through sea turtle research, outreach, and world-wide scientific communication. We aim to be a resource for other conservation focused nonprofits and continue sea turtle conservation and research efforts through new and innovative approaches.

Name: White River Fish Sanctuary
Description:
The White River Fish Sanctuary provides a haven for fish and marine life in a 150-hectare "no-take" zone. The White River Fish Sanctuary (WRFS) is committed to honouring the responsibility we have, to care for aquatic life. Whether it’s through reef restoration, public education or holding those who harm the environment accountable - we are dedicated to change. 

What started as a collaboration between hoteliers, activists, and local fishermen has transformed into a community of passionate individuals dedicated to preserving our aquatic environment. These waters stretch from Prospect Plantation in St. Mary to Carib/Hermosa Cove in Ocho Rios, St. Ann, providing a secure habitat for marine life to thrive.

Our motto, "Protect-Restore-Engage": is all about taking action to restore and protect the marine ecosystem of the White River, both on land and sea. We're dedicated to making a real difference and preserving our sea for the future.

CONCTACT: wrmajamaica@gmail.com

Name: Fundación Code100
Description:
Fundación Code100 apunta hacia una era digital más sostenible, donde la reducción del uso de papel es una prioridad. 
Nuestro compromiso con la conservación del medio ambiente se une a nuestro apoyo integral a niños desfavorecidos. A través de iniciativas innovadoras, promovemos prácticas que minimizan el uso de papel y fomentamos alternativas digitales, contribuyendo así a la preservación de recursos naturales y a la construcción de comunidades más eco-conscientes.

Name: RTA Restoration
Description:
Our mission is to target and restore degraded landscapes at scale, increase career opportunities in conservation, and reconnect a broader audience with nature. 

We fund our nature restoration with private investment through the provision of biodiversity units, using the Biodiversity Net Gain (BNG) framework.

Name: BDA-Biodiversidad y Desarrollo Amazónico
Description: Somos una organización civil sin fines de lucro, sumando esfuerzos para conservar biodiversidad como fuente de bienestar humano, generando oportunidades eco amigables, revalorando pilares culturales, contribuyendo a la sostenibilidad de nuestra amazonía

Name: Pitangus
Description: O Brasil é o país com maior potencial de impacto e desenvolvimento sustentável no mundo, porém ainda é marcado pela degradação e destruição. Visando isso, o Pitangus visa multiplicar, potencializar e integrar iniciativas sustentáveis no país, gerando sustentabilidade na prática e refletindo no impacto real.

Name: The Wildlife Project
Description: The Wildlife Project is on a mission to restore desolate lands and rebuild vital connections between wildlife, ecosystems, and humanity. By transforming barren spaces into thriving habitats, we create sanctuaries where animals can return, ecosystems can flourish, and people can rediscover their bond with the natural world. Every action we take is rooted in hope, healing, and the belief that even the most damaged land can come back to life.

Name: Whispering Hills natural green cemetery AND memorial nature preserve
Description: A Natural Green Cemetery located within a peaceful nature preserve of streams, rock outcroppings, and native plant life

Name: Wild Wave Lab
Description: Lab voltado a produção de músicas

Name: VertLaVie
Description:
VertLaVie est un écosystème Franco-Québécois unique dédié à la promotion d'un mode de vie et de consommation plus conscient. 
Nous combinons: 
- VertLaVie.org - Mouvement éco-responsable (des astuces, des défis, des concours, des entrevues "nouveau genre", et bien plus...)
- VertLaVie.com - Boutique éthique avec des produits locaux durables et économiques.
VertLaVie n'est pas juste un autre blog écolo, ni une ONG classique, mais un mouvement facilitateur et une communauté pour rendre la transition écologique positive, ludique et concrète au quotidien, avec des solutions à portée de main.

Name: Spot a Shark
Description:
A citizen science program that collects and analyses photos of Grey Nurse Sharks from divers to support vital research, raise awareness and increase conservation efforts to protect this shark species.

For each shark photograph, the Spot a Shark team perform spot mapping techniques and use sophisticated software (hosted by Sharkbook) to determine which individual shark was sighted.

Identifying individual Grey Nurse sharks helps track shark movement, monitor overall health of the population, and helps monitor behaviour and changes at local aggregation sites over time. This information is used by Spot a Shark researchers, as well as international partners, to facilitate management decisions aimed towards conserving our Critically Endangered population of Grey Nurse sharks. By supporting this project, you are helping researchers gather valuable data, which may help provide long-term protection for the Grey Nurse sharks and their habitats

Name: Tamahunga Trappers Inc. Society
Description:
In 2010 a community volunteer-based conservation group, now known as the Tamahunga Trappers, was formed with the intention of restoring the mauri of Tamahunga.  

A shared vision brings unity and clarity of purpose to a group of people working towards a particular set of goals: To protect, enhance, restore and advocate for the biodiversity values and environmental benefits provided by Tamahunga, to facilitate natural recolonisation and reintroduction of rare and threatened species and to engage the local community in the active restoration of this forest ecosystem.

The Tamahunga forest is a significant local landmark in the North Auckland Region. It is a critical cultural site for Ngāti Manuhiri, harbours high biodiversity values, including locally rare and threatened species, and forms the upper catchment for several important waterways. 

The forest currently comprises a matrix of protected land in the Tamahunga Ecological Reserve, Ngāti Manuhiri Scientific Reserve, private conservation covenant and other privately owned lands.  Over several decades land has been legally protected and reserved, extensive fencing has been undertaken to exclude stock, goats have been eradicated and possums have been controlled to low densities.

Name: Grow Tomorrow
Description:
Grow Tomorrow wants to fight climate change with you. We help you do something about climate change with trackable, sustainable, and transparent carbon credits. Becoming carbon neutral is achievable!

Our mission is to offset 250 million US tons of CO2 and build a brighter tomorrow for our world. 

As consumers continue to become more ecologically conscious, offsetting your business’ carbon footprint can be both good for the environment and good for your bottom line.

Reduce your carbon footprint with the help of Grow Tomorrow. Purchase carbon credits that fit your business situation.

Each business purchase also includes additional benefits.  There is a separate portal that provides detailed tracking for regulatory compliance along with detailed tracking of each purchase to the exact project the funds are applied.  Our Carbon Offset Technology ensures that every dollar is matched accurately with the project you select and that there is traceability.

Learn more about our business programs by visiting our business page: https://grow-tomorrow.com/business-shop/

If you prefer an extensive audit of your business’ carbon footprint please message us for more information.

Name: Louisa County Conservation Board
Description: Louisa County Conservation Board is a local government agency based out of 12635 County Road G56, Suite 101, Wapello, Iowa, United States.

Name: Youth Marine Action
Description: YOMATION is an online community that voices concern for the ocean through the media. YOMATION was founded on December 5 2021, starting from the founder's concern for the sea. With the support of all the youth involved, YOMATION can be more advanced and better in continuing to speak out for the good of the sea.
