Name: Nature's Burial
Description:
Nature’s Burial creates meaningful final resting places that actively restore and protect the land.

As Texas’ first certified conservation cemetery, we offer an alternative to traditional burial practices. Each burial at the Blazing Star Sanctuary, located within the the Katy Prairie Preserve, a vast conservation landscape the size of 13 Memorial Parks, helps steward the prairie by sustaining native wildflowers, grasses, and wildlife habitat.

Nature’s Burial is wholly owned by the Coastal Prairie Conservancy, a nonprofit organization dedicated to preserving prairies, wetlands, farms, and ranches across southeast Texas. All proceeds are reinvested to conserve and manage these natural landscapes, ensuring they are protected forever.

Through our work, families can honor their loved ones while making a lasting, positive impact on the environment and the future of Texas’ wild spaces.

Name: Aquaterre
Description:
L'association Aquaterre a pour but d'œuvrer pour l'intérêt général. Actuellement elle a pour objet la renaturation des abeilles à travers le projet Apiterre. Ce projet consiste à développer un réseau de ruches mères et de pouponnières dans le Grand Est, dans le but d’enrichir la biodiversité et de sauvegarder l’abeille aujourd’hui menacée. 
Dans ce contexte, nous installons des ruches chez des entreprises, des associations, des collectivités et des particuliers. Un suivi régulier par est mis en œuvre afin de garantir le bon fonctionnement des ruches et leur bonne santé. Nous fournissons également tout le matériel nécessaire. 

Notre but n’est pas la production de miel, mais bien le développement d’une abeille plus résistante aux maladies et aux parasites. 

Nous sommes constamment à la recherche de nouveaux parrains afin de préserver et renforcer la diversité génétique des abeilles à travers toute l’Alsace et la Lorraine.

Name: Margay - Reserva Natural & Lodge de Selva - Misiones
Blue Roots Carbon
Description: Coastal habitats offer essential ecosystem services globally, of which are heavily relied on by not only dependent marine species, but also coastal communities. These habitats offer vital breeding grounds and nurseries for species, mitigate against erosion, offer shoreline stability, flood control, storm protection, filtration of pollutants and creation of aquaculture sites to name a few services of many. One service, arguably of which is most important in today’s climate, is carbon sequestration. Coastal ecosystems are amongst the most effective carbon sequesters globally, more specifically – mangrove forests.

Name: South Okanagan Similkameen Conservation Program
Description:
South Okanagan Similkameen Conservation Program (SOSCP) is a partnership initiative that brings together a wide array of government and non-government organizations, indigenous cultural and academic institutions and others under one umbrella to conserve the region’s unique species and spaces. Founded in the year 2000, there are now fifty SOSCP partners working collectively to conserve nature in one of the most biologically diverse and at-risk areas of Canada.

SOSCP functions to coordinate and facilitate the work of the partners, to improve the effectiveness of their conservation efforts, to deliver key conservation priorities, and to raise the profile for conservation in the region.

Name: Third Switch, LLC.
Description:
Third Switch builds programs, tools, and experiences that connect people, technology, and measurable impact. We help organizations activate the human layer of energy performance, turning insight into action and sustainability goals into operational reality.

Our approach is grounded in the F.U.S.E. Framework: Frontline Utility Systems Engagement. This system enhances workplace culture through our unique learning and engagement methodology, while leveraging that culture to achieve verifiable energy & cost savings. Simply put: we help companies close the “last mile” between analytics and action.

Our flagship product, Deepwalk, is an immersive, team-based energy audit that uncovers the hidden savings potential in everyday operations. Each engagement produces a visual findings report that connects human behavior to measurable results, complete with ROI modeling, utility alignment, and Strategic Energy Management documentation.

Outside Technique, our design philosophy, ensures that every program we build helps people see their impact and opportunities in a radically new light. By combining storytelling, visualization, and feedback, we make energy performance tangible, teachable, and scalable.

Founded by certified energy and carbon management professionals, Third Switch operates at the intersection of design, technology, and strategy. We empower organizations to measure, manage, and scale meaningful change.

Our goal is a world where conservation and corporate collaboration actively lead us towards a better, more sustainable future for everyone.

Name: Lestarian
Description:
Pejuang Pelestarian Alam Lestarian is a non-profit youth organization. Lestarian fights to defend animal rights through campaigns and real actions that have a direct impact on animal rights. Lestarian works to directly impact change for equal rights between humans and wildlife. The current problem is the rise of "torture" in the form of trading in organs and individuals as well as keeping animals that do not comply with animal welfare principles.

Lestarian also collaborates with various parties, including governments, universities, non-governmental organizations, student organizations, and local communities, to ensure effective protection of wildlife. This program includes various activities such as surveillance monitoring, youth capacity building, and public campaigns to reduce demand for wildlife products. With this comprehensive approach, Lestarian hopes to create a more equitable and sustainable environment for humans and wildlife.

Name: Miss Earth Kenya

Name: Common Limits
Description:
Common Limits is an independent NGO that advocates for planetary and social limits to be used as a reference framework for planning a just transition. Our goal is to make this framework a compass to guide public policy, businesses and citizens towards a prosperous and sustainable world.

Common Limits was born out of a meeting between researchers and activists who share the same conviction: the current prism for thinking about transition – based on sustainable development and green growth, and with an almost exclusive focus on climate – is leading us to failure. 

Only a systemic vision (integrating ecological and social issues and taking into account the physical limits of our planet) can lead us towards the radical transformation needed to build a fair and sustainable world.

Our mission: to change the framework in order to change course. 
The current political and economic framework is leading us straight into a brick wall. There is an urgent need to adopt a systemic framework at international, national and regional levels that is based on the physical limits of the planet and promotes social and decolonial justice.

Official launch coming soon! In the meantime, feel free to subscribe or contact us to stay up to date with our latest news.

---

 Common Limits est une ONG indépendante qui milite pour faire des limites planétaires et sociales le cadre de référence pour planifier une transition juste. Notre objectif : faire de ce cadre une boussole pour guider les politiques publiques, les entreprises et les citoyens vers un monde prospère et soutenable.

Lancement officiel à venir ! En attendant, n'hésitez pas à vous abonner ou à nous contacter pour être tenu au courant de nos premières actualités.

Name: Fundación Frente de RIO
Description:
Somos una organización comunitaria sin fines de lucro que desde 2018 trabaja por la restauración ecológica y cultural del río Mapocho en la comuna de Talagante. A través de limpiezas, reforestación con especies nativas, educación ambiental y la creación del Sendero Ecológico Humedal Urbano, buscamos regenerar un ecosistema degradado y devolver el río a la memoria colectiva de sus habitantes.

Hemos sido reconocidos con el Premio del Agua 2025 en la categoría Proyecto Ciudadano (Expo Agua Santiago) y fuimos ganadores del Fondo Común Regenerativo 2023 de Fundación Lepe. 

Nuestro propósito es construir, junto a la comunidad, un Parque Natural del Río Mapocho, demostrando que la regeneración ecosocial es posible cuando vecinos, organizaciones y autoridades se unen.

Name: OceanConnect
Description:
OceanConnect is an innovative online platform dedicated to fostering collaboration, knowledge sharing, and information exchange among stakeholders engaged in the sustainable development of Zanzibar's blue economy. Our primary focus encompasses five key sectors: Oil and Gas, Fisheries, Aquaculture and Marine Resources, Transport and Transportation, Tourism, and Conservation. By uniting stakeholders and promoting sustainable practices in these sectors, OceanConnect seeks to drive positive change, enhance socio-economic development, and ensure a thriving future for Zanzibar's blue economy.

Key Features:

1. Comprehensive Knowledge Repository:
OceanConnect houses a wealth of valuable resources and research findings on sustainable practices, empowering stakeholders with vital insights and information.

2. Generative AI Chat:
Through the platform's Generative AI Assistant, users can engage in informative interactions, seeking deeper understanding on ocean preservation and the Blue Economy.

3. Showcasing Success Stories:
OceanConnect highlights inspiring projects and initiatives that contribute to sustainable growth, motivating others to adopt similar strategies and achieve positive outcomes.

4. Virtual Events and Webinars:
The platform hosts dynamic virtual events and webinars, fostering capacity-building, training, and awareness-raising activities within the blue economy sectors.

5. Funding Information:
OceanConnect offers a dedicated section providing comprehensive information on funding opportunities and investment options, supporting projects aligned with sustainable development goals.

By connecting stakeholders, sharing knowledge, and promoting best practices, we envision a brighter future for Zanzibar's coastal communities and the marine ecosystem. Together, let us seize this opportunity to create positive change and ensure a thriving blue economy that benefits both the environment and society.

Unsere Gemeinde Pfaffen-Schwabenheim wird geprägt von Monokultur. Große Ackerflächen und Weinberge lassen nur wenig Raum für Biotope, die die Lebensgrundlage aller Tiere sind. Daher ist es äußerst wichtig, diese Naturgelände zu schützen oder neue entstehen zu lassen.

Um besonders jungen Menschen wieder näher an die Natur zu bringen, möchten wir mithilfe der Gemeinde einen Naturerlebnispfad schaffen, der sich von der Ausgleichsfläche, um den Grillplatz, entlang des Appelbaches bis zur Nabu-Wiese erstreckt. Auch zwei Feuchtgebiete sollen entstehen, die Heimat für unsere bedrohten Amphibien werden sollen.

Helft mit bei der wichtigen Aufgabe, unsere Natur zu schützen und zu bewahren.

Wir leben mit ihr. Wir leben in ihr. Wir leben von ihr.

GreenHub is more than a movement; it's a dynamic force dedicated to cultivating sustainability and fostering a global community committed to environmental well-being. Rooted in the belief that individual actions collectively shape our planet's future, GreenHub provides a vibrant platform for like-minded individuals, communities, and organizations to connect, collaborate, and take meaningful actions toward a greener, more sustainable world.

Our mission transcends borders, inspiring and empowering individuals to adopt eco-conscious practices in their daily lives. From promoting sustainable living tips to facilitating collective initiatives, GreenHub is a catalyst for positive change. We envision a future where every small action contributes to a healthier and more resilient planet.

Join us in this journey of nurturing nature and connecting lives. GreenHub is where conscious choices become a way of life, and together, we strive for a sustainable tomorrow.

Name: Riverdale Rewild Farm
Description:
Riverdale Rewild Farm is a working native seed farm on Peramangk Country, dedicated to restoring nature at scale across South Australia.

We grow and collect native grasses, wildflowers and threatened species to supply seed for large-scale ecological restoration projects across the state. In with conservation allies, we’re helping bring biodiversity back to degraded landscapes—one species, one paddock, one project at a time.

But we're more than a farm. We're a place of learning, connection and action. Through seasonal workshops, volunteer days, and community-led restoration efforts, we’re growing not just plants, but people—sharing the skills, stories and science needed to rewild land and life.

Riverdale Rewild Farm is part of a movement to regenerate ecosystems, restore cultural connection, and create a wilder, more resilient future for all.

Name: Association de Défense du Plateau de Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine
Description:
L’Association de Défense du Plateau de Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine a pour objet de protéger et défendre l’environnement, ainsi que de préserver les espaces naturels, le patrimoine bâti et la qualité des paysages en Indre-et-Loire.

Elle œuvre à :
• Protéger l’environnement, la flore, la faune, les paysages et le patrimoine culturel,
• Préserver le cadre de vie, la santé et la sécurité des habitants,
• S’opposer aux atteintes environnementales et paysagères (éoliennes industrielles, grands parcs photovoltaïques, projets d’industrialisation ou de lotissement massif).

Enfin, elle veille à défendre la propriété et l’intérêt collectif, et à promouvoir un aménagement du territoire respectueux de l’identité rurale et paysagère de la Touraine pour les générations futures.

___________________________________

L'association s’est constitué pour s’opposer à l’implantation d’un immense parc photovoltaïque industriel sur les terres agricoles de La Boisselière, à Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine.

Pourquoi nous sommes contre ?
• Parce que ce projet artificialiserait des sols fertiles,
• Parce qu’il créerait un paysage rasé et clôturé, sans vie ni biodiversité, stérilisé pour des décennies.
• Parce qu’il est porté par un géant allemand de l’extraction de charbon, sans réelle retombée locale ni bénéfice agricole.
• Parce qu’il sacrifierait l’identité rurale et paysagère de notre territoire, déjà saturé par les infrastructures (A10, LGV, lignes à haute tension)

Notre vision
 Défendre un modèle de transition énergétique respectueuse des terres et des habitants, qui privilégie la réparation des friches et des zones dégradées, et non la destruction de terres agricoles vivantes.

Name: Noctua Écologue Conseil
Description:
Jeune structure indépendante spécialisée dans les expertises naturalistes techniques, Noctua Écologue Conseil intervient sur la moitié sud de la France pour accompagner les projets les plus exigeants en écologie appliquée.

Son cœur de métier : la réalisation d’études ciblées sur des espèces discrètes et difficiles à évaluer, notamment les petites chouettes de montagne, les galliformes et l’avifaune en général, dans des milieux naturels complexes ou peu explorés.

L’entreprise propose également des diagnostics environnementaux complets, des expertises dans le cadre de la séquence ERC, des inventaires naturalistes approfondis (IPA, études de densité, suivis spécifiques), ainsi qu’un appui scientifique et cartographique pour les structures en recherche de renfort de terrain.

Noctua Écologue Conseil, c’est une écologie de terrain rigoureuse, au service des espèces sensibles et des décisions éclairées.

Name: Sea Turtle Observatory
Description:
The Sea Turtle Observatory (STO) is a national-scale citizen science project, launched in February 2024 to support the long-term, non-invasive monitoring of all six sea turtle species across Australian waters, nesting beaches, and external territories using photographic identification (Photo-ID).

Photo-ID offers a reliable, non-invasive method for the capture-mark-recapture of individual sea turtles and can complement existing techniques such as flipper tagging, PIT tagging, and satellite tracking.

As you may know, all sea turtle species have generally stable physical features that enable us to identify each individual. For hard shell sea turtles these features are the facial patterns on the left, right and top sides of the head and the patterns on their flippers. For Leatherback Sea Turtles it is the Pineal Spot (the large white-pink spot) on top of their head.

Using images and videos which are submitted by citizen scientists that clearly show the facial patterns, along with metadata (i.e date, time, location, depth and behavioural notes) we will be able to build a comprehensive database of individual sea turtles from around Australia which I then aim to use to assist with shedding light on sea turtle populations, behaviour, distribution, migration, health, demographics and habitat use and preferences to help fill knowledge gaps and inform conservation strategies effectively.

Name: Arbeitsgemeinschaft Fledermausschutz Baden-Württemberg e.V.
Description:
In der Arbeitsgemeinschaft Fledermausschutz Baden-Württemberg (AGF) haben sich viele im Umwelt- und Naturschutz tätige Vereinigungen und Personen zusammengeschlossen. Unser Ziel ist es die Fledermausbestände im Land zu stabilisieren und gezielt zu verbessern.

Die AGF arbeitet eng mit Behörden, anderen Umweltverbänden (NABU, BUND u.a.) und Organisationen im Bereich Umwelt- und Naturschutz zusammen.

Die AGF hat seit 1981 zwei landesweite Kartierungen der Fledermäuse Baden-Württembergs durchgeführt und veröffentlicht. Sie sind eine wichtige Grundlage für die Durchführung geeigneter Schutzmaßnahmen. Außerdem erscheint einmal jährlich die Vereinszeitschrift > DER FLATTERMANN. Der Flattermann enthält Kurzfassungen der Vorträge der jährlichen Mitgliederversammlung, Berichte und Besprechungen von neuen Publikationen im Bereich der Fledermausforschung, Mitteilungen über wichtige Ereignisse sowie über neue Ideen und Projekte in Sachen Fledermausschutz.

Name: Los Cedros Fund
Description:
Thanks to the dedicated work of the Los Cedros Scientific Station in the Ecuadorian Tropical Andes, artists, educators, and researchers have been connecting with and learning from the Los Cedros cloud forest for decades. One of the rare places left where humans can drink straight from the streams, Los Cedros protects numerous watersheds crucial to downstream communities. 

Honoring all who've protected the forest for decades, the Los Cedros Fund aims to offer a new watershed of perennial support to the cloud forest and surrounding communities to keep artistic, educational, and scientific collaborations flowing.

ESPAÑOL

Gracias al trabajo dedicado de la Estación Científica Los Cedros en los Andes Tropicales Ecuatorianos, artistas y educadores e investigadores se han estado conectando y aprendiendo del bosqe nublado de Los Cedros durante décadas. Los Cedros, uno de los pocos lugares que quedan donde los humanos pueden beber directamente de los arroyos, protege numerosas cuencas cruciales para las comunidades río abajo.

Honramos a todos los que han protegido el bosque durante décadas. El Fondo Los Cedros tiene como objetivo ofrecer una nueva cuenca de apoyo perenne al bosque nublado y las comunidades do los alrededores para mantener fluidas las colaboraciones artísticas, educativas, y científicas.

Name: Carbonatto
Description:
A Carbonatto nasceu com o propósito de tornar a alimentação saudável e sustentável uma realidade acessível para todos. Acreditamos que pequenas escolhas conscientes, como incluir microverdes na sua rotina, podem gerar grandes transformações no mundo e na sua saúde.

Nossa história começou com o desejo de facilitar o acesso a iniciativas ambientais — e hoje, evoluímos para cultivar vida, sabor e responsabilidade. Produzimos microverdes com práticas sustentáveis, sem agrotóxicos, com uso eficiente da água e embalagens ecológicas. Tudo isso de forma local, prática e transparente.

Sabemos que o futuro do planeta depende das nossas ações no presente. Por isso, colocamos a natureza no centro de cada decisão — da semente ao seu prato. Mais do que alimentos frescos, oferecemos nutrição de verdade, cultivada com respeito à terra, ao tempo e à saúde.

Na Carbonatto, valorizamos:
Simplicidade
Facilitamos o acesso à alimentação saudável: microverdes prontos para o consumo, direto da nossa horta urbana para a sua casa.

Transparência
Mostramos cada etapa da produção, da semente ao envio, para que você saiba exatamente o que está comendo.

Sustentabilidade com propósito
Cultivamos com consciência ambiental, utilizando substratos naturais, evitando desperdícios e reduzindo nossa pegada de carbono.

Inovação com afeto
Unimos tecnologia, cuidado e frescor para entregar microverdes cheios de vida, sabor e benefícios para sua saúde.

Learn about the many ongoing Refuge Projects that we support throughout the Mashpee Refuge, including pollinator gardens, osprey nests, the Wampanoag Tribal Youth Camp, habitat restoration and other activities in which we play an important role.

Wij combineren professionaliteit, snelheid en nauwkeurigheid met heldere communicatie richting bewoners, isolatiebedrijven en gemeenten.

Onze gecertificeerde eDNA-specialisten werken landelijk, zijn Nederlandstalig en worden gecontroleerd door een onafhankelijk onderzoeks- en kennisinstituut. Hierdoor blijven we altijd nauwkeurig en voldoen we aan alle eisen binnen de BRL IC-200.

Description:
Nuestra fundación tiene como objetivo la conservación de reptiles y anfibios. Trabajamos en programas de divulgación y ciencia ciudadana para que la gente pueda conocer a estos animales, aprender sobre su rol en el ecosistema y conocer las causas de su extinción.

Name: Billings Token
Description: The Billings Project is an initiative that utilizes Blockchain technology (Tokens) and NFTs to address socio-environmental demands. It operates through the sale of NFTs representing environmental needs and proposed solutions. Holders of these NFTs are financially rewarded, while the funds raised are used to finance the resolution of the problem. Furthermore, the project aims to enhance the quality of life for communities affected by socio-environmental demands, generating both social and environmental benefits. In summary, the Billings Project is an innovative initiative that combines technology and purpose to create sustainable socio-environmental solutions and generate returns for investors.

Name: Animals of Appalachia
Description:
Animals of Appalachia is a family ran, non-profit located in Northeast Tennessee. We focus on conservation and conservation education for our region and beyond. Birthed out of a passion for caring for animals and a desire to change how animals were kept AoA hopes to change how the next generation looks at the world around them.
Our passion brought life to “Not Your Normal” Animal Rescue, an exotic animal rescue. Cats and dogs are taken in a cared for by shelters, humane societies, and fosters. They are placed in homes and cared for, but reptiles, rodents, birds, and other exotics… where do they go? Released into nature and sometimes thrown away. We seek to change that with no shame and no fees Not Your Normal Animal Rescue takes everything except cats and dogs and seeks to rehome them as well as educate the new caregivers about the needs of their new friend.

You can call us

Name: Forgotten Wild
Description: At our conservation brand, our goal is to support wild animal populations and their ecosystems by creating protected wild spaces throughout the US, both on land and in the sea. We believe in coexisting with nature and strive to create a lifestyle that is harmonious for both people and animals. We also value the importance of community and strive to structure our efforts in a way that is supportive for all. We are committed to connecting people with nature and creating a sense of purpose through our work.

Name: Reef Rescue School Initiative
Description:
What We Do
Reef Rescue School is a community-driven marine education and conservation initiative based in the Mexican Caribbean. We connect people to the ocean through hands-on learning, local partnerships, and real-world impact.

We offer:

Citizen Science Programs
Join us in monitoring coral health, mangroves, turtles, and seagrass as part of our year-round community science initiatives.
Marine Science Internships
Structured, educational placements for students and early-career professionals to gain field experience and contribute to real conservation outcomes.
School & College Partnerships
Custom-designed conservation learning experiences for international institutions seeking immersive, cross-cultural education.
Conservation Experiences for Eco-Conscious Travelers
Opportunities for individuals who want to "give back" by supporting coral restoration, clean-ups, and reef monitoring alongside local experts.
Team-Building Retreats
Unique corporate and group trips focused on ocean literacy, marine adventure, and sustainability-driven teamwork.
Women’s Scientific Diving Weeks
Female-led expeditions designed to build skills, confidence, and community through diving and marine science.
Our work combines science, education, and local empowerment to protect the Mesoamerican Reef while developing the next generation of ocean stewards.

Name: Association Floraine
Description:
Floraine, association des botanistes lorrains, a été créée le 3 février 1997. Elle est agréée au titre de la Protection de la Nature depuis le 15 décembre 2006. Le Laser à trois lobes (Laser trilobum) a été choisi comme emblème de l'association, car c'est une plante "médioeuropéenne" dont les seules stations françaises connues sont en Lorraine.

Objectifs :
- Réunir toutes les personnes intéressées par l'étude du règne végétal et de sa protection en Lorraine.
- Contribuer au développement de la botanique par différents moyens, tels que :
• organisation de conférences, réunions d'information, herborisations sur le terrain, stages de découverte
  des végétaux et des milieux,
• publication d'un bulletin de liaison distribué aux membres de l'association (Willemetia),
• publication d'une revue scientifique : Revue botanique du Grand Est,
• publication d'ouvrages ou de supports ayant trait à la botanique régionale,
• sensibilisation à la protection des plantes et milieux rares et menacés de la Lorraine par tout moyen approprié
- Mener des études et inventaires floristiques.
- Développer les relations entre les organismes intéressés par la connaissance du règne végétal.

Name: Asociación Gazagoa
Description:
Somos una organización comunitaria que lidera procesos de conservación, regeneración, educación y desarrollo sustentable en la Cordillera Oriental, Orinoquía y Amazonía. 

Trabajamos por la conservación de la biodiversidad, el desarrollo sostenible y la regeneración ambiental, liderando procesos transparentes y unificadores que fortalezcan el sentido de pertenencia al territorio.

 Nuestra visión es restaurar ecosistemas, proteger cuencas hídricas y empoderar comunidades a través de la educación ambiental y la participación activa, promoviendo cooperativas sustentables que impulsen la soberanía alimentaria y prácticas comerciales éticas, en armonía con la naturaleza y el bienestar colectivo.

Name: Nature: Le Regard Féminin
Description:
Les femmes sont largement sous-représentées dans les récits sur la nature et la faune sauvage, des domaines historiquement dominés par les contributions de l’homme occidental. Face à la sixième extinction massive des espèces et à la crise climatique mondiale, la relation entre l'humanité et le monde naturel devient l'un des plus grands défis de notre époque. Il est essentiel de privilégier le regard féminin pour ouvrir les perpectives sur le monde naturel, afin de pouvoir le regarder et l’apprecier d’un autre point de vue. 

La façon dont la nature est représentée au niveau mondial influence notre perception et, par conséquent, notre engagement envers la préservation de l’environnement. Nature: Le Regard Féminin s’engage à valoriser les contributions des femmes grâce à des programmes éducatifs gratuits. Ces programmes offrent une formation de haut niveau et un mentorat continu aux réalisatrices et médiatrices scientifiques du monde entier, leur fournissant les outils nécessaires pour définir leur rôle et créer des récits qui résonnent aupres d’un public international. Nous sommes a présent en collaboration avec plus de 350 femmes à travers le monde, dans les domaines de la narration scientifique, du cinéma animalier et de la photographie.

Cependant, la formation seule ne suffit pas. Pour qu’ils aient des effets concrets, les récits des femmes doivent atteindre les écrans locaux, nationaux et internationaux. Ainsi, notre mentorat permet aux élèves de tisser des liens solides avec des distributeurs et investisseurs, pendant que nous soutenons activement les films en cours de production.

Enfin, une fois les films terminés, nous travaillons avec les élèves sur des campagnes stratégiques visant a éduquer et à inviter l’action environmentale tant au niveau local que national. En amplifiant la perspective féminine dans la représentation du monde naturel, un changement transformateur en matière de préservation de l’environnement et d’activisme climatique devient possible.

Name: Association de Jeunes Visionnaires pour le Développement du Congo AJVDC
SobaLegacy
Description:
SobaLegacy is a sustainable forestry and carbon development company based in Angola, dedicated to restoring degraded land while creating long-term economic and social value. Through large-scale planting of native species, we generate high-quality carbon credits that support global climate goals.

Beyond carbon, SobaLegacy invests directly in local communities by improving access to employment, education, hygiene, and food security around our project areas. Our model combines environmental impact with measurable social development, ensuring that climate action also delivers lasting benefits on the ground.

We work with international partners, investors, and organizations seeking transparent, nature-based carbon solutions with real, verifiable impact.

Our mission is to inspire a love for the outdoors and foster environmental stewardship in children through free and affordable outdoor instruction programs.

Ecosystem health becomes your competitive moat
Environmental solutions generate your highest returns

Your success directly contributes to planetary healing

Conservation Integrity Watch documents fraud, waste and abuse in the wildlife and nature conservation sector. Our goal is to encourage accountability and transparency in the sector and promote a vision of conservation that is locally led and free from corrupt and secret agendas. 

No one is untouchable!

Name: Corporación BioRenueva
Description: BioRenuva es una corporación sin ánimo de lucro comprometida con la promoción y ejecución de proyectos innovadores en pro del cuidado del medio ambiente, el desarrollo de programas ambientales y la transformación de materiales recuperables, impulsando la economía circular de forma integral y sostenible. Nuestra organización trabaja incansablemente para reducir la generación de residuos sólidos mediante la implementación de programas educativos que fomentan la conciencia ambiental y la adopción de prácticas responsables, mientras que, a la vez, promueve la recolección y tratamiento eficiente de materiales que de otra manera terminarían en rellenos sanitarios. A través de la investigación y el desarrollo de nuevas tecnologías y procesos, transformamos estos materiales en productos de alto valor agregado, generando oportunidades de comercialización que fortalecen tanto la economía local como la ética en la cadena de suministro. Un pilar fundamental de nuestra labor es el empoderamiento y fortalecimiento del liderazgo femenino, ya que consideramos que la integración de las mujeres en los procesos de capacitación, creación de empleos verdes y toma de decisiones es esencial para el progreso social y ambiental. BioRenuva se articula en diversas actividades específicas, como la educación ambiental, la transformación comercial, la innovación tecnológica, la reducción de residuos, la restauración ecológica y la investigación ambiental, estableciendo alianzas estratégicas con entidades gubernamentales, empresas y organizaciones de la sociedad civil para ampliar el alcance de sus iniciativas. Este enfoque multidimensional no solo permite optimizar los procesos de reciclaje y reutilización de recursos, sino que también crea un modelo integral de desarrollo que contribuye de manera significativa a la conservación de la biodiversidad y a la construcción de comunidades resilientes, comprometidas con la generación de un futuro más justo, sustentable y próspero para las generaciones

Nous développons des relations de confiance entre les décideurs économiques, institutionnels, politiques et associatifs au cœur des territoires.

Name: Café Circular
Description: Reducimos residuos y promovemos la economía circular, creando soluciones ecológicas que benefician al medio ambiente y a la sociedad.

Name: EthnobioTales
Description:
Stories shape how people treat nature and what they choose to protect or destroy. In Nigeria, stories have made forests sacred, turned animals into symbols of power, and passed down knowledge of plants that heal.

But stories have also made some species feared, hunted, and forgotten. Myths have pushed animals to the edge of extinction- not out of hate, but because of what the stories made people believe. 

A story that calls an animal evil can wipe out an entire species. A myth that gives a tree sacred meaning can protect a whole forest.

EthnoBioTales is building Africa's first digital ethnobiology archive, where stories are not only saved but used to protect what they once endangered.

We gather oral histories, folktales and cultural beliefs about Nigeria's species, turning fear into understanding, and myths into tools for conservation. When a story is told with truth and care, it can reshape what people believe and how they act. What once endangered life can now help save it.

If stories can destroy, stories can protect. EthnoBioTales is rewriting the story, one tale at a time.

Name: NWNC Dark Skies Inc.
Description:
The NWNC Dark Skies Project is dedicated to protecting the natural nighttime environment by advocating for dark sky preservation and mitigating light pollution. Serving the Upper Narrows, Westport, Newboro, and Chaffey's regions, our goal is to achieve official designation as a Dark Sky Preserve. 

Through community engagement, educational initiatives, and collaborative partnerships, we promote sustainable outdoor lighting practices that balance ecological preservation with community needs. 

Join us in advancing environmental stewardship and safeguarding the integrity of our shared natural resources for future generations.

For more information on our initiative, to make a donation or to find out how you can get involved, please go to www.NWNC.ca.

Name: PatternPurrfect AI
Description: Our approach to wildlife monitoring combines AI-driven facial recognition with advanced machine-learning techniques. In the first phase, we use algorithms to accurately extract animal faces from various images, ensuring clear and focused data for analysis. The second phase takes these extracted faces and applies metric learning, a key aspect that enables our AI models to recognize and learn the unique features of each species. This process is dynamic; as the model encounters more data, it continuously improves its ability to distinguish between individual animals, adapting to changes in their appearance due to aging, seasonal variations, or other environmental factors. This evolving capability of our models to recognize new individuals over time is crucial, ensuring long-term effectiveness and keeping pace with the ever-changing dynamics of wildlife populations.

Name: Syrwet U Barim
Description: Syrwet U Barim Mariang Jingkieng Jri Cooperative Federation Ltd. is a pioneering community initiative dedicated to conserving and promoting the Jingkieng Jri (Living Root Bridges) and its cultural landscape. Established with over 40+ primary cooperatives in Meghalaya, it plays a crucial role in preserving ancestral knowledge, supporting sustainable livelihoods and encouraging responsible development. Since its founding in 2018, Syrwet U Barim has held extensive community dialogues with village elders and local authorities to shape policies for heritage preservation, while storytelling and site visits have facilitated inter-generational knowledge transfer. Through various programs, the federation has advanced conservation efforts, including maintaining Living Root Bridges and establishing community nurseries. The federation's collaboration with the Government of Meghalaya resulted in the Jingkieng Jri/Lyu Chrai Cultural Landscape being added to UNESCO's tentative list in 2022. Additionally, partnerships with research institutions have strengthened ecological studies and sustainable practices. Syrwet U Barim also hosts workshops and festivals to empower local communities, celebrating traditional skills and fostering resilience. Committed to a sustainable future, the federation advocates for policy support and aspires for UNESCO World Heritage status.

Name: Observatório do Plástico
Description: O Observatório do Plástico surgiu para monitorar a produção, o descarte e os impactos do plástico no meio ambiente e na vida marinha. Nosso objetivo é unir sociedade civil, empresas, instituições e pesquisadores na busca por alternativas e gestão responsável do plástico.

Name: ReconAg
Description: Offering farm planning advice, wildlife conservation efforts and fencing projects.

Name: FCC Monteverde
Description: We are dedicated to the protection of countless flora and fauna, specifically those that are considered endangered species. We protect land and plant endangered tree species so ensure their survival and the survival of animals that rely on them.

Name: Oregon Bear Foundation
Description:
The Oregon Bear Foundation is an officially chartered chapter of the American Bear Foundation.

The American Bear Foundation is an all volunteer 501(c)(3) non-profit. We are dedicated to the protection & development of bears, bear habitat, & bear hunting in the United States.

The ABF was developed primarily out of a lack of support for the bear hunter & black bears in the United States. Secondly, due to the overwhelming success of the grizzly bear recovery it is essential to study & better understand the black bear & their habitat, more importantly how the black bear can co-exist with a much larger predator in the grizzly bear. The recent success of the grizzly bear has also created a management issue and more importantly an opportunity for sportsman/women to hunt this remarkable species.

As we move forward as a respected organization representing all that it is bears in USA, It is our vision to leave future generations of sportsman with a better opportunity to share and grow our hunting heritage.

Name: A.R.C. Conservation Consulting
Description: A.R.C. Conservation Consulting is built on the principles of Adaptation, Resilience, and Collaboration, ensuring tailored, responsive solutions for the evolving challenges of conservation and development. Guided by the ethos of “bridging local knowledge and lasting conservation,” ARC fosters equitable, community-driven approaches that integrate science, practice, and policy.
